title: How many labels do you need? A decision framework for cross-habitat marine species recognition
comment: 29 pages, 12 figures, 4 tables. Includes supplementary appendix
summary:
Automated image recognition is increasingly used to scale ecological monitoring beyond manual annotation, yet ecologists lack evidence-based guidance on how much labelling effort reliable deployment at new sites requires. We present a decision framework quantifying the trade-off between labelling effort and recognition accuracy when transferring vision systems across marine habitats. The benchmark spans five datasets, three oceans, and three taxonomic groups (fish, corals, invertebrates), from tropical reefs in the Great Barrier Reef and French Polynesia to a temperate Danish fjord. We evaluated four recognition models (DINOv2, CLIP, ResNet-50, EfficientNet-B4) under four adaptation strategies (linear probing, LoRA, Visual Prompt Tuning, full fine-tuning) across three protocols: within-habitat transfer across 20 reef sites (240 runs), cross-dataset geographic transfer along a difficulty gradient (40 runs), and few-shot adaptation curves with 0-100 labelled samples per class (648 runs). Frozen self-supervised foundation features (DINOv2 + linear classifier, 1,538 trainable parameters) generalised to unseen reef sites at least as well as fully fine-tuned convolutional baselines four orders of magnitude larger; they learned species-diagnostic, habitat-invariant representations, whereas baselines encoded habitat-specific shortcuts that fail at new sites. As few as 10-20 labelled images per species sufficed to deploy reliable recognition at a new site, cutting annotation effort by roughly an order of magnitude.
  Solution. Programmes expanding to new sites can deploy reliable recognition by pairing a frozen, open foundation model (DINOv2) with a simple linear classifier and annotating only 10-20 images per species - roughly 1-4 hours per site. The framework lets programmes budget labelling effort against expected accuracy across sites, ecosystems, and platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种量化标注工作量与识别精度之间权衡的决策框架，发现冻结的DINOv2自监督特征加线性分类器（仅1538个可训练参数）足以跨栖息地泛化，10-20张每类标注图像即可在新地点部署可靠识别，将标注成本降低约一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 自动图像识别正被广泛用于规模化生态监测，但生态学家缺乏关于在新地点部署可靠识别系统需要多少标注工作量的循证指导，这一研究空白限制了视觉系统在不同海洋栖息地之间的有效迁移应用。
AI.method: 构建了一个涵盖五个数据集、三个大洋、三个分类群（鱼类、珊瑚、无脊椎动物）的跨海洋栖息地迁移基准，评估了四种识别模型（DINOv2、CLIP、ResNet-50、EfficientNet-B4）在四种适应策略（线性探测、LoRA、Visual Prompt Tuning、全微调）下的表现，并设计了三种迁移协议：栖息地内跨20个礁点迁移（240次运行）、跨数据集地理迁移（40次运行）以及0-100每类标注样本的少样本适应曲线（648次运行）。
AI.result: 冻结的自监督基础模型特征（DINOv2 + 线性分类器，仅1538个可训练参数）在泛化到未见礁点时至少与全微调的卷积基线（参数规模大四个数量级）表现相当；DINOv2学习了物种诊断性、栖息地不变的表征，而基线模型编码了在新地点失效的栖息地特定捷径特征。仅需每类10-20张标注图像即可在新地点部署可靠识别，将标注工作量削减约一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 向新地点扩展的生态监测项目可以通过使用冻结的开放基础模型（DINOv2）搭配简单线性分类器，并仅为每个物种标注10-20张图像（每地点约1-4小时）来部署可靠的识别系统；该框架使得项目能够根据预期精度在不同地点、生态系统和平台之间预算标注工作量。

title: Entropy-Coded MS-VQ-VAE with Learned Priors for Ultra-Low Bitrate Video Compression
summary:
Learned video codecs based on continuous latent representations struggle to operate reliably below 0.1 bits per pixel~(bpp): without a differentiable rate signal, Lagrangian optimisation cannot effectively trade reconstruction quality for bitrate at extreme compression ratios. We demonstrate that discrete latent representations sidestep this limitation entirely. In a vector-quantized~(VQ) codec, the codebook size~$K$ imposes a hard information ceiling of $\log_2 K$ bits per symbol; a learned autoregressive prior then exploits the non-uniform distribution of code usage -- which we show follows a power law -- to push actual bitrates well below this ceiling, without any rate-penalty tuning.
  Building on the MS-VQ-VAE architecture introduced in~\cite{kotthapalli2026msvqvae}, we sweep $K \in \{128, 256, 512, 1024\}$ under a uniform training protocol to trace four operating points on the rate-distortion~(RD) curve. We identify and resolve a critical training instability: gradient-based VQ collapses catastrophically at $K \leq 512$, whereas EMA-stabilised codebook updates with dead-code restart maintain full utilisation across all configurations. On 500 UCF101 test clips ($64\!\times\!64$, 32~frames), our models operate at 0.043-0.064~bpp -- 3.3-5$\times$ below H.264's practical floor and $5$-$7.6\times$ below H.265's floor at this resolution. Every MS-VQ-VAE configuration outperforms H.265 CRF\,36 on perceptual quality (LPIPS) despite using $5$-$7.6\times$ fewer bits. At $K{=}1024$, the model surpasses H.265 CRF\,36 on LPIPS by a margin of 0.072 absolute while using $5.1\times$ fewer bits. Codebook analysis confirms power-law index distributions and 70-85\% entropy efficiency, establishing the pipeline as a principled learned entropy coder.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在矢量量化视频编解码器中，离散潜表示通过码本大小的硬信息上界和幂律分布的先验概率，可在0.043–0.064 bpp下超越H.264/H.265的感知质量，无需拉格朗日率失真优化，并解决了梯度式VQ在小码本下的训练坍塌问题。
AI.motivation: 基于连续潜表示的学习型视频编解码器在极低比特率（低于0.1 bpp）下性能退化严重，原因在于缺少可微分的率信号导致拉格朗日优化无法有效权衡重建质量与码率；该研究旨在探索离散潜表示能否规避这一根本性缺陷。
AI.method: 基于MS-VQ-VAE架构，采用矢量量化（VQ）离散潜表示，通过码本大小K施加每符号log₂ K比特的硬信息上界，并利用学习型自回归先验捕捉码本使用分布（呈幂律分布）以将实际码率推至远低于该上界；对比了梯度式VQ与EMA稳定化码本更新加死亡码字重启策略，并系统扫描K∈{128,256,512,1024}以刻画率失真曲线上的四个工作点。
AI.result: 在500个UCF101测试片段（64×64，32帧）上，模型运行于0.043–0.064 bpp，比H.264的实际地板低3.3–5倍，比H.265低5–7.6倍；所有MS-VQ-VAE配置在LPIPS感知质量上均优于H.265 CRF 36，其中K=1024配置在比特数减少5.1倍的同时LPIPS绝对领先0.072；梯度式VQ在K≤512时灾难性坍塌，而EMA加死亡重启策略保持全部码本利用率；码本分析确认了幂律索引分布和70–85%的熵效率。
AI.conclusion: 离散潜表示从根本上解决了连续表示在极低码率下的优化困境，联合码本大小硬约束与自回归先验可构建有原理依据的学习型熵编码器；EMA稳定化与死亡码字重启是训练小码本VQ的关键技术，该管道为极低比特率视频压缩提供了可行的学习方案。

title: Dual-Adaptive SAM3: Hierarchical Routing over Low-Rank Expert Layers for Parameter-Efficient Medical Image Segmentation
summary: The Segment Anything Model with Concepts (SAM3) heralds a new paradigm for open-vocabulary segmentation through natural language interaction, offering significant potential for medical image analysis. However, effectively adapting such a powerful vision-language model to the diverse and nuanced domain of medical imaging remains a key challenge. Naive fine-tuning is parameter-inefficient, while standard Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) methods introduce prohibitive computational overhead, limiting their clinical applicability. To address this, we propose Dual-Adaptive SAM3 (DA-SAM3), a novel framework that achieves both high segmentation accuracy and extreme parameter efficiency via a dual-adaptive specialization mechanism. Our first adaptation is task-aware: a Dynamic Expert Router (DER) that sparsely activates the most relevant experts by jointly reasoning about the visual input and the textual concept prompt, mimicking a clinical consultation process. Our second adaptation is parameter-aware: a Decomposed Parameterized Experts (DPE) design that represents each expert as a shared frozen base (inherited from the pretrained SAM3) and a lightweight trainable low-rank delta, reducing MoE parameter overhead by over 80\%. Extensive experiments on multiple public medical segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that Dual-Adaptive SAM3 not only matches or exceeds the accuracy of fully fine-tuned SAM3 and standard MoE baselines, but also achieves a notable 5\% gain over current state-of-the-art methods, with interpretable results validating its effectiveness. The code is available at: https://github.com/Reconsider80/DA-SAM3.

AI.tldr: DA-SAM3提出了一种双自适应机制（任务感知的动态专家路由与参数感知的低秩分解专家）来高效微调SAM3模型，在多个医学图像分割基准上以超过80%的参数压缩比实现了超越全量微调SAM3和SOTA方法的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 将SAM3这类开放词汇视觉-语言模型有效适配到医学影像领域存在关键挑战：朴素微调参数效率低下，而标准MoE方法引入的计算开销过大，限制了临床应用可行性。
AI.method: DA-SAM3框架包含两种核心适配机制：任务适配方面，提出动态专家路由器（DER），通过联合推理视觉输入与文本概念提示来稀疏激活最相关的专家，模拟临床会诊过程；参数适配方面，提出分解参数化专家（DPE），将每个专家表示为共享冻结基座（继承自预训练SAM3）加轻量可训练低秩增量，将MoE参数量降低80%以上。
AI.result: 在多个公开医学分割基准上的实验表明，DA-SAM3在精度上匹配或超越全量微调SAM3和标准MoE基线，并相比当前最优方法取得5%的显著提升，同时具备可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了一种兼具高分割精度与极端参数效率的双自适应微调范式可有效推动开放词汇视觉-语言模型在医学影像领域的实际临床应用。

title: Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning: Evaluating Criterion-Shift Adaptation in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models can perform new tasks without parameter updates through in-context learning (ICL), whose core mechanism is utilizing the support set for task induction. In the standard ICL setting, once the task is induced, its decision criterion remains fixed. However, in real-world applications, many tasks exhibit a stable high-level intent, while their decision criteria shift according to specific requirements. Thus, we introduce a new setting, denoted as Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning (CC-ICL), where models must infer the latent criterion from context and adjust predictions accordingly under fixed task semantics. To evaluate this capability, we propose two complementary metrics, Criterion Invariance and Criterion Sensitivity, capturing the model's robustness and adaptability under criterion shifts. We further construct CC-Bench, a multi-domain benchmark that supports evaluation under the CC-ICL setting. By employing a dual-level data hierarchy, CC-Bench enables legitimate ground-truth variation conditioned on the active criterion even when the task remains fixed. Experiments on CC-Bench reveal that most models exhibit a rigid boundary bias, struggling to align their decisions with the latent criterion. We also find that even a simple multi-criterion training strategy can significantly reduce this bias, improving Criterion Sensitivity and enabling 7B-scale models to surpass proprietary models without degrading general multimodal performance.

AI.tldr: 提出Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning (CC-ICL)新范式，要求视觉-语言模型在固定任务语义下根据上下文中隐含的潜在准则调整预测；构建CC-Bench基准并设计Criterion Invariance和Criterion Sensitivity两个互补指标，实验发现多数模型存在刚性决策边界偏置，而简单的多准则训练策略可显著缓解该问题，使7B级模型超越闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 标准上下文学习（ICL）中模型一旦归纳出任务，其决策准则便固定不变，无法适应现实应用中任务高层意图稳定但决策准则随具体需求动态变化的场景。现有研究缺乏对模型在固定任务语义下依据潜在准则灵活调整预测能力的系统评估，因此需要定义新设置、构建相应基准并设计针对性指标来填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 引入Criterion-Conditional In-Context Learning (CC-ICL)新设置，要求模型从上下文中推断潜在准则并在固定任务语义下据此调整预测。提出Criterion Invariance（评估准则不变时的鲁棒性）和Criterion Sensitivity（评估准则变化时的适应性）两个互补指标。构建CC-Bench多领域基准，采用双层数据层次结构（dual-level data hierarchy），在任务固定时使真实标签随激活准则合法变化。
AI.result: 在CC-Bench上的实验表明，大多数现有视觉-语言模型存在刚性决策边界偏置（rigid boundary bias），难以将决策与潜在准则对齐。简单的多准则训练策略能显著减轻这种偏置，提升Criterion Sensitivity，使7B规模的模型在准则适应能力上超越闭源模型，且不损失通用多模态性能。
AI.conclusion: CC-ICL揭示了标准ICL在动态决策准则场景下的局限性，刚性边界偏置是当前模型的普遍缺陷。多准则训练是一简单有效的缓解方案，表明通过适当的训练策略可以使较小开源模型在准则适应能力上超越更大规模的闭源模型，为提升视觉-语言模型在现实动态环境下的灵活性和适应性提供了新方向。

title: Echoes of Unrest: A Multimodal NLP Framework for Early Warning of Fake News and Violence-Driven Mob Activity
comment: Accepted for publication as a book chapter (Taylor & Francis, 2026)
summary: Rapid growth in social media has transformed global communication by enabling fast information exchange, but it has also accelerated the spread of misinformation. Fake news, manipulated content, and provocative narratives are increasingly linked to social unrest, political instability, and mob violence. Incidents in South Asia and elsewhere demonstrate how false information disseminated via platforms such as Facebook and WhatsApp can trigger real-world harm, often spreading faster than fact-checking efforts can respond. To address this challenge, this chapter presents a multilingual, multimodal Natural Language Processing (NLP) framework for early detection of misinformation and violence-prone dynamics. A fused dataset of 138,256 Bangla and English samples was created by combining multiple benchmark datasets. The framework integrates XLM-RoBERTa for multilingual text representation, CLIP for visual embedding, and a multi-head attention mechanism for multimodal fusion, enhanced with auxiliary features such as sarcasm and geospatial metadata. Experiments on a stratified 30% subset achieved 98% test accuracy with strong precision and recall. The outcomes show the efficacy of multimodal approaches in early misinformation detection and highlight the added value of geospatial signals for anticipating real-world escalation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多语言、多模态的NLP框架，融合XLM-RoBERTa、CLIP和多头注意力机制，在包含138,256条孟加拉语和英语样本的数据集上实现了98%的测试准确率，用于早期检测虚假信息和暴力倾向动态。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中虚假信息、操纵内容和煽动性叙事的快速传播已与社会动荡、政治不稳定和群体暴力事件密切相关，事实核查的速度往往滞后于虚假信息的扩散速度，因此亟需能够早期检测虚假信息及暴力倾向动态的有效方法。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含138,256条孟加拉语和英语样本的融合数据集，提出多语言多模态NLP框架，集成XLM-RoBERTa进行多语言文本表示、CLIP进行视觉嵌入，并采用多头注意力机制进行多模态融合，同时引入讽刺检测和地理空间元数据作为辅助特征。
AI.result: 在分层抽样的30%子集上进行实验，取得了98%的测试准确率，并展现出强大的精确率和召回率，验证了多模态方法在早期虚假信息检测中的有效性，同时表明地理空间信号对预测现实世界事件升级具有附加价值。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合方法在早期虚假信息检测中表现出优异性能，地理空间元数据等辅助特征能够有效增强模型对现实暴力升级风险的预测能力，为应对社交媒体虚假信息引发的社会安全问题提供了可行技术路径。

title: iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni Technical Report
summary: General-purpose embodied agents must understand multimodal instructions, anticipate how their environment will evolve, and produce precise control actions over extended horizons. Existing approaches typically specialize in visual-language reasoning, video-based world modeling, or action generation, while cascaded pipelines that first synthesize future observations and then infer actions can introduce interface bottlenecks and compound prediction errors. We present iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni, a unified multimodal foundation model that jointly models vision(videos and images), language, and action within a single Omni framework. Its modality-specific visual-language, video-generation, and action-generation components communicate through shared multimodal self-attention. This design establishes brain-cerebellum collaboration: the vision-language modeland video generation model form a high-level brain for instruction understanding, task planning, progress tracking, and future visual-state prediction, whereas the action generation modelserves as a low-level cerebellum that directly converts planned subgoals and shared multimodal context into executable action chunks. To develop these capabilities, we combine action-annotated and action-free embodied videos from human demonstrations and robot interactions with embodied reasoning, embodied perception, and general-purpose image-text data to construct a comprehensive dataset. We further adopt a four-stage strategy that progressively trains the VLM, VGM, and AGM before jointly fine-tuning the complete model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni，一个统一的多模态基础模型，将视觉、语言和动作联合建模于单一Omni框架中，通过共享多头自注意力实现视觉-语言模型、视频生成模型和动作生成模型的脑-小脑协作，并采用四阶段渐进训练策略，以解决通用具身智能体在长程任务中多模态理解、世界预测和动作生成的协同问题。
AI.motivation: 现有具身智能体通常将视觉-语言推理、视频世界建模和动作生成作为独立模块级联处理，这种流水线架构在接口处存在信息瓶颈，且预测误差会在模块间累积放大，缺乏统一的联合建模框架来协同处理多模态指令理解、环境演化预测和长程精确控制动作生成。
AI.method: iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni采用单一Omni框架，内含视觉-语言模型(VLM)、视频生成模型(VGM)和动作生成模型(AGM)三个模态专用组件，它们通过共享的多头自注意力机制实现信息交互，形成脑-小脑协作架构：VLM和VGM构成高层脑负责指令理解、任务规划、进度跟踪和未来视觉状态预测，AGM作为低层小脑将规划的子目标和共享多模态上下文直接转化为可执行的动作块；模型在包含人类演示和机器人交互的动作标注与无动作标注具身视频、具身推理、具身感知以及通用图文数据构建的综合数据集上，采用四阶段渐进训练策略依次训练VLM、VGM、AGM，最后联合微调完整模型。
AI.result: 论文未在摘要中报告具体的定量实验结果或基准测试指标，但强调了该方法通过统一框架和脑-小脑协作设计能够有效克服级联流水线中接口瓶颈和复合预测误差的问题，实现了多模态指令理解、未来视觉状态预测和长程动作生成的端到端联合建模。
AI.conclusion: iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni通过统一多模态基础模型和脑-小脑协作架构，为通用具身智能体提供了一种无需级联流水线的端到端解决方案，其四阶段训练策略和综合数据集构建方法为后续研究提供了可参考的实现范式。

title: RotateAttention: RoPE-Aware Rotation and Range Rectification for INT4 Quantized Attention in Video Generation
summary: In \textbf{DiT-based video generation models equipped with 3D Rotary Position Embeddings (3D RoPE)}, the attention mechanism remains a primary computational bottleneck due to its quadratic complexity with respect to sequence length. While quantized \textbf{FlashAttention} offers a promising path toward hardware acceleration, existing low-bit quantization methods overlook two critical challenges in this setting: \textbf{1)} applying online rotation matrices -- a widely used technique for mitigating outliers in Queries ($Q$) and Keys ($K$) -- is difficult to reconcile with \textbf{RoPE}; and \textbf{2)} the non-negative attention matrix $P = \exp(QK - \max(QK))$ makes symmetric quantization waste half of the 4-bit dynamic range. In this work, we observe that the outlier distributions of $Q$ and $K$ are strongly affected by the dimensional partitioning of \textbf{3D RoPE}. Based on this finding, we propose \textbf{RotateAttention}, an efficient \textbf{mixed-precision INT4 FlashAttention} framework tailored for \textbf{DiT-based video generation models with 3D RoPE}, using selective \textbf{FP16 fallback} for accuracy-sensitive attention blocks and denoising steps. RotateAttention introduces two core techniques: \textbf{1) RoPE-aware Rotation}, which employs either mergeable rotation matrices that can be fused into RoPE or negligible-overhead matrices to mitigate RoPE-induced outliers in $Q$ and $K$; and \textbf{2) Range-optimized $P$ Quantization}, which uses fixed scales and zero-points to fully exploit the \textbf{INT4 numerical range} with minimal computational overhead. Experiments show that \textbf{RotateAttention} preserves video generation quality nearly identical to full-precision baselines while achieving up to 1.68$\times$ end-to-end speedup and 2.2$\times$ kernel-level acceleration.

AI.tldr: RotateAttention提出了一种针对配备3D旋转位置编码（3D RoPE）的DiT视频生成模型的高效混合精度INT4 FlashAttention框架，通过RoPE感知的旋转矩阵融合和范围优化的P矩阵量化，在保持生成质量的同时实现最高1.68倍端到端加速和2.2倍内核级加速。
AI.motivation: 在基于DiT的视频生成模型中，3D RoPE下的注意力机制因序列长度的二次复杂度成为计算瓶颈，而现有低比特量化方法面临两大未解决的挑战：一是在线旋转矩阵（缓解Q/K离群值的常用技术）与RoPE难以兼容，二是非负注意力矩阵P的对称量化浪费了INT4一半的动态范围。
AI.method: RotateAttention提出两种核心技术：1）RoPE感知的旋转（RoPE-aware Rotation），采用可融合到RoPE中的可合并旋转矩阵或极低开销矩阵来缓解RoPE引起的Q/K离群值；2）范围优化的P矩阵量化（Range-optimized P Quantization），使用固定缩放因子和零点充分挖掘INT4数值范围，并结合选择性FP16回退机制对精度敏感的注意力块和去噪步骤进行混合精度处理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，RotateAttention在保持与全精度基线几乎一致的视频生成质量的前提下，实现了最高1.68倍端到端加速和2.2倍内核级加速。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了3D RoPE维度划分对Q/K离群值分布的强烈影响，证明了通过RoPE感知的旋转矩阵设计和非对称P矩阵量化可以有效突破低比特FlashAttention在视频生成模型中的精度-效率瓶颈，为大规模视频生成模型的高效推理提供了可行方案。

title: LuxSQA: Ask Me in Luxembourgish with TTS-Augmented Spoken Question Answering
summary: Spoken Question Answering (SQA) remains largely focused on high-resource languages and carefully recorded speech, limiting the reach of speech-LLM methods in low-resource settings. This paper investigates whether text-to-speech (TTS) can provide task-specific training data for Luxembourgish SQA without requiring a large human-recorded QA corpus. Starting from existing text-based QA resources, we translate questions into Luxembourgish, synthesize spoken questions with multiple TTS systems, and pair them with textual answers. We train a parameter-efficient SLAM-style architecture that connects a frozen Whisper encoder to frozen multilingual LLM backends through a learned projector and LoRA adapters. We compare MMS-TTS, Qwen3-TTS, and OmniVoice variants, including single-source corpora of about 48k questions and a 4TTS multi-source mix of approximately 230k questions. Evaluation on LLAMA-LB-Test with two real Luxembourgish speaker conditions shows that multi-source and voice-design-based synthetic training configurations yield the strongest SQA performance. The results also show that no-reference TTS quality scores do not monotonically predict downstream QA performance, indicating that synthetic speech must be evaluated as task-specific training data rather than only as natural-sounding audio.

AI.tldr: 本文探索利用文本到语音（TTS）技术为低资源语言卢森堡语生成口语问答（SQA）训练数据，通过构建多TTS混合语料库和参数高效SLAM架构，证明多源合成语音配置能显著提升SQA性能，并揭示无参考TTS质量分数与下游任务表现之间不存在单调预测关系。
AI.motivation: 现有口语问答（SQA）研究主要集中于高资源语言和精心录制的语音数据，导致语音-大语言模型方法在低资源语言场景下受限，而构建大规模人工录制的口语问答语料库成本高昂且难以实现。
AI.method: 基于已有文本问答资源，将问题翻译为卢森堡语，使用多种TTS系统（MMS-TTS、Qwen3-TTS、OmniVoice变体）合成口语问题并配以文本答案，构建了单源约48k问题和多源混合约230k问题的训练语料；采用参数高效的SLAM架构，通过可学习的投影层和LoRA适配器将冻结的Whisper编码器与冻结的多语言大语言模型后端连接起来进行训练。
AI.result: 在LLAMA-LB-Test基准上基于两种真实卢森堡语说话者条件的评估表明，多源合成训练配置和基于语音设计的合成配置取得了最强的SQA性能；同时发现无参考TTS质量分数不能单调地预测下游QA任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 合成语音作为任务特定的训练数据比仅作为自然听感的音频更有评估价值，TTS生成的数据可以有效替代人工录音用于低资源语言SQA任务，多源TTS混合策略对此类低资源场景尤为关键。

title: ASK in the Dark: Uncertainty-Gated LLM Assistance under Partial Observability
comment: Accepted at the IJCAI-ECAI Joint Workshop on Planning for Complex Real-World Applications and Bridging the Gap Between AI Planning and (Reinforcement) Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning agents operating under partial observability must act on incomplete information, making them natural candidates for guidance from small language models (SLMs) that carry broad reasoning priors. Yet integrating SLM guidance into this setting has proven difficult: across all test environments, vanilla uncertainty-gated approaches achieve an overwrite rate at or near zero, meaning the SLM almost never contributes an independent action. We trace this failure to the bare egocentric prompt, which provides insufficient context for genuine reasoning, and identify it as a context problem rather than a capacity problem. We propose ASK+, which supplies the SLM with trajectory-aware context (a partially revealed map, visited positions, and action history) and structured chain-of-thought reasoning, converting it from a passive redundancy check into a more informative consultant that occasionally corrects the policy. We further establish that the predictive entropy signal used for selective querying measures action uncertainty rather than state uncertainty and remains informative in POMDPs, making uncertainty-gated assistance viable beyond fully observable settings. The stateful prompt drives substantial gains: on DoorKey, where vanilla ASK matches PPO (both 89%), ASK+ reaches 93% success; on FourRooms, success climbs from 53% to 70%; on HigherLower, accuracy reaches 73.7%, matching the SLM-only upper bound. Across all environments, Qwen3.5-2B matches or exceeds Qwen3.5-4B, confirming that prompt design and selective gating dominate the impact of model scale, enabling guidance without large models.

AI.tldr: 提出ASK+方法，通过为小型语言模型提供轨迹感知上下文（部分地图、访问位置、动作历史）和结构化思维链推理，解决了部分可观测环境下SLM引导的上下文缺失问题；在DoorKey、FourRooms等任务上显著超越基线，并证明提示设计与选择性门控比模型规模更关键。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测环境中，强化学习代理需基于不完整信息决策，小型语言模型携带广泛推理先验但难以有效集成；现有不确定性门控方法中SLM的覆盖率为零或接近零，几乎从未贡献独立动作，该失败源于裸自我中心提示缺乏充分上下文，被确认为上下文问题而非容量问题。
AI.method: 提出ASK+框架，为SLM提供轨迹感知上下文（部分揭示地图、已访问位置、动作历史）并引入结构化思维链推理，将SLM从被动冗余检查转化为可偶尔纠正策略的信息性顾问；同时验证预测熵信号在POMDP中衡量的是动作不确定性而非状态不确定性，仍可用于选择性查询门控。
AI.result: 在DoorKey任务上，ASK+成功率达93%，而基线ASK和PPO均为89%；在FourRooms上成功率从53%提升至70%；在HigherLower上准确率达73.7%，匹配SLM独立推断的上界；Qwen3.5-2B在所有环境中匹配或超越Qwen3.5-4B，表明提示设计主导模型规模的影响。
AI.conclusion: 提示设计与选择性门控比模型规模对SLM引导效果的影响更大，使得无需大模型即可实现有效指导；预测熵可用于部分可观测环境中的不确定性门控，为SLM与RL在POMDP中的融合提供了可行路径。

title: Homer: Understanding Long-form Videos with Hierarchical Memory and Agentic Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models excel on short clips but struggle on hour-long videos in an online setting, where frames are processed incrementally under limited memory. Existing online methods either retain compact visual representations that lack semantic structure, or build higher-level memory stores organized around temporal proximity rather than explicit causal links, leaving multi-hop narrative reasoning to be reconstructed by the LLM at every query. We bridge this gap with \textsc{Homer}, a Hierarchical Online Memory Exploration and Reasoning framework. \textsc{Homer}'s memory mirrors the multi-scale structure of long videos, ranging from raw perception, to recurring entities, to events connected by explicit temporal and causal relations. Its agentic reasoner then explores this memory the way humans do, locating the relevant scene, looking up details, and composing the answer through multi-round memory retrieval, with a harness that verifies and corrects each step. \textsc{Homer} outperforms the previous best agent method by $+5.5$, $+10.8$, and $+4.4$ points on M3-Bench-robot, M3-Bench-web, and Video-MME-Long, and consistently lifts three various LLM backbones, indicating a model-agnostic structural capability for grounded retrieval over long videos.

AI.tldr: Homer是一个分层在线记忆探索与推理框架，通过构建从原始感知到实体再到事件的层级化记忆结构，并配备多轮检索的智能体推理器，在小时级视频问答任务上显著优于现有方法，最高提升10.8个点。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在短片段上表现优异，但在在线处理小时级长视频时面临有限内存下增量式帧处理的挑战。现有在线方法要么保留紧凑但缺乏语义结构的视觉表示，要么构建按时间邻近性而非显式因果联系组织的高层记忆存储，导致多跳叙事推理需要在每次查询时由LLM从头重建。
AI.method: Homer提出层级化在线记忆架构，记忆结构从原始感知层、到重复出现的实体层、再到由显式时间和因果关联连接的事件层，多层次镜像长视频的结构。其智能体推理器模拟人类探索记忆的方式，通过多轮记忆检索定位相关场景、查找细节并组合答案，并配有验证和纠正每一步的约束机制。
AI.result: Homer在M3-Bench-robot、M3-Bench-web和Video-MME-Long上分别比先前最佳智能体方法高出5.5、10.8和4.4个点，并且在不同LLM骨干网络上均能稳定提升性能，表明其具有模型无关的结构化检索能力。
AI.conclusion: Homer通过显式建模视频的层级叙事结构和因果时序关系，使在线长视频推理不再依赖LLM在查询时临时重建上下文，而是通过结构化记忆的自主探索实现准确检索，其模型无关的特性表明该框架可作为通用的长视频在线推理增强方案。

title: Seduced by the Narrative: Assessing Rule Adherence in Semi-Open Textual Sandboxes
summary: As LLMs are increasingly deployed as autonomous adjudicators in semi-open textual game environments, robust rule adherence becomes critical when user intent conflicts with system rules. However, these models are trained to be helpful and compliant, leaving them vulnerable to a class of attacks we term \textit{Rhetorical Injection}, where adversarial users exploit narrative framing techniques such as pseudo-logical reasoning and authoritative coercion to bypass adjudication logic. We present CoC-Seduce, a multi-agent adversarial benchmark built on Tabletop Role-Playing Game (TRPG) mechanics, an ideal instantiation of semi-open environments where rules are explicit for adjudication, yet interaction remains entirely in natural language. Three frontier models, i.e., GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.5 Flash, serve as adversarial generators producing 5,376 samples across 4 world settings and 16 skill categories. We then benchmark 20 target adjudicators against this corpus. Evaluation across 20 models reveals that neither model scale nor explicit reasoning mechanisms reliably confer adjudication robustness, with \textsc{Pseudo-Logic} emerging as the dominant attack vector and cross-cultural settings exposing systematic knowledge gaps across all evaluated families. Project page: https://github.com/answerrtx/CoC-Seduce

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoC-Seduce，一个基于TRPG机制的多智能体对抗基准，用于评估LLM在半开放文本游戏环境中作为裁判时对抗修辞注入攻击的鲁棒性。实验表明，模型规模与显式推理机制均无法保证裁判鲁棒性，伪逻辑攻击是最有效手段，跨文化场景揭示了系统性的知识盲区。
AI.motivation: LLM被越来越多地部署为半开放文本游戏环境中的自主裁判，但当用户意图与系统规则冲突时，模型被训练为乐于助人和顺从的特性使其易受一种称为"修辞注入"的攻击，攻击者利用伪逻辑推理和权威胁迫等叙事框架技术来绕过裁判逻辑，现有研究对此类攻击模式缺乏系统性评估基准。
AI.method: 本文基于桌面角色扮演游戏（TRPG）机制构建了CoC-Seduce多智能体对抗基准，其中规则明确用于裁判但交互完全为自然语言。使用三个前沿模型（GPT-5.4、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 3.5 Flash）作为对抗生成器，在4个世界设定和16个技能类别下生成5,376个样本，并针对20个目标裁判模型进行基准测试。
AI.result: 对20个模型的评估显示，模型规模和显式推理机制都不能可靠地赋予裁判鲁棒性；伪逻辑（Pseudo-Logic）是最主要的攻击向量；跨文化设定暴露了所有被评估模型家族的系统性知识盲区。
AI.conclusion: 研究结论表明，现有LLM作为裁判时存在根本性的鲁棒性缺陷，修辞注入是一类严重但尚未被充分研究的威胁。未来需要在裁判模型训练中引入对抗鲁棒性机制，并关注跨文化知识覆盖的均衡性。

title: SwarmResearch: Orchestrating Coding Agents for Open-Ended Discovery
summary: Long-running coding agents such as autoresearch can persistently discover optimizations for open-ended problems. However, they tend to converge onto a single high-level approach, then proceed with low-level edits while missing other superior approaches to the problem. We hypothesize two harness-level design choices contribute to this behavior: accumulating context in a single long-running agent and only exposing a single program state to edit. We introduce SwarmResearch, an orchestrator-subagent harness in which a Shepherd Agent uses global context to steer a population of Search Agents, each operating with local context in their respective git branch. On open-ended optimization tasks, SwarmResearch discovers better or comparable solutions to state-of-the-art LLM-guided evolution and multi-agent techniques on 13/15 tasks, driven by higher-level exploration. Compared with fixed scaling of serial and parallel agents, SwarmResearch's orchestrator-guided scaling discovers better-performing solutions by adapting parallelism at different search depths.

AI.tldr: SwarmResearch是一种编排者-子智能体框架，通过Shepherd Agent利用全局上下文引导一组Search Agent在各自git分支中并行探索，解决了长运行编码智能体在开放式优化任务中趋向单一策略而错失更优方案的问题，在13/15个任务上达到或超越现有最优方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的长运行编码智能体（如autoresearch）能够持续发现开放式问题的优化方案，但倾向于收敛到单一的高阶策略，随后仅进行低层级编辑，从而错失其他更优的解决途径。这种行为的根源在于两种架构级设计选择：单个长运行智能体中不断累积的上下文，以及仅暴露单一程序状态进行编辑。
AI.method: SwarmResearch提出了一种编排者-子智能体（orchestrator-subagent）架构，包含一个Shepherd Agent和一组Search Agent。Shepherd Agent利用全局上下文来引导Search Agent群体的探索方向，每个Search Agent在其各自的git分支中基于局部上下文独立运行，从而实现并行化搜索和高阶探索。
AI.result: 在开放式优化任务上，SwarmResearch在13/15个任务中发现了优于或可比于现有最先进LLM引导演化方法和多智能体技术的解决方案，其优势源于更高层次的探索策略。与固定规模的串行和并行智能体扩展方式相比，SwarmResearch通过编排者引导的自适应扩展，在不同搜索深度动态调整并行度，发现了性能更优的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: SwarmResearch验证了通过全局与局部上下文的分离以及编排者引导的并行搜索，可以有效避免长运行编码智能体陷入局部最优，提升开放式优化任务的探索质量和最终性能。该方法为设计更高效、更具探索性的多智能体编码系统提供了新的架构范式。

title: Token-level Response-visual Attention Guidance for Multimodal LLMs Knowledge Distillation
summary: While knowledge distillation (KD) is widely adopted for training lightweight models by leveraging supervision from larger teacher models, relying solely on output token distributions has proven insufficient for compressing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Since output tokens are a byproduct of the model attending to visual inputs, prior works have explored explicitly distilling attention to provide a direct supervisory signal. While promising, the precise utility of which attention signals to distill remains under-explored. In this work, we challenge the conventional reliance on prompt-to-vision attention by revealing that downstream performance correlates strongly with response-to-vision attention similarity to the teacher, but negligibly with that of prompt-conditioned attention. Furthermore, we observe that attention distributions exhibit significant variance across individual tokens, indicating that a uniform distillation objective is suboptimal. To this end, we introduce Token-level Response-visual Attention Guidance (TRAG), a distillation objective that 1) shifts the focus to response-to-vision signals and 2) employs token-specific objectives by adaptively weighting the Kullback-Leibler divergence based on attention entropy, effectively guiding the student to mirror the teacher's precise visual focus. Extensive experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that TRAG significantly outperforms prior distillation baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRAG（Token-level Response-visual Attention Guidance），一种针对多模态大模型知识蒸馏的新型注意力蒸馏目标函数，通过聚焦响应-视觉注意力信号并引入基于注意力熵的逐token自适应权重，显著优于现有蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在压缩多模态大语言模型时，仅依赖输出token分布或传统的提示-视觉注意力信号效果有限，且注意力在不同token间分布差异大，统一的蒸馏目标不够精准；本文旨在探究何种注意力信号对下游性能最为关键，并设计更精细的蒸馏目标。
AI.method: 本文首先通过实验揭示响应-视觉注意力（response-to-vision attention）与下游性能高度相关，而提示-视觉注意力相关性极弱；基于此发现，提出TRAG蒸馏目标：1）将蒸馏信号从提示-视觉注意力转向响应-视觉注意力；2）引入逐token自适应权重，根据每个token注意力分布的熵值调整KL散度的权重，使蒸馏目标差异化地指导学生模型精确模仿教师模型的视觉聚焦。
AI.result: 在多个多模态基准上的大量实验结果表明，TRAG显著优于此前基于注意力的知识蒸馏基线方法，验证了聚焦响应-视觉注意力与自适应逐token加权策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了在多模态大模型知识蒸馏中，响应-视觉注意力比传统提示-视觉注意力更具指导价值，且注意力熵可作为自适应蒸馏权重的有效指标；TRAG为MLLM压缩提供了一种更精准的注意力蒸馏范式。

title: Revealing Hidden Model Behaviors with Task-Specific Self-Reports
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables; appendix with 31 additional pages
summary: Fine-tuning can give a language model a hidden behavior--it may give false answers under a narrow condition, or give harmful advice only when a prompt touches a particular topic. We introduce the Stabilized Adapter for self-Report (SAR), a lightweight LoRA adapter that makes a fine-tuned model describe its own hidden behavior in plain language, using only the model and the dataset it was trained on. Across seven implanted behaviors (plus a no-behavior control), SAR detects the hidden behavior in every one--even when the model has generalized into broad misalignment that the training data alone does not predict. Introspection Adapters (IA), the closest existing baseline, detects some behaviors from our suite but misses others entirely--and where it misses, it hallucinates, consistently reporting wrong behaviors. SAR retains positive signal on every setting where IA fails and halves the rate of hallucinations. This makes it much easier for practitioners to audit their models and obtain reliable answers to "what did my model actually learn?" type of questions.

AI.tldr: 提出 Stabilized Adapter for self-Report (SAR)，一种轻量级 LoRA 适配器，能够在仅使用模型和训练数据的情况下，让微调后的语言模型以自然语言描述其隐藏行为，在多种植入行为检测中实现完全检测并大幅降低幻觉率。
AI.motivation: 微调可能为语言模型引入隐藏行为（如在特定条件下给出错误答案或有害建议），而现有基线方法 Introspection Adapters (IA) 存在检测盲区且会产生严重幻觉（错误报告不存在的隐藏行为），需要一种更可靠的方法让模型准确报告自身学到的隐藏行为。
AI.method: 提出 Stabilized Adapter for self-Report (SAR)，一种轻量级 LoRA 适配器，仅利用原始模型和微调所用数据集，无需外部标注或探测数据集，即可让微调后的模型以自然语言描述其隐藏行为。
AI.result: 在七种植入行为（外加无行为对照组）的测试中，SAR 在所有设置下均成功检测出隐藏行为，包括模型泛化出训练数据无法预测的广泛失准时；相比之下，IA 在某些设置下完全漏检并在漏检处持续产生幻觉；SAR 在所有 IA 失败的设置上保持正信号，并将幻觉率降低一半。
AI.conclusion: SAR 为模型审计提供了一种可靠且易用的工具，能够有效回答"模型到底学到了什么"这类核心问题，显著降低了隐藏行为检测中的误报风险。

title: MedCalc-Pro: Solving Complex Medical Calculations with LLM Agents
summary: Current benchmarks for evaluating large language models (LLMs) in medical calculation are largely based on simplified settings, where each patient case corresponds to a single calculator and the required tool is explicitly specified in the query. However, real clinical scenarios often require multiple calculators for joint evaluation, nested-scale calculation, and fuzzy queries that do not directly specify the target calculator. To this end, we propose a new medical calculation benchmark, MedCalc-Pro, which covers three progressively challenging task settings: single-calculator, multi-calculator, and nested-calculator calculation settings. MedCalc-Pro contains 2,268 real-world clinical cases, covering 77 medical calculators across 14 clinical departments. Meanwhile, to address the limited performance of existing frameworks and methods in complex clinical scenarios, we further propose a more generalizable agent framework that supports multi-tool selection and nested-tool calling, while suppressing parameter error propagation through structured validation and evidence review. We conduct systematic comparisons across open-source, closed-source, and medical-specialized LLMs, and the results show that our framework achieves the best performance across all three task settings. This work provides a new benchmark and method for evaluating and applying LLMs in challenging medical calculation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出MedCalc-Pro基准，包含单计算器、多计算器和嵌套计算器三种逐步挑战的临床计算任务，并设计了一个支持多工具选择与嵌套调用的通用智能体框架，在多个LLM上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学计算LLM评测基准多基于简化场景，每个病例对应单一计算器且工具在查询中显式指定，无法反映真实临床中需要多计算器联合评估、嵌套尺度计算及模糊查询的复杂需求，存在明显的评估与能力缺口。
AI.method: 构建MedCalc-Pro基准，包含2,268个真实临床病例，覆盖14个临床科室的77种医学计算器，设计单计算器、多计算器和嵌套计算器三类渐进式任务；提出通用智能体框架，支持多工具选择与嵌套工具调用，并通过结构化验证和证据审查抑制参数误差传播。
AI.result: 在开源、闭源及医学专用LLM上进行了系统对比，所提框架在所有三个任务设置上均取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: MedCalc-Pro为评估LLM在具有挑战性的医学计算场景中的能力提供了新基准，所提通用智能体框架有效解决了多工具选择与嵌套调用的关键难题，为LLM在真实临床计算中的应用奠定了方法与评估基础。

title: BiSLW: Bi-Spectral Latent Watermarking for Generative Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion-based generative models have transformed visual content synthesis, yet they remain vulnerable to unauthorized usage and lack reliable attribution methods. Existing watermarking techniques often treat latent tensors as static spatial feature maps or depend on pixel-domain modification, and most do not explicitly leverage the internal frequency structure of the latent space for dual-band redundant embedding, leaving them susceptible to the stochastic nature of diffusion and regeneration attacks. We introduce BiSLW, a trainable bi-spectral latent watermarking framework that jointly embeds aligned identity signals across complementary spectral bands of the decoded diffusion latent using learned encoders and decoders, going beyond fixed-pattern frequency approaches. We leverage the inherent frequency structure of diffusion latents to design a dual-band watermarking framework. Low-frequency components encode global semantics, while high-frequency components capture fine texture. We exploit this structure to embed watermarks across complementary spectral bands. The watermark is independently injected into both bands via learned encoders and recombined before decoding, ensuring it becomes intrinsic to the generative trajectory. Dual spectral decoders recover the watermark from each band, while a cross-band consistency constraint enforces alignment between semantic and textural embeddings. Experiments show that BiSLW achieves a strong balance between perceptual fidelity and robustness, improving PSNR by over 3 dB compared to prior latent diffusion watermarking methods while preserving near-perfect bit accuracy under aggressive regeneration and common distortions, all with negligible computational overhead.

AI.tldr: BiSLW提出了一种可训练的雙光譜潛在空間水印框架，通過在擴散潛變量的低頻和高頻成分中聯合嵌入對齊的身份信號，實現了高感知保真度與強魯棒性，在PSNR上相比現有潛在擴散水印方法提升超過3 dB，並在再生攻擊下保持近乎完美的位元準確率。
AI.motivation: 現有擴散生成模型缺乏可靠的歸屬方法，而傳統水印技術或將潛在張量視為靜態空間特徵圖，或依賴像素域修改，未能明確利用潛在空間的內部頻率結構進行雙頻冗餘嵌入，難以應對擴散過程的隨機性和再生攻擊。
AI.method: BiSLW利用擴散潛變量的固有頻率結構設計雙頻水印框架：低頻成分編碼全局語義，高頻成分捕獲細節紋理。水印通過學習編碼器分別注入兩個互補頻帶後重新組合再解碼，雙頻譜解碼器從各頻帶恢復水印，並引入跨頻一致性約束以強制語義與紋理嵌入之間的對齊。
AI.result: 實驗結果表明，BiSLW在感知保真度與魯棒性之間取得了良好平衡，相比現有潛在擴散水印方法PSNR提升超過3 dB，在強再生攻擊和常見失真下保持近乎完美的位元準確率，且計算開銷可忽略不計。
AI.conclusion: BiSLW通過顯式利用潛在空間的頻率結構進行雙頻冗餘嵌入，使水印成為生成軌跡的內在部分，有效提升了水印的隱蔽性和抗攻擊能力，為擴散模型的歸屬與版權保護提供了可靠方案。

title: GRASP: Graph-Reasoning Aided Survey Planning for High-Fidelity Related Work Generation
comment: 23 pages, 3 figures. Published in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: Writing a literature review requires a deep understanding of the relationships among cited papers: how they build on, challenge, or offer alternative perspectives to one another. We present Graph-Reasoning Aided Survey Planning (GRASP), a framework combining LLM planning for related work generation with graph algorithms to extract key relationships among cited papers. Our two-layer graph structure consists of a Graph of Thoughts and an Argument-Counterargument Planning Network, representing the cited papers at different levels of granularity, and we apply topology-aware pruning via a Steiner tree to identify the core inter-paper relationships captured in our graph. Our citation analysis-based evaluation shows that GRASP generates related work sections (RWS) that closely match human-written targets in terms of the discourse roles, intents, and grouping of citations.

AI.tldr: GRASP是一个结合LLM规划与图算法的相关工作总结框架，通过双层的思想图谱和论证-反论证规划网络结构，并利用斯坦纳树进行拓扑感知剪枝，生成与人工撰写的相关工作总结在话语角色、意图和引用分组上高度匹配的文本。
AI.motivation: 撰写文献综述需要深入理解被引论文之间的复杂关系（如继承、挑战或提供替代视角），现有方法难以有效捕捉和建模这些多层次的互引关系，从而生成结构合理、关系清晰的相关工作总结。
AI.method: GRASP框架提出双层图结构：上层为思想图谱（Graph of Thoughts），下层为论证-反论证规划网络（Argument-Counterargument Planning Network），分别从不同粒度表征被引论文；采用基于斯坦纳树（Steiner tree）的拓扑感知剪枝方法，从图中提取核心的论文间关系。
AI.result: 基于引文分析的评估表明，GRASP生成的相关工作总结（RWS）在话语角色（discourse roles）、意图（intents）和引用分组（grouping of citations）方面与人工撰写的目标文本高度匹配。
AI.conclusion: GRASP通过将图算法与LLM规划能力相结合，有效提升了相关工作总结的结构化生成质量，为自动文献综述撰写提供了一种新的技术路径，尤其在捕捉论文间语义关系和逻辑结构方面展现出优势。

title: Evaluating Generative Agents with Actions Grounded in Socially Distributed Task Environments using Incognita
summary: Effective agency in social environments depends on when an agent seeks knowledge, when it acts, and whether its actions are justified by acquired information. Existing grounded benchmarks provide executable actions, persistent state, and verifiable outcomes, while social simulation environments provide rich interaction among language agents. We study an evaluation setting that combines these requirements. We define socially distributed task environments as interactive environments where task-relevant knowledge is partitioned across role-isolated participants and consequential actions are accessible only through them. Communication serves as exploration over role-partitioned knowledge, while grounded action serves as exploitation over environment state. We introduce Incognita, a Concordia-based framework that separates social interaction from grounded execution. The evaluated agent routes messages to a user or specialist entities; specialists mediate admissible operations; a deterministic sub-environment executes accepted operations over a canonical state; and an offline evaluator scores outcomes with inherited rewards. Incognita-Retail transforms tau-bench retail into a multi-entity environment while preserving final-state reward semantics. We evaluate three generative agent models on 18 tasks stratified by social breadth, with 540 trials. Progress appears in reward and behavior: success rises from 0 percent to 8.9 percent and 17.2 percent, while premature finalization falls from 100 percent to 87 percent and 58 percent. Stronger models elicit more hidden knowledge, contact more entities, and attempt more grounded writes, yet reliability remains low. These findings show that socially distributed task environments expose behavior before reliable success, including knowledge elicitation, source selection, grounded action attempts, and premature completion belief.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Incognita框架，将社交互动与 grounded 执行分离，用于评估智能体在社交分布式任务环境中的表现，实验表明当前生成式智能体虽能从0%提升至17.2%成功率，但整体可靠性仍然较低。
AI.motivation: 现有具身基准提供可执行动作、持久状态和可验证结果，社交模拟环境则提供丰富的语言交互，但缺乏一个结合社会交互与 grounded 执行、且任务相关知识分散在角色隔离参与者中的评估设置。
AI.method: 提出Incognita框架，基于Concordia构建，将社交交互与 grounded 执行分离：智能体将消息路由给用户或专家实体，专家中介许可操作，确定性子环境在规范状态上执行被接受的操作，离线评估器使用继承奖励打分。Incognita-Retail将tau-bench零售场景转化为多实体环境，保留最终状态奖励语义。
AI.result: 在18个按社交广度分层任务中评估三种生成式智能体模型，共540次试验。成功率从0%提升至8.9%和17.2%，过早结束率从100%降至87%和58%。更强模型能挖掘更多隐藏知识、接触更多实体、尝试更多grounded写入操作，但整体可靠性仍然较低。
AI.conclusion: 社交分布式任务环境在可靠成功之前即可暴露智能体的行为模式，包括知识引取、来源选择、grounded动作尝试和过早完成信念，表明该设定可作为智能体社交能力的前沿评估基准。

title: K9-Bench: Evaluating Multimodal LLMs on Canine-Centric Videos
summary: MLLMs have shown strong zero-shot capabilities across diverse inputs such as across images, video, audio, and text. A crucial, yet underexplored, application of these models lies in understanding and modeling animal-centric scenarios. As animals are integral to millions of households, benchmarking next-generation AI models on pet-focused tasks, ranging from recognizing distress signals to enabling responsive robotic companions, is essential for building AI systems that can work alongside us. We introduce K9-Bench, a novel benchmark focused on real-world domestic dog videos, specifically targeting canine action and interaction understanding via approximately 5000 question-answer pairs across 907 videos spanning 5 distinct task categories that test long-form, canine-centric multimodal reasoning in MLLMs. To create this dataset, we propose a scalable, VLM/LLM-powered data generation pipeline that automatically mines canine-centric videos from the web and curates QA pairs requiring fine-grained, multi-hop reasoning over canine actions and temporally extended interaction sequences. We implement bias mitigation strategies designed to eliminate biases introduced by VLMs during dataset curation. Through extensive experimentation, we find that frontier MLLMs exhibit limited zero-shot performance on canine-centric tasks: although state-of-the-art closed-source models outperform open-source counterparts, they still struggle with compositional reasoning over subtle posture and interaction cues spread over long horizons. We observe that generic chain-of-thought prompting provides only modest performance for such long-horizon reasoning. Beyond a novel dataset for canine activity analysis, K9-Bench provides a general-purpose dataset construction pipeline that can be adapted to other low-data domains for quantitative analysis. Our project website is available at: https://ogmenrobotics.github.io/K9Bench.

AI.tldr: K9-Bench是一个专注于家犬视频中犬类动作与交互理解的多模态基准测试，包含约5000个QA对和907个视频，覆盖5个任务类别；实验表明现有MLLMs在该任务上零样本性能有限，尤其在长程组合推理方面表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在图像、视频、音频和文本等多种输入上展现出强大的零样本能力，但在以动物为中心的场景理解（特别是宠物相关的任务，如识别 distress 信号和实现响应式机器人伴侣）方面缺乏系统性的基准评测；现有数据集和评估体系难以检验模型对细粒度、长时程犬类动作与交互的推理能力。
AI.method: 提出K9-Bench基准数据集，包含907个真实世界家犬视频和约5000个问答对，覆盖5个不同的任务类别；设计了一个可扩展的、基于VLM/LLM的数据生成流水线，自动从网络挖掘犬类视频并构建需要细粒度多跳推理的QA对；在数据构建过程中实施了针对VLM引入偏见的缓解策略。
AI.result: 实验发现最先进的MLLMs在犬类中心任务上零样本性能有限：闭源模型整体优于开源模型，但所有模型在处理涉及细微姿态和交互线索的长时程组合推理时仍表现困难；通用的思维链提示对长程推理的提升仅中等水平。
AI.conclusion: K9-Bench不仅提供了犬类活动分析的新数据集，还贡献了一套可泛化到其他低数据领域的数据集构建流程，为未来多模态AI系统在宠物相关及更广泛的以动物为中心的场景中的评估与发展提供了基础。

title: SelfMem: Self-Optimizing Memory for AI Agents
summary: While current AI agents support increasingly long context windows, tool use, and skill execution for long-horizon tasks, they still require memory systems to effectively leverage historical experience. Existing memory frameworks typically rely on fixed storage, retrieval, and summarization mechanisms, which can be rigid across different tasks and often require manual tuning. To address this limitation, we propose SelfMem, a self-optimizing memory framework. Inspired by prior work on self-improving AI, we follow the principle of "teaching an agent to fish rather than giving it a fish." Instead of forcing the model to follow a predefined memory strategy or format, SelfMem provides an environment with memory tools and feedback signals that allow the agent to explore, evaluate, and refine its own memory strategy. Our results show that SelfMem consistently outperforms retrieval, compression, and agent-memory baselines on BEAM across conversation scales from 100K to 1M tokens. Compared with the strongest baseline, SelfMem improves the official score by 48.7%, 40.8%, and 41.9% at 100K, 500K, and 1M, respectively. Further question-type analysis shows broad robustness across diverse memory demands, and our optimization study shows that model-guided strategy refinement further improves performance.

AI.tldr: SelfMem 提出了一种自优化记忆框架，通过让智能体在记忆工具环境中自主探索、评估和优化记忆策略，而非遵循固定机制，在 BEAM 基准上实现了对检索、压缩和智能体记忆基线的显著超越，在 100K 至 1M token 对话规模下性能提升达 40% 以上。
AI.motivation: 现有 AI 智能体的记忆系统通常依赖固定的存储、检索和摘要机制，这种刚性设计在不同任务间缺乏适应性，且往往需要人工调参，难以灵活应对多样化的长期任务需求。
AI.method: SelfMem 遵循"授人以渔"的原则，不为模型预设固定的记忆策略或格式，而是为智能体提供包含记忆工具和反馈信号的运行环境，使其能够自主探索、评估并持续优化自身的记忆策略，从而实现记忆框架的自优化。
AI.result: 在 BEAM 基准上，SelfMem 在 100K、500K 和 1M token 三种对话规模下均一致优于检索、压缩及智能体记忆基线；相比最强基线，官方分数分别提升 48.7%、40.8% 和 41.9%。问题类型分析表明其在不同记忆需求下具有广泛鲁棒性，优化研究显示模型引导的策略精炼可进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: SelfMem 验证了让智能体自主学习记忆策略而非使用固定机制的可行性与有效性，为构建更具适应性的长期记忆系统提供了新范式，其自优化机制有望减少人工干预并提升跨任务泛化能力。

title: Embodied Operators and Benchmarking: Toward Reusable and Deployable Embodied Intelligence Systems
summary: Embodied intelligence systems require not only end-to-end policy models, but also reusable functional modules that transform multimodal observations, robot states, human demonstrations, and task contexts into structured representations, decisions, trajectories, control references, and system services. This work defines these modules as embodied operators and studies them as independent yet composable units in embodied intelligence pipelines. We clarify their definition boundary, emphasizing task semantics, standardized input-output contracts, deployability, reusability, and multi-layer optimizability. We further construct a taxonomy covering five categories: detection and segmentation, spatial localization and 3D understanding, hand motion recovery, embodied foundation models and task-decision operators, and planning, control, and system support operators. For each category, we summarize representative functions, technical paradigms, application roles, and practical limitations. Beyond taxonomy, we propose a multi-dimensional benchmark framework that evaluates embodied operators in terms of correctness, end-to-end efficiency, resource usage, temporal stability, portability, interface compatibility, deployment reliability, and downstream task utility. We also discuss workflow-level operator acceleration and open challenges in operator composition, data standardization, world models, VLA safety, edge deployment, and real-world application value. Overall, this work argues that embodied operators should be optimized and evaluated as holistic deployable components, providing a foundation for reusable, scalable, and verifiable embodied intelligence systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"具身算子"（embodied operators）作为具身智能系统中可重用、可组合的功能模块，构建了涵盖五类算子的系统化分类体系，并提出了面向正确性、效率、稳定性、可移植性等多维度的基准评估框架，旨在为可重用、可扩展、可验证的具身智能系统提供基础性支撑。
AI.motivation: 当前具身智能系统除了需要端到端的策略模型外，还迫切需要可复用的功能模块来处理多模态观测、机器人状态、人类示范和任务上下文，但缺乏对这些模块的统一定义、分类体系和标准化评估方法，阻碍了系统的可重用性、可组合性和可验证性。
AI.method: 本文明确定义了"具身算子"的概念边界，强调任务语义、标准化输入输出契约、可部署性、可重用性和多层可优化性；构建了涵盖五类算子的分类体系：检测与分割、空间定位与3D理解、手部运动恢复、具身基础模型与任务决策算子、规划控制与系统支持算子；并提出了多维基准评估框架，涵盖正确性、端到端效率、资源使用、时间稳定性、可移植性、接口兼容性、部署可靠性及下游任务效用。
AI.result: 本文提出了一个系统化的具身算子分类体系和多维基准评估框架，总结了每类算子的代表性功能、技术范式、应用角色和实际局限性；还讨论了工作流级别的算子加速以及在算子组合、数据标准化、世界模型、VLA安全、边缘部署和实际应用价值等方面的开放挑战。
AI.conclusion: 具身算子应作为整体可部署的组件进行优化和评估，其为构建可重用、可扩展和可验证的具身智能系统提供了基础性支撑。

title: When Does Resolution Help a Frozen Backbone? Global Attention at Resolution Predicts Scalable Adaptation for Camouflaged and Marine Animal Segmentation
summary: Adapting frozen vision foundation models to fine-grained segmentation now largely depends on backbone selection. Whether the backbone applies global attention to a high-resolution token set predicts whether a low-rank adapter turns resolution into accuracy. Isotropic ViTs attend globally over the full grid and keep improving with resolution; hierarchical backbones confine early attention to local windows and pool the grid before their global stages, plateauing at lower resolutions. A controlled six-backbone study establishes the pattern, and editing the backbone points to the cause: pooling keeps the benefit, removing global attention does not. The effect is specific to low-rank adaptation. Under one fixed pipeline, SALT (Side-stem, Attention-gated U-Net, Low-rank Tuning), one RGB-only pass on a strong isotropic backbone wins the best S-measure on the four data-matched camouflaged sets, and leads every marine and salient set. It reaches a new state of the art on both marine-animal benchmarks (MAS3K mIoU 0.878).

AI.tldr: 本文揭示：在微调冻结视觉基础模型执行细粒度分割时，骨干网络的注意力类型（全局注意力 vs. 局部窗口注意力）决定了低秩适配能否随分辨率提升而增益精度；基于此发现，所提出的SALT框架（Side-stem, Attention-gated U-Net, Low-rank Tuning）在多个伪装/显著目标分割基准上达到了新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 当前将冻结的视觉基础模型适配到细粒度分割任务时，对不同骨干网络的选择缺乏系统性的理解，尤其是关于低秩适配（低秩微调）下分辨率与精度的关系尚不明确，导致难以针对分割任务合理选择或设计骨干网络架构。
AI.method: 通过六种骨干网络的受控对比实验，系统研究骨干网络类型（isotropic ViT的全局注意力 vs. 层次化骨干网络的局部窗口注意力+下采样）在低秩适配下对分辨率-精度关系的影响；通过编辑骨干网络（移除全局注意力或保留池化操作）进行消融归因分析；提出统一的SALT（Side-stem, Attention-gated U-Net, Low-rank Tuning）管线，采用强isotropic骨干及单次RGB前向传播。
AI.result: 实验表明：具有全局注意力的isotropic ViT骨干在全分辨率网格上持续受益于分辨率提升，而层次化骨干因早期局部窗口注意力和下采样导致精度在较低分辨率即达到饱和；消融实验证实池化操作不影响增益而全局注意力是关键因素；SALT在四个数据匹配的伪装目标分割集上取得最佳S-measure，并在所有海洋与显著性目标分割集上领先，在MAS3K上达到mIoU 0.878的新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 骨干网络的全局注意力能力是低秩适配下分辨率转化为精度的关键因素，该效应仅适用于低秩适配设置而不适用于全微调；为细粒度分割中冻结基础模型的骨干选择提供了明确的指导原则，且SALT框架证明了该发现的实用价值。

title: ProACT: Towards Breakdown-Aware Proactive Agent in Multi-User Collaboration
summary: Conversational agents are increasingly embedded in human collaborative work, yet they remain fundamentally passive and reactive: they respond to explicit user requests rather than proactively recognizing moments when a team would benefit from timely intervention as human collaborators often do. This reactive design substantially limits the use of agents as active participants in multi-user collaboration, where disagreements, ambiguous goals, forgotten constraints, underspecified plans, discussion loops, and imbalanced participation can gradually undermine group progress. To move agents from passive assistants toward active participants in multi-user collaboration, we introduce ProACT, a breakdown-aware agent framework grounded in theories of common ground, collaborative planning, and coordination work. ProACT observes the speaker-attributed conversation history, determines whether the current turn contains a collaboration breakdown requiring intervention, decides whether the agent should stay silent or speak, and, when speaking is needed, routes the case to a targeted collaboration skill. We further introduce the first multi-user collaboration benchmark for evaluating proactive agents across project planning, product design, research collaboration, logistics, education, and resource-constrained decision making. Across 3,244 turn-level examples and five LLM backbones, ProACT consistently improves collaborative appropriateness, non-interruptiveness, conciseness, and judged intervention quality over direct chat.

AI.tldr: ProACT 提出了一种基于协作崩溃检测的主动对话代理框架，使代理能从被动响应转变为主动参与多用户协作，在包含 3,244 个回合的多用户协作基准测试中，相比直接对话显著提升了协作适当性、非中断性、简洁性和干预质量。
AI.motivation: 现有对话代理在多人协作场景中本质上是被动和反应式的，仅在用户明确请求时才响应，无法像人类协作者那样主动识别并介入团队面临的分歧、目标模糊、约束遗忘、计划不完整、讨论循环和参与不均等协作崩溃问题，这严重限制了代理作为多用户协作中主动参与者的作用。
AI.method: ProACT 是一个基于通用基础、协作规划和协调工作理论的崩溃感知代理框架，通过观察带有说话人属性的对话历史，判断当前轮次是否包含需要干预的协作崩溃，决策代理应保持沉默还是发言，并在需要发言时将情况路由到特定的协作技能模块进行处理。
AI.result: 在首个多用户协作主动代理基准测试上，覆盖项目规划、产品设计、科研协作、物流、教育和资源受限决策六个场景，包含 3,244 个回合级样本，使用五个不同的大语言模型作为主干，ProACT 在协作适当性、非中断性、简洁性和干预质量等指标上一致优于直接对话基线。
AI.conclusion: ProACT 验证了通过结构化检测和路由协作崩溃，可以使代理从被动响应器转变为多用户协作中有效的主动参与者，为构建更具协作能力的智能代理提供了框架性指导，并推动了该方向的标准基准评估。

title: From Mobile Data to Business Insights: An End-to-End Analytics Framework for Large-Scale Urban Mobility Analysis and Decision Support
summary: Real time location data derived from mobile applications is a powerful tool for addressing various urban challenges, including tourism planning, parking management, bus route optimization, and resource allocation. Besides, it offers invaluable insights for shaping strategic decisions in commercial domains such as location based services, market share analysis, and behavioral profiling. In this expansive study, we aim to address all of the aforementioned challenges by investigating the behaviors and patterns of smartphone users within urban environments, particularly in the domains of tourism, transportation, and retail. Our approach encompasses the development of a sophisticated data platform from inception to implementation, which includes the formulation of use cases, architectural design, and implementation of modules. We employ state of the art techniques and technologies, including data anonymization, ETL pipelines, and utilizing Google BigQuery and Vertex AI for data processing and machine learning model development. A modular architecture based on reusable analytical building blocks was developed to generate data products that support multiple stakeholder driven use cases. Additionally, we apply interactive data visualization techniques via Power BI to facilitate the effective interpretation of analytical findings by stakeholders. The developed models address a wide range of mobility analytics tasks, including mobility profiling, frequent trajectory mining, area of influence analysis, traffic anomaly detection, and origin destination pattern analysis. The results demonstrate the framework's ability to capture user mobility dynamics at fine spatial and temporal resolutions, providing actionable insights for urban planning and strategic business decision making.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个基于智能手机实时位置数据的模块化数据分析平台，整合数据匿名化、ETL管道、Google BigQuery和Vertex AI等技术，支持旅游、交通和零售场景下的移动性分析任务，为城市规划和商业决策提供细粒度时空洞察。
AI.motivation: 移动应用产生的实时位置数据在旅游规划、停车管理、公交线路优化和资源分配等城市挑战中具有巨大潜力，同时也可为基于位置的服务、市场份额分析和行为画像等商业决策提供支撑，但缺乏一个能够系统整合多种技术、覆盖多领域用例的模块化数据分析平台来充分挖掘这些数据的价值。
AI.method: 研究从用例制定、架构设计到模块实现构建了完整的数据平台，采用数据匿名化、ETL管道等前沿技术，利用Google BigQuery和Vertex AI进行数据加工与机器学习模型开发，设计了基于可复用分析构建模块的模块化架构以生成数据产品，并通过Power BI实现交互式数据可视化。
AI.result: 开发的模型覆盖移动性画像、频繁轨迹挖掘、影响区域分析、交通异常检测和起讫点模式分析等多种移动性分析任务，实验结果表明该框架能够在精细的时空分辨率下捕获用户移动动态，为城市规划和战略商业决策提供可操作的洞察。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了模块化数据分析平台在处理多领域城市移动性挑战方面的有效性，展示了实时位置数据在城市规划与商业决策中的实际应用价值，为后续基于位置数据的智能城市研究和商业分析提供了可复用的技术架构和方法论参考。

title: RayTun3R: Online Camera Adaptation in 3D Foundation Models
summary: Recent 3D foundation models, such as DUSt3R, MASt3R, VGGT, $π^3$, and Depth Anything 3, provide strong feed-forward depth and pose estimates on pinhole imagery, but degrade sharply under fisheye camera geometry. We show that this failure is partly caused by a pinhole camera bias in the positional encodings of pretrained 3D foundation models, and propose RayTun3R, a lightweight camera adaptation approach. It keeps the pretrained network fixed and adapts only lightweight components tied to token position and camera geometry. RayTun3R learns parameter-efficient residual corrections to absolute and rotary positional encodings, together with parameter-free tokenization and corrections to prediction-grid coordinates that remove residual pinhole assumptions. The resulting adapter contains only 10,752 trainable parameters and can be learned from a short temporal segment using geometric losses. Once adapted, RayTun3R transfers effectively to the remaining frames of the sequence without incurring additional runtime costs. Across diverse fisheye datasets with fields of view from $110^\circ$ to $200^\circ$, our adapter reduces rotation error by $2$-$12\times$ relative to the unadapted model, outperforms LoRA while using $\sim\!14\times$ fewer trainable parameters, improves pose over adaptation-free baselines while avoiding their multi-view inference cost, and remains competitive on depth accuracy.

AI.tldr: RayTun3R是一种轻量级相机适配方法，通过仅调整位置编码和预测网格坐标（仅10572个可训练参数），使预训练的3D基础模型（如DUSt3R等）适应鱼眼相机几何，在保持深度精度的同时将旋转误差降低2-12倍，且不增加推理开销。
AI.motivation: 现有3D基础模型（如DUSt3R、MASt3R、VGGT等）在针孔图像上表现优异，但在鱼眼相机几何下性能急剧下降，原因是预训练模型中位置编码存在针孔相机偏差，而现有方法缺乏针对鱼眼相机的高效适配方案。
AI.method: RayTun3R提出一种轻量级相机适配方法：保持预训练网络权重固定，仅对与token位置和相机几何相关的组件进行适配，具体包括对绝对位置编码和旋转位置编码学习参数高效的残差修正，以及引入无参数的token化和预测网格坐标修正来消除残留的针孔假设。
AI.result: 在视场角从110°到200°的多种鱼眼数据集上，RayTun3R将旋转误差相比未适配模型降低2-12倍，以仅10572个可训练参数超越LoRA（参数量减少约14倍），在避免多视角推理开销的同时优于无适配基线方法，并在深度精度上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: RayTun3R表明通过对位置编码和几何表示进行极少量参数的低成本修正，即可有效消除预训练3D基础模型中的针孔相机偏差并泛化至鱼眼相机，为预训练基础模型在非标相机几何下的部署提供了高效且实用的适配范式。

title: Rethinking Scientific Discovery in an Agentic Era
summary: Artificial intelligence has advanced scientific discovery, but most AI4Science systems remain fragmented tools that rely on humans to coordinate problem formulation, literature grounding, model use, simulation, validation, and knowledge reuse. This paper presents \textbf{SCION (Scientific Collaborative Innovation with Agentic Organizational Nexus)}, an agentic scientific operating system that acts as an \textbf{organizational nexus}. Through a Science Agent serving as a \textbf{Meta-Harness}, SCION connects scientific tasks, tools, agents, artifacts, and memory, transforming research into an executable, auditable, and reusable operational process. At its core is the \textbf{Research Execution Plan (REP)}, which compiles high-level scientific intent into staged objectives, dependencies, verification checkpoints, tool requirements, expected artifacts, and fallback conditions. SCION further integrates hierarchical multi-agent execution, profile-driven specialization, selective context construction, governed delegation, and layered epistemic memory to support long-horizon scientific work. We formulate discovery under SCION as \textbf{Target-conditioned Inverse Search} and extend it to hidden-target settings through batch active search under finite experimental budgets. Applications in materials analysis, molecule design, and protein or antibody screening, together with experiments on scientific reading, idea generation, molecule generation, and antibody screening, show that SCION outperforms existing autonomous research-agent baselines, especially in decomposition, verification, refinement, and memory reuse. Overall, SCION shifts AI from isolated tools toward a coordinated operational layer for traceable and reusable scientific innovation.

AI.tldr: SCION是一个基于智能体（Agentic）的科学操作系统，通过元编排（Meta-Harness）和可执行研究计划（REP）将科学任务、工具、智能体和记忆整合为可执行、可审计、可复用的操作流程，在材料分析、分子设计、蛋白质/抗体筛选等任务上超越现有自主研究智能体基线。
AI.motivation: 现有AI4Science系统多为碎片化工具，仍需人工协调问题定义、文献依据、模型使用、模拟、验证和知识复用等环节，缺乏一个能够统一编排科学工作流、实现端到端自动化和可追溯性复用的操作系统级框架。
AI.method: SCION以Science Agent作为元编排层（Meta-Harness），核心提出可执行研究计划（REP）将高层科学意图编译为分阶段目标、依赖关系、验证检查点、工具需求、预期产物和回退条件；集成层次化多智能体执行、基于档案的专业化分工、选择性上下文构建、受控委派和分层认知记忆机制；将科学发现形式化为目标条件逆搜索（Target-conditioned Inverse Search），并扩展至隐藏目标场景下的批量主动搜索。
AI.result: 在材料分析、分子设计、蛋白质/抗体筛选以及科学文献阅读、想法生成、分子生成和抗体筛选等实验上，SCION在任务分解、验证、修正和记忆复用等维度上全面优于现有自主研究智能体基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SCION将AI从孤立工具提升为协调式操作层，实现可追溯、可复用的科学创新流程，为构建统一的AI4Science操作系统提供了可行路径，未来可进一步扩展至更广泛的科学发现场景。

title: Demonstrating Generalization Failures via Mixtures of Conditional Policies
summary: Post-training of frontier language models is conducted on curated task suites, and inevitably leaves a distribution shift between training and deployment environments. This exposes developers to generalization failures, which are relatively poorly understood. To better understand such generalization failures, we believe the community should construct clean demonstrations under simplified conditions. To facilitate this, we propose a simple and flexible way to construct language models which fail to generalize in controllable ways when subsequently trained with Reinforcement Learning (RL) on a given distribution of training tasks. Our construction uses Supervised Fine-Tuning on a dataset of a mixture of transcripts corresponding to a collection of 'conditional policies', which can each independently be assigned certain behaviors on each different task distribution, to obtain a model that is then well approximated as a 'mixture of conditional policies.' We observe that RL training then selects for policies that obtain the highest reward on the training distribution. This can produce striking behaviors: in a controlled setting with two distributions containing identical questions prepended with two different 'trigger strings', RL training on either distribution actively degrades performance on the other to zero, even though the underlying task is identical. We also use our construction to illustrate two novel ways in which generalization may fail in future language models, corresponding to distribution shifts of task coverage and temporal context respectively. While our construction is deliberately simple and may not closely resemble 'natural' generalization failures, the resulting 'model organisms' are of interest for alignment stress-testing and generalization science, and can be used as existence proofs that training success and generalization can come apart in structured ways.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过监督微调构建“条件策略混合体”语言模型的简单框架，使得模型在后续RL训练中能在训练分布上获得高奖励，同时主动导致可控的泛化失败，从而为对齐压力测试和泛化科学研究提供存在性证明。
AI.motivation: 前沿语言模型的后训练在精心策划的任务套件上进行，不可避免地导致训练环境与部署环境之间的分布偏移，从而引发泛化失败。然而，这类泛化失败目前理解不足，社区亟需在简化条件下构建清晰的示范以更好地研究这一现象。
AI.method: 提出一种基于监督微调的构造方法：在一个包含多类“条件策略”对应的混合转录数据集上进行微调，得到可近似为“条件策略混合体”的模型。每个条件策略可独立地为不同任务分布分配特定行为，后续RL训练会在训练任务分布上自动选择奖励最高的策略。
AI.result: 在受控实验中，当两个分布包含相同问题但前缀不同“触发字符串”时，RL训练在任一分布上都会使另一分布的准确率主动降至零。此外，该构造还展示了两种新型泛化失败模式，分别对应任务覆盖的分布偏移和时序上下文分布偏移。
AI.conclusion: 该构造虽刻意简化、可能不同于自然泛化失败，但其生成的“模型生物”对对齐压力测试和泛化科学具有重要价值，可作为训练成功与泛化能力可以结构化地分离的存在性证明。

title: Diagnosing Aerial-View Object Detectors with Foundational Image Generative Models
summary: Recent advances in large-scale image generative models enable photorealistic scene synthesis with controllable attributes. Beyond data augmentation, their potential as diagnostic tools for trained vision systems remains unexplored in the aerial and remote sensing domains. We introduce a synthetic diagnostic framework for aerial-view vehicle detection that combines text-guided generation, attribute-controlled editing, and automated attribute verification to construct a controllable synthetic testbed. This enables fine-grained evaluation of pretrained detectors under diverse scene types and environmental conditions that are difficult to isolate in real datasets. Across three detection architectures and three real aerial datasets, synthetic scene-wise performance trends closely match real-world weaknesses. Guided by these diagnostics, targeted supplementation with small real datasets from the identified weak categories yields improvements of up to 13% AP50 while requiring substantially fewer additional samples than non-targeted augmentation. Our results show that controlled synthetic probing can predict real-domain performance gaps and guide efficient data collection. The proposed diagnostic framework is modular and can incorporate alternative generative or vision-language models as capabilities evolve. Our code and datasets are available here: https://humansensinglab.github.io/AVODDiag/

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合文本引导生成、属性控制编辑和自动验证的合成诊断框架，用于航拍视角下的车辆检测，通过可控合成测试集精准预测真实域检测器的性能短板，并指导高效数据补充，在三个检测架构和三个真实数据集上验证了其有效性，AP50提升最高达13%。
AI.motivation: 大规模图像生成模型在航拍遥感领域的潜力尚未被充分挖掘，尤其是作为已训练视觉系统的诊断工具方面仍是空白；现有真实航拍数据集难以隔离和独立评估不同场景类型与环境条件对检测器性能的影响，缺乏可控的细粒度评估手段。
AI.method: 构建了一个模块化的合成诊断框架，包含三个核心组件：文本引导的场景生成（生成多样化的航拍场景）、属性受控编辑（对已生成场景进行特定属性的精确修改）、以及自动化属性验证（确保合成图像满足目标属性条件）；基于该框架构建可控合成测试集，对预训练检测器进行细粒度评估，识别弱项场景类别，并据此针对性补充少量真实数据。
AI.result: 在三种检测架构（未指定具体名称）和三个真实航拍数据集上，合成场景的性能趋势与真实场景的检测弱点高度一致；基于诊断结果对识别出的弱项类别进行小规模真实数据补充，在仅需少量额外样本的情况下，AP50提升最高达13%，显著优于非针对性数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: 受控合成探测能够准确预测真实域的性能差距，并为高效数据采集提供指导；该诊断框架具有模块化设计，可随生成模型或视觉-语言模型能力的提升而扩展，为航拍车辆检测及其他视觉任务的系统化诊断与数据优化提供了新范式。

title: The Remarkable Effectiveness of Providing AI Agents with Natural Language Tools: A Replication Study Validating NLT Performance Across 14 Models
comment: 28 pages, 6 figures, replication study, replication of arXiv:2510.14453 findings
summary: This study independently replicates and extends the Natural Language Tools (NLT) framework of Johnson et al.~(2025), which questions the use of structured tool calling in large language model (LLM) agentic systems. We evaluated NLT across 14 models and 8,560 trials, adding newer frontier, reasoning, and open-weight models to the original set. The results confirm the core findings and add detail. NLT improves tool-calling accuracy by 14.9 percentage points overall (62.3\% versus 47.4\% structured) and reduces critical errors by 93\% (51 versus 755 errors). The gains depend on model capability: models without native tool calling, reasoning models, and smaller models gain substantially (+24.0pp to +43.1pp), while heavily optimized frontier models (GPT-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro) show smaller or reversed advantages. This matches recent analyses of reinforcement-learning-optimized tool use (Martinez, 2025). NLT also cuts token usage by 25.2\%. The reliability and efficiency advantages compound in recursive agentic workflows, where agents chain many tool calls across sub-agents: a structured failure triggers retries, fallback routing, and coordination overhead, while NLT avoids most of that cost at the source. This work makes three contributions: (1) the first independent validation of NLT using open-source tooling, (2) evidence that model capability moderates NLT's advantages (Chen et al., 2025; Zhang et al., 2025), and (3) a measurement of NLT's reliability benefit (93\% fewer errors), its most deployment-relevant property given the known fragility of structured tool calling. NLT is a practical alternative to structured tool calling, especially for production systems that value reliability over parseability.

AI.tldr: 该研究独立复现并扩展了Johnson等人(2025)的自然语言工具(NLT)框架，证明在14个模型和8560次试验中，NLT相比结构化工具调用将工具调用准确率提升14.9个百分点(62.3%对47.4%)，并将关键错误减少93%(51对755个错误)，但优势受模型能力调节，对无原生工具调用能力、推理和小型模型增益显著，而对高度优化的前沿模型优势较小甚至逆转。
AI.motivation: Johnson等人(2025)提出的自然语言工具(NLT)框架挑战了LLM智能体系统中结构化工具调用的必要性，但该框架缺乏独立复现验证，且其对不同能力水平模型的适用性边界、在递归智能体工作流中的可靠性与效率优势尚未被系统量化，因此本研究旨在填补这一验证与扩展性空白。
AI.method: 本研究独立复现并扩展了NLT框架，在原有模型基础上新增了前沿模型、推理模型和开放权重模型，涵盖14个模型共8560次试验，通过对比NLT与结构化工具调用在不同能力层级模型上的表现，评估工具调用准确率、关键错误率、token消耗以及在递归智能体工作流中的可靠性。
AI.result: NLT在整体上将工具调用准确率提升14.9个百分点(62.3%对47.4%)，关键错误减少93%(51对755个错误)，token消耗降低25.2%。优势受模型能力调节：无原生工具调用能力的模型、推理模型和小型模型增益显著(+24.0pp至+43.1pp)，而GPT-5和Gemini 2.5 Pro等高度优化的前沿模型优势较小甚至逆转。在递归智能体工作流中，结构化调用的失败会触发重试、回退路由和协调开销，而NLT从源头避免了大部分此类成本。
AI.conclusion: NLT是结构化工具调用的实用替代方案，尤其适用于重视可靠性而非可解析性的生产系统；模型能力是调节NLT优势的关键因素，且NLT在递归智能体工作流中的可靠性与效率优势会复合放大；该研究提供了NLT的首个独立复现验证、能力调节效应的证据以及其最关键的部署属性——93%的错误减少。

title: Agent Reinforcement Learning via Pivotal-Aware Self-Feedback Retry
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have shown strong decision-making capabilities in long-horizon interactive tasks, yet they still struggle to effectively leverage failed trajectories: full retries incur high interaction costs, while experience retrieval tends to dilute critical experience signals. To address this, we propose PivoARL, a self-feedback retry framework for experience exploitation in LLM agents. PivoARL identifies the pivotal erroneous turn through structured reflection and performs local retry only from the corresponding pivotal state, thereby reusing the correct prefix and reducing redundant interactions. From an information-gain perspective, we further show that pivotal retry concentrates useful experience signals near the error boundary, mitigating the signal dilution caused by state-agnostic experience utilization. Based on this insight, we design a pivotal-aware credit assignment mechanism that rewards correct prefixes while isolating erroneous suffixes, and optimize reflection quality through implicit reflection returns. We conduct a systematic evaluation on 4 agent tasks and 7 search-based QA benchmarks. Results show that PivoARL achieves significant improvements on Pass@2/3 across all tasks, with an average gain of about 11.5\% over MetaRL. Moreover, benefiting from contrastive preference signals induced by pivotal turns, PivoARL also consistently improves Pass@1 on over 80\% of the tasks. On Minesweeper environment, PivoARL improves over GiGPO by more than 45\% and reduces interaction turns by about 42\% on average compared with full-retry methods. Code is available at https://github.com/yuki-younai/PivoARL.

AI.tldr: 提出PivoARL框架，通过结构化反思定位关键错误回合并实施局部重试，结合关键回合感知的信用分配机制，在LLM智能体任务中显著提升Pass@k指标并降低交互成本。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在长期交互任务中难以有效利用失败轨迹：完整重试带来高交互成本，而经验检索则会稀释关键经验信号，现有方法无法在保留正确前缀的同时高效定位并纠正错误。
AI.method: PivoARL通过结构化反思识别关键错误回合，仅从对应关键状态执行局部重试以复用正确前缀并减少冗余交互；从信息增益视角证明关键回合重试能集中有用经验信号于错误边界附近，缓解信号稀释；设计关键回合感知的信用分配机制，奖励正确前缀并隔离错误后缀，通过隐式反思回报优化反思质量。
AI.result: 在4个智能体任务和7个搜索问答基准上，PivoARL在所有任务上实现Pass@2/3显著提升，平均比MetaRL高出约11.5%；Pass@1在超过80%的任务上持续提升；在扫雷环境中相比GiGPO提升超45%，相比全重试方法平均减少约42%交互轮次。
AI.conclusion: PivoARL通过关键回合定位与局部重试策略，有效兼顾了LLM智能体失败轨迹利用的效率与效果，证明了结构化反思与对比偏好信号结合在降低交互成本和提升决策性能上的潜力。

title: Provable Pruning for Efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting via Coresets
comment: 39 pages, 15 figures, including supplementary material. Code: https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-quality real-time novel-view synthesis, but practical scenes often contain millions of Gaussians, making compression essential for deployment on limited hardware. Existing reduction methods are effective but mostly heuristic: they provide no multiplicative approximation guarantee for the rendered objective, and thus rely heavily on costly post-pruning finetuning to recover quality. We ask a basic question: can a 3DGS scene be provably replaced by a much smaller weighted subset (coreset) while preserving the objective of interest? We first show that, in the unrestricted setting, no non-trivial multiplicative 3DGS coreset exists. We then show that multiplicative guarantees are not impossible, but resolution-dependent. For a prescribed rendering resolution, such as representative views or grids of views/rays, we provide the first weighted coreset construction theorem for 3DGS. The construction samples Gaussians by sensitivity: provable importance scores measuring each Gaussian's role in the full-scene objective. Finally, under explicit validity and log-transmittance stability assumptions, we turn this objective guarantee into a rendering guarantee. Empirically, our method is strongest where deployment needs it most: aggressive compression with no or minimal recovery compute. In prune-only and very short finetuning regimes, it achieves state-of-the-art performance, showing that principled importance estimation can be both theoretically meaningful and practically useful. Open-source code is available at https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets.

AI.tldr: 本文首次为3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）场景压缩建立了带乘法近似保证的加权核心集理论，证明了在分辨率约束下可通过敏感性采样实现可证明的渲染质量保障，并在激进压缩与极少微调场景下达到了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS压缩方法多为启发式，缺乏对渲染目标的乘法近似保证，严重依赖代价高昂的剪枝后微调来恢复质量。本文旨在探索是否存在一种带理论保证的核心集构造方法，能在显著减少高斯点数量的同时，为目标渲染函数提供可证明的近似保真度。
AI.method: 本文首先证明在无限制条件下不存在非平凡的乘法3DGS核心集；随后证明在指定渲染分辨率（如代表性视角或视角/光线网格）下，加权核心集是可构造的。核心构造定理通过敏感性（sensitivity）对高斯点进行采样，即计算每个高斯点在全局场景目标函数中的可证明重要性分数；进一步在显式有效性和对数透过率稳定性假设下，将目标函数保证转化为渲染保证。
AI.result: 在仅剪枝和极短微调（无或极少恢复计算）的激进压缩场景中，该方法达到了最先进性能（state-of-the-art），表明基于理论原则的重要性估计既能提供数学保证，又具有实际效用。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明，尽管3DGS在无限制条件下无法获得非平凡乘法核心集，但通过引入分辨率依赖的约束和敏感性采样，可以实现带理论保证的高效压缩；这种有原则的重要性估计在低计算预算部署场景中展现出显著的实践价值，为3DGS压缩提供了理论驱动的可替代方案。

title: CrossHallu: Do Hallucination Signals Generalize Across Languages and Domains in Large Language Model's Internals?
summary: Recent hallucination detection techniques in large language models (LLMs) focus on directly extracting features from a model's internal representations and training a classifier on these features to detect hallucinations, demonstrating promising results. Notwithstanding this advancement, most internal-state hallucination detection techniques have been explored predominantly in English, raising the question of whether such internal signals generalize across different languages and domains. To address this gap, we present CrossHallu, the first study to evaluate the cross-lingual and cross-domain generalization of hallucination detection using internal representations from six LLMs on the generative question-answering task. We conduct a systematic Arabic <-> English evaluation using TruthfulQA, an Arabic translated version of TruthfulQA, and HalluScore. This evaluation encompasses monolingual training and testing, cross-lingual transfer, cross-domain transfer, and combined cross-lingual and cross-domain transfer. The results reveal that internal-state hallucination signals in LLMs transfer across languages and domains for most models, with cross-lingual performance highly dependent on both class separability and language alignment in the feature space, whereas cross-domain transfer within Arabic varies depending on the training and testing datasets used for the hallucination detector. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/aishaalansari57/CrossHal.

AI.tldr: CrossHallu 是首个系统评估大语言模型内部状态幻觉检测在跨语言（阿拉伯语↔英语）和跨领域泛化能力的研究，实验表明内部幻觉信号在大多数模型中能够跨语言和跨领域迁移，且跨语言性能高度依赖于特征空间中的类别可分性和语言对齐程度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模型内部表示进行幻觉检测的技术在英语场景中表现良好，但这些内部信号能否跨不同语言和领域泛化尚未得到系统研究，存在明显的研究空白。
AI.method: 研究提出了 CrossHallu 框架，在六个大语言模型上针对生成式问答任务，使用 TruthfulQA、其阿拉伯语翻译版本以及 HalluScore 数据集，进行了包含单语训练测试、跨语言迁移、跨领域迁移以及跨语言与跨领域联合迁移在内的系统性阿拉伯语↔英语评估实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，大多数模型的内部状态幻觉信号能够跨语言和跨领域迁移；跨语言迁移性能高度依赖于特征空间中的类别可分性和语言对齐程度，而阿拉伯语内部的跨领域迁移效果则取决于幻觉检测器训练和测试所使用的数据集组合。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了基于内部表示的幻觉检测具有一定的跨语言和跨领域泛化能力，为构建多语言可信赖 LLM 系统提供了实证依据，并指出特征空间中的语言对齐是影响跨语言迁移的关键因素。

title: Can Conversational Temporal Dynamics Improve Depression Detection in Dyads? A Preliminary Investigation in Multi-Modality Perspectives
summary: Automatic depression detection from clinical interviews typically models the semantic content and acoustic characteristics of participant speech. However, the interactional timing between the clinician and participant remains comparatively under-modeled. We investigate conversational temporal dynamics, specifically dyadic turn-pair timing, as a primary modality fused with self-supervised encoders. Evaluated on the DAIC-WOZ dataset, we compare a compact 24-dimensional timing module against frozen WavLM-large and RoBERTa-large baseline detectors. This temporal module achieves the highest single-modality performance on the development set. Furthermore, a convex-weighted late fusion strategy improves overall performance to 0.804 and 0.669 macro-F1 on the development and test sets, respectively. The learned fusion effectively assigns zero weight to acoustics, demonstrating that conversational timing serves as a lightweight, interpretable complement for dyadic depression screening.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用对话双方的轮次交互时序（dyadic turn-pair timing）作为轻量级特征模态，结合自监督编码器进行抑郁症自动检测，在DAIC-WOZ数据集上通过凸加权融合策略达到0.804/0.669 macro-F1，且学到的融合权重将声学模态置零，表明对话时序可作为高效、可解释的互补模态。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁症自动检测方法主要建模患者语音的语义内容和声学特征，但临床访谈中医生与患者之间的交互时序动态（即对话轮次配对的时间模式）尚未被充分探索，存在对交互式时间维度建模不足的研究空白。
AI.method: 论文提出一个24维的紧凑型时序模块来建模医患双方的轮次配对时序特征，将其与冻结的WavLM-large（声学）和RoBERTa-large（语义）自监督编码器基线进行融合，并采用凸加权晚期融合策略（convex-weighted late fusion）来整合多模态特征。
AI.result: 在DAIC-WOZ数据集上，该时序模块在开发集上达到单模态最佳性能；凸加权晚期融合将整体性能提升至开发集0.804 macro-F1和测试集0.669 macro-F1。有趣的是，学到的融合权重将声学模态权重置为零，表明时序模态在融合中起了主导作用。
AI.conclusion: 对话轮次时序可作为轻量级、可解释且高效的互补模态用于抑郁症筛查，其简洁的24维特征即可超越复杂的自监督声学/语义编码器，为临床抑郁症检测提供了新的、计算成本极低的分析维度。

title: Track the Noise, Move the World:3D-Grounded Motion-Consistent Noise for Controllable Video Generation
summary: Modern image-and-text-to-video diffusion models can synthesize highly realistic videos by iteratively denoising an initial Gaussian noise tensor conditioned on reference image and text inputs. However, existing approaches still lack precise and unified controllability over both object motion and camera motion within a single generation process. We present UniCaMo, a unified framework that enables simultaneous control of object trajectories and camera viewpoints by directly constructing the input noise of the diffusion model. Specifically, UniCaMo builds a shared 3D-grounded motion-consistent noise space across latent video frames. Sparse 3D point tracks are used to warp the Gaussian noise of the reference frame along desired object trajectories, while a virtual spherical noise representation provides globally consistent noise values for newly revealed scene regions under camera motion. By combining local track-guided noise warping with global sphere-based noise sampling, UniCaMo maintains geometric and temporal consistency under both object movement and viewpoint changes. Because UniCaMo modifies only the input noise, it requires no auxiliary adapters, control branches, or architectural changes to the underlying video diffusion model. With lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on large pretrained video diffusion models, including Wan 2.1 (14B), UniCaMo achieves state-of-the-art results in both video quality and motion controllability on standard controllable video generation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: UniCaMo 提出一种统一框架，通过直接构造扩散模型的输入噪声空间，在无需额外适配器或架构修改的情况下，实现对视频生成中物体运动轨迹和相机视角的联合精确控制，在 Wan 2.1 (14B) 等大模型上经轻量 LoRA 微调后达到 SOTA 效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本到视频扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频，但在同一生成过程中缺乏对物体运动和相机运动的统一且精确的控制能力，现有方法通常需要额外的适配器或控制分支，无法在不修改模型架构的前提下同时操控两类运动。
AI.method: UniCaMo 构建了一个跨视频帧的共享 3D 运动一致噪声空间：利用稀疏 3D 点轨迹沿目标物体轨迹扭曲参考帧的高斯噪声，同时引入虚拟球面噪声表示为相机运动下新出现的场景区域提供全局一致的噪声值，通过局部轨迹引导的噪声扭曲与全局球面噪声采样的结合来维持几何与时间一致性，仅修改输入噪声而不需任何辅助适配器或架构改动，并采用轻量 LoRA 微调适配大模型。
AI.result: 在标准可控视频生成基准上，基于 Wan 2.1 (14B) 等大规模预训练视频扩散模型，经过轻量 LoRA 微调后，UniCaMo 在视频质量和运动可控性方面均取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: UniCaMo 证明了仅通过对扩散模型的输入噪声空间进行显式三维几何构造，即可在不改变模型架构的前提下实现灵活、统一的运动和相机控制，为可控视频生成提供了一种轻量且通用的新范式。

title: Spinning Straw into Gold: Relabeling LLM Agent Trajectories in Hindsight for Successful Demonstrations
summary: Large language model agents operate in partially observable, long-horizon settings where obtaining supervision remains a major bottleneck. We address this by utilizing a source of supervision overlooked in existing post-training methods: unintended yet successful goals embedded within agent rollouts. Specifically, we introduce Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL), where an auxiliary LLM reviews each completed trajectory and relabels it with all of the natural-language goals the agent actually achieved. HSL then pairs the trajectory with its relabeled goals and uses these pairs for additional fine-tuning. To mitigate suboptimality in the relabeled data, we propose two learning techniques for HSL, irrelevant-action masking and sample reweighting. Our experiments show that HSL is flexible and compatible with existing post-training pipelines. It improves both SFT and DPO, with larger gains on long-horizon tasks with more diverse goal spaces. Moreover, HSL is sample-efficient: on ALFWorld, it surpasses baselines trained on the full dataset while using only one quarter of the ground-truth demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 提出Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL)，通过利用智能体轨迹中意外达成的目标作为额外监督信号，结合无关动作掩码和样本重加权两项学习技术，提升LLM智能体在部分可观测长周期任务上的SFT与DPO性能，在ALFWorld上仅用四分之一真实示范即可超越完整数据集训练的基线。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在部分可观测、长周期任务中获取监督信号仍是主要瓶颈，现有后训练方法忽略了智能体轨迹中那些非预期但实际达成的成功目标这一被忽视的监督来源。
