AI.method: 提出Hindsight Supervised Learning (HSL)，方法包括三个阶段：首先让辅助LLM审查已完成轨迹，将其用智能体实际达成的所有自然语言目标进行重标注；然后将原始轨迹与重标注后的目标配对，用于额外的模型微调；最后为缓解重标注数据中的次优性问题，提出了无关动作掩码和样本重加权两种学习技术。
AI.result: HSL与现有后训练管线兼容，在SFT和DPO上均有提升，在长周期任务和大目标空间场景下增益更大；在ALFWorld上，HSL仅使用四分之一真实示范即可超越基于完整数据集训练的基线，展现出优异的数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明智能体轨迹中隐含的意外成功目标是一种有价值的、可被系统利用的监督信号；HSL作为一种灵活高效的后训练方法，能够显著提升LLM智能体在长周期复杂任务中的学习效率和表现。

title: Bridging Interleaved Multi-Modal Reasoning as a Unified Decision Process
summary: Unified multi-modal models (UMMs) have shown promising interleaved text-image reasoning capabilities, yet effectively optimizing such multi-turn generation via reinforcement learning (RL) remains an open challenge. Existing approaches apply RL exclusively to text steps, relegating image generation to supervised surrogates, preventing policy gradients from propagating through the full interleaved trajectory across heterogeneous modalities. This leaves the potential of RL for UMMs largely untapped. In the paper, we introduce \textbf{BRAID} (\textbf{B}ridging inte\textbf{R}le\textbf{A}ved mult\textbf{I}-modal reasoning as a unified \textbf{D}ecision process), a simple framework that casts multi-turn text-image-text reasoning as a unified Markov decision process (MDP), enabling joint optimization of textual and visual generation via a single, principled RL objective. BRAID computes a shared trajectory-level advantage and propagates it coherently into both text tokens and image denoising paths, each optimized through its modality-native policy gradient mechanism. To further address long-horizon credit assignment, BRAID employs a vision-language model (VLM) judge that scores each intermediate image on its reasoning utility, supplying dense turn-level feedback to sharpen learning at critical visual branches. Experiments on spatial reasoning and visual perception benchmarks show that BRAID consistently outperforms various baselines, confirming that a unified MDP formulation with vision-thinking guidance is essential for effective multi-modal reasoning.

AI.tldr: BRAID将多模态多轮文本-图像生成建模为一个统一的马尔可夫决策过程，通过共享轨迹优势传播和VLM裁判提供的细粒度逐轮反馈，实现了对文本与视觉生成的联合强化学习优化，在空间推理和视觉感知任务上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在多轮文本-图像推理任务中，强化学习的应用仅限于文本步骤，而图像生成仍依赖监督代理，导致策略梯度无法通过完整的跨模态轨迹传播，使得强化学习在优化多模态推理方面的潜力远未被充分利用。
AI.method: BRAID将多轮文本-图像-文本推理统一建模为马尔可夫决策过程，计算共享的轨迹级优势，并通过各模态原生的策略梯度机制将其连贯地传播到文本token和图像去噪路径中；同时引入VLM裁判对每张中间图像在推理链中的效用进行评分，提供密集的逐轮反馈以增强长期信用分配。
AI.result: 在空间推理和视觉感知基准上的实验表明，BRAID一致性地优于多种基线方法，证实了统一MDP框架结合视觉思维引导对于有效多模态推理至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将多模态推理建模为统一的决策过程并辅以视觉思维引导的密集反馈，是实现多模态生成联合强化学习优化的关键，为未来统一多模态模型的高效训练提供了新的范式。

title: Conversational Human Audio-visual Talking Dialogue Generation
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026 as a main paper
summary: Large-scale dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue (DIAD) datasets provide fundamental data resources for developing humanoid interactive virtual agents and digital humans. However, collecting such data is time-consuming, expensive, and ethically sensitive. To address this, we propose CHAT, a new dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue generation (DIADG) framework that generates diverse, paired, and mutually responsive speech-face dialogue clips from a single textual prompt. CHAT unifies large language models and talking face models with interactive audio and facial behaviour refinement modules, enabling the generation of aligned dyadic dialogue clips with diverse contents and facial identities. Experiments show that CHAT outperforms existing related methods designed for similar tasks under both objective and subjective evaluations. Moreover, our synthesised CHAT-AVD-50k dataset serves as effective pre-training data for downstream interactive head generation, consistently improving PerFRDiff and ReactDiff on REACT 2024. CHAT offers a scalable alternative to the costly and ethically sensitive collection of real dyadic interaction data.

AI.tldr: 提出CHAT框架，通过统一大语言模型与说话人脸模型并引入交互音频与面部行为精炼模块，实现从单一文本提示生成多样化、对齐的双人交互音频-视觉对话片段，为下游交互式头部生成提供可扩展的预训练数据替代方案。
AI.motivation: 大规模双人交互音频-视觉对话（DIAD）数据集是开发类人交互虚拟代理与数字人的基础数据资源，但真实数据的收集耗时、昂贵且涉及伦理敏感问题，现有方法难以高效生成多样化且对齐的双人交互对话数据。
AI.method: CHAT框架统一了大语言模型与说话人脸模型，并引入交互音频精炼模块与面部行为精炼模块，能够从单一文本提示生成具有多样内容与面部身份的对齐双人对话片段，实现语音与面部表情的相互响应。
AI.result: 在客观与主观评估中，CHAT均优于面向类似任务的现有方法；合成的CHAT-AVD-50k数据集作为下游交互式头部生成的预训练数据，在REACT 2024基准上持续提升了PerFRDiff与ReactDiff的性能。
AI.conclusion: CHAT提供了一种可扩展的替代方案，能够有效规避真实双人交互数据采集的高成本与伦理问题，合成的数据集对下游任务具有实际增益，展示了生成式数据在交互式虚拟人研究中的巨大潜力。

title: CausalGame: Benchmarking Causal Thinking of LLM Agents in Games
comment: Zhenhao, Yongqiang, and Chenxi contributed equally to the project. A short version is accepted at the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026 as an Oral presentation. Project website https://causalgame.github.io/
summary: Building AI Scientist agents with Large Language Models (LLMs) has recently attracted growing attention. Since scientific discovery fundamentally relies on uncovering causal relationships from observations, the capability of causal thinking, i.e., distinguishing causation from correlation and recognizing hidden biases, is essential to LLM agents. Although a number of benchmarks exist for AI Scientists, none explicitly incorporate challenges from selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders that widely exist in real-world scientific discovery. To this end, we present CausalGame, a benchmark that evaluates the causal thinking capabilities of LLM agents through interactive games. CausalGame asks LLM agents to actively design experimental protocols, collect observation data, and derive a final solution with an explanation report. To emulate realistic scientific discovery challenges, we design 14 scenarios that incorporate selection bias, measurement error, and hidden confounders. Across 30 LLM agents, none demonstrates reliable causal thinking: the best model reaches only 68.0% survival against analytical optima of 78-85%, and merely 5-7% of sessions receive credits on the causal-reasoning rubrics. CausalGame provides a scalable and controlled testbed for evaluating the causal thinking of AI Scientist agents.

AI.tldr: CausalGame是一个通过交互式游戏评估大语言模型智能体因果推理能力的新型基准，覆盖选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素等真实科学发现挑战，实验表明当前最强模型仅能达到68.0%的生存率，远低于分析最优的78-85%，揭示LLM智能体在因果思维方面存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有AI科学家基准均未明确纳入现实中普遍存在的选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素等因果推理挑战，而因果思维（区分因果与相关、识别隐藏偏见）是LLM智能体进行科学发现的核心能力，因此亟需一个专门评估LLM智能体因果推理能力的基准。
AI.method: CausalGame通过交互式游戏评估LLM智能体的因果思维能力，要求智能体主动设计实验协议、收集观测数据并导出最终解决方案及解释报告；基准设计了14个涵盖选择偏差、测量误差和隐藏混杂因素的真实科学发现挑战场景。
AI.result: 对30个LLM智能体的评估显示，没有模型表现出可靠的因果推理能力：最佳模型的生存率仅为68.0%，远低于分析最优的78-85%；在因果推理评分标准中，仅有5-7%的会话获得评分。
AI.conclusion: CausalGame为评估AI科学家智能体的因果思维提供了一个可扩展且可控的测试平台，实验结果表明现有LLM智能体在因果推理方面远未达到可靠水平，凸显了该领域亟需进一步研究。

title: Agentic IoT: Architectures, Applications, and Challenges Toward the Internet of Agents
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, Author's preprint version. The manuscript may be revised based on peer-review feedback and publication requirements
summary: The integration of AI into Internet of Things (AIoT) systems has gradually transformed them from passive data collection infrastructures into intelligent systems capable of anomaly detection, predictive maintenance, classification, forecasting, and optimization. However, most existing solutions still rely on task-specific models that infer from sensor data; thus, system-wide capabilities such as real-time reasoning, adaptive planning, autonomous coordination, learning, tool use, and contextual decision-making remain limited. This paper examines Agentic IoT as a next-generation cognitive IoT paradigm that integrates the perception, reasoning, planning, learning, and action capabilities of autonomous AI agents with cyber-physical systems. Agentic IoT aims to transform IoT from data-centric sensing and inference infrastructures into distributed cognitive agent ecosystems operating across the device/edge-fog-cloud continuum. The paper first grounds this transition as a paradigm shift and positions Agentic IoT in relation to AIoT, edge intelligence, multi-agent systems, and the Internet of Agents. It then systematically reviews current studies, presents a holistic architectural framework, discusses domain-specific application potential, and identifies key technical, operational, and research challenges together with future research directions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic IoT作为新一代认知物联网范式，通过将自主AI智能体的感知、推理、规划、学习与行动能力集成到物联系统中，推动物联网从数据驱动的感知基础设施向分布式认知智能体生态系统演进，并系统梳理了其架构、应用与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有AIoT系统仍依赖任务特定模型从传感器数据中推理，缺乏系统级的实时推理、自适应规划、自主协调、工具使用和上下文决策等能力，制约了物联网向更高层次认知智能的演进。
AI.method: 论文以范式转换视角将Agentic IoT定位为AIoT、边缘智能、多智能体系统与智能体互联网的融合演进，提出了一个涵盖设备-边缘-雾-云连续体的分层架构框架，并基于系统文献综述方法梳理现有研究。
AI.result: 论文系统性地综述了当前研究进展，提出了一个整体性架构框架，讨论了多个领域的应用潜力，并识别出关键技术、操作与研究挑战及未来方向，但未提供定量实验结果或性能指标。
AI.conclusion: Agentic IoT代表了物联网从数据中心的感知推理基础设施向分布式认知智能体生态系统的根本性范式转变，为实现系统级自主决策与协作提供了新路径，但需克服诸多技术挑战方能实现实际部署。

title: Prior Bias in Vision Language Models on UML Diagram Interpretation
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to software engineering artifacts, especially UML class diagrams whose meaning depends on visual notation. Yet, it is unclear whether VLMs actually read such diagrams or instead answer from pretrained priors about how classes typically relate. We introduce a controlled UML benchmark in which each prior-conforming diagram is paired with its prior-conflicting counterpart that (1) preserves the same class names and layout while (2) reverses only the relation arrow. We evaluate eight open-source VLMs from two model families, InternVL3.5 and Qwen3, alongside two closed-source frontier models GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.4 Mini. Across the eight open-source models, reversing the arrow reduces relation-direction accuracy by 33.48% on average, while GPT-5.4 Mini retains a 10% gap. In the harder three-class condition, accuracy drops sharply by 45.28% for open-source models, and even 18.62% for the GPT-5.4 family on average. Scaling provides only limited improvements and is family-dependent. Our benchmark presents a diagnostic prior-driven failure in diagram-grounded software understanding. Our artifact is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/UMLKnowledgeConflict-8461.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个对照UML基准测试，通过反转类图中的关系箭头来揭示视觉语言模型（VLM）严重依赖预训练先验而非实际视觉符号进行推理，导致方向判断准确率平均下降33.48%，证明了当前VLM在软件工程图解理解中存在先验驱动的根本性失败。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在软件工程工件（尤其是UML类图）上的应用日益增多，但现有研究未明确验证VLM是否真正读取图表的视觉符号（如箭头方向）来理解语义，还是仅仅依赖从预训练知识中习得的关于类之间如何关联的先验知识。
AI.method: 作者设计了一个受控UML基准测试，为每个符合先验的类图构建一个先验冲突的对应版本，该版本保持相同的类名和布局，但仅反转关系箭头方向；评估了八个开源VLM（来自InternVL3.5和Qwen3系列）以及两个闭源前沿模型（GPT-5.4和GPT-5.4 Mini）在箭头方向识别任务上的表现。
AI.result: 在八个开源模型中，反转箭头导致关系方向准确率平均下降33.48%；GPT-5.4 Mini仍存在10%的准确率差距。在更困难的三类条件下，开源模型准确率骤降45.28%，GPT-5.4系列平均下降18.62%。扩展模型规模仅带来有限的、且依赖于模型族的改进。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试揭示了VLM在基于图解的软件理解中存在先验驱动的系统性失效：模型并非真正基于视觉符号进行推理，而是依赖预训练先验来回答问题，且模型缩放无法有效缓解这一问题，提示未来需关注视觉符号的真正对齐能力。

title: UI-MOPD: Multi-Platform On-Policy Distillation for Continual GUI Agent Learning
summary:
Recent advances in multimodal foundation models and agent systems have driven GUI agents from single-platform task execution toward cross-platform interaction. However, building multi-platform GUI agents remains challenging. On one hand, high-quality and executable cross-platform interaction trajectories are still scarce, and existing data often suffer from limited platform coverage. On the other hand, different platforms exhibit distinct interaction conventions, making joint or continual training prone to behavioral pattern mixing, platform-specific capability degradation, and catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we construct Uni-GUI, a high-quality cross-platform GUI interaction dataset, and propose UI-MOPD, the first method that incorporates multi-teacher on-policy distillation into continual learning for GUI agents. UI-MOPD dynamically selects a platform-specific teacher according to the current environment and transfers platform-specific behavioral priors to a shared policy through platform-conditioned distillation, enabling adaptation to new platforms while preserving capabilities on existing ones. Experiments on OSWorld and MobileWorld show that UI-MOPD achieves task success rates of 38.2% and 12.0%, respectively, demonstrating its effectiveness in balancing cross-platform capability retention and new-platform adaptation.
  Project page: https://elispectre.github.io/UI-MOPD/.

AI.tldr: 提出了Uni-GUI跨平台GUI交互数据集和UI-MOPD方法，通过多教师在线策略蒸馏的持续学习框架，在OSWorld和MobileWorld上分别达到38.2%和12.0%的任务成功率，有效平衡了GUI agent的跨平台能力保留与新平台适应。
AI.motivation: 跨平台GUI agent面临两大挑战：一是高质量、可执行的跨平台交互轨迹数据稀缺且平台覆盖有限；二是不同平台交互范式各异，联合或持续训练容易导致行为模式混杂、特定平台能力退化和灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 构建了Uni-GUI高质量跨平台GUI交互数据集，并提出了UI-MOPD方法，该方法首次将多教师在线策略蒸馏引入GUI agent的持续学习；根据当前环境动态选择平台特定教师，通过平台条件蒸馏将平台特定行为先验迁移到共享策略中，实现在学习新平台的同时保留已有平台能力。
AI.result: 在OSWorld和MobileWorld基准上，UI-MOPD分别取得了38.2%和12.0%的任务成功率，验证了其在跨平台能力保留与新平台适应之间的平衡效果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了多教师在线策略蒸馏与持续学习相结合能有效解决GUI agent在多平台场景下的能力退化问题，为构建统一的跨平台GUI agent提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Biological Motifs for Agentic Control
summary:
The transition of Large Language Models (LLMs) from passive generators to autonomous agents has introduced significant challenges in reliability, security, and state management. Current agentic architectures are often constructed ad-hoc, prone to hallucination cascades, infinite loops, and prompt injection attacks. This paper argues that many of these failure modes can be analyzed using control motifs long studied in systems biology, provided the comparison is made at the level of typed interfaces and coordination structure rather than literal biological mechanism.
  We develop a typed interface correspondence between Gene Regulatory Networks and agentic software systems using polynomial functors and wiring diagrams. Five biological motifs are mapped to composable software design patterns: Coherent Feed-Forward Loops for noise suppression, Adaptive Immunity for layered security, Mitochondrial Signaling for resource governance, Endosymbiosis for neuro-symbolic integration, and Morphogen Diffusion for spatially varying coordination. An epistemic topology layer derives Kripke-style knowledge operators from the wiring diagram's observation structure and proves four predictive theorems for multi-agent scaling.
  The core contributions are: (1) the Agentic Operad, a typed syntax for agent composition with provable error suppression bounds for feed-forward topologies; (2) an epistemic topology with four theorems (error amplification, sequential penalty, parallel acceleration, and tool density scaling) whose qualitative predictions are consistent with published multi-agent benchmarks; and (3) a six-layer progression from structure through development, grounded in autonomous learning frameworks and convergence proxies from the empirical literature. A reference implementation with 1,813 tests and 116 examples illustrates practical feasibility.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于系统生物学控制基序与类型化接口对应关系的智能体形式化框架（Agentic Operad），通过多项式函子和接线图将五种生物基序映射为可组合的软件设计模式，并推导出用于多智能体缩放的四条预测定理。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型从被动生成器向自主智能体的转型面临可靠性、安全性和状态管理的重大挑战，当前智能体架构多为临时拼凑，易出现幻觉级联、无限循环和提示注入攻击，缺乏形式化、可组合的设计方法论。
AI.method: 利用多项式函子和接线图在类型化接口层面建立基因调控网络与智能体软件系统之间的对应关系，将五种生物学基序映射为可组合的软件设计模式（相干前馈环、适应性免疫、线粒体信号、内共生、形态素扩散），并引入认知拓扑层从接线图的观测结构中推导Kripke风格的知识算子。
AI.result: 提出了Agentic Operad（一种带可证明误差抑制边界的智能体组合类型化语法）、包含四条预测定理（误差放大、顺序惩罚、并行加速、工具密度缩放）的认知拓扑框架，其定性预测与已发表的多智能体基准结果一致，并提供了包含1,813个测试和116个示例的参考实现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明系统生物学的控制基序可以在类型化接口层面为智能体系统设计提供形式化工具，Agentic Operad和认知拓扑为构建可靠、可扩展、可组合的自主智能体提供了理论框架和实用参考实现。

title: Cancelable Biometric Template Protection Based on Multi-Instance Fusion: A Contralateral Iris Approach
summary: Biometric templates are vulnerable to theft if stored without protection. Unlike passwords, a compromised iris cannot be reissued. Although existing cancelable biometric schemes address this problem, most still require an external key or token, introducing an additional attack surface. This paper proposes a cancelable contralateral iris template protection scheme that eliminates the need for a separate token or stored secret, satisfying the three requirements of ISO/IEC 24745: irreversibility, unlinkability, and confidentiality. The method fuses three enrollment samples per eye using Majority Vote Fusion to produce a stable template, and applies a salt-based bit permutation derived from the subject's enrollment ID. Combining the left- and right-permuted templates via a bitwise XOR produces a single Protected Fused Template. Since left and right iris patterns are statistically independent, fusing contralateral irises improves the accuracy of the system. An attacker must possess both iris codes and both salts to recover any useful information, yielding a larger effective key space than single-iris schemes. Experiments on three datasets, CASIA-IrisV4-Interval, CASIA-IrisV2 (two devices), and CASIA-Iris-Thousand, yield EERs of $0.36$\%, $4.88$\%, $10.80$\%, and $3.35$\%, respectively; the highest value reflects the more challenging cross-device scenario. These results demonstrate that our contralateral approach outperforms unprotected baselines while remaining competitive with state-of-the-art cancelable methods. %In addition, an ablation study confirms the benefit on both recognition performance and security. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first scheme to combine tokenless multi-instance fusion and contralateral binding under ISO/IEC 24745.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需外部密钥或令牌的可撤销虹膜模板保护方案，通过多数投票融合、基于注册ID的盐值位置换及左右眼异或融合，满足ISO/IEC 24745的不可逆性、不可关联性和机密性要求，在多个数据集上取得有竞争力的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有生物特征模板易因存储不当而遭窃取，虹膜被盗后无法像密码一样重发，而现有的可撤销虹膜方案大多依赖外部密钥或令牌，引入了额外的攻击面。本文旨在设计一种无需独立存储密钥的、满足ISO/IEC 24745标准三项核心要求（不可逆性、不可关联性、机密性）的可撤销虹膜模板保护方案。
AI.method: 该方法对每只眼睛的三份注册样本采用多数投票融合（Majority Vote Fusion）生成稳定模板，然后基于受试者注册ID派生的盐值对模板进行位置换；将左右眼置换后的模板通过按位异或（XOR）融合为单一的保护融合模板。左右虹膜模式在统计上独立，融合双侧虹膜可提升系统精度。攻击者需同时获取左右眼的虹码及对应两个盐值才能恢复有用信息，有效密钥空间大于单眼方案。
AI.result: 在CASIA-IrisV4-Interval、CASIA-IrisV2（两个设备子集）及CASIA-Iris-Thousand四个数据集上取得的等错误率（EER）分别为0.36%、4.88%、10.80%和3.35%，其中最高值对应更具挑战性的跨设备场景。结果表明该方案性能优于未保护的基线方法，且与现有最先进的可撤销方法竞争力相当。消融实验验证了该方法在识别性能与安全性两方面的收益。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在ISO/IEC 24745框架下将无令牌多实例融合与双侧虹膜绑定相结合，证明了双侧虹膜融合方案在无需外部密钥的条件下仍能兼顾高识别精度与强安全性。该工作为可撤销生物特征模板保护提供了一种无需额外存储秘密的新范式，具有重要的实际部署价值和理论意义。

title: evalci: A Python Library for Statistically Rigorous Comparison of Language Model Evaluations
comment: 7 pages, 1 figure. Software: https://pypi.org/project/evalci/ (source: https://github.com/Shreyaskc/evalci, Zenodo DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21201815)
summary: The dominant practice in language model evaluation is to report a single accuracy number per model and declare the higher one better, without testing whether the gap could plausibly be sampling noise. On benchmarks of a few thousand items, and under temperature sampling where a model can differ from itself run to run by more than the reported gap between models, this practice routinely overstates confidence in headline claims. The statistical machinery to fix this -- confidence intervals, paired significance tests, power analysis, clustered standard errors, multiple-comparison correction -- is well established, but no standard, pip-installable tool packages it in the shape an evaluation actually takes: a per-item results table. We present evalci, a pure-Python library (numpy/scipy/pandas only) that turns a per-item results table into a publication-ready claim -- e.g., "Model A beats Model B, $Δ=3.1$ pts, 95% CI [1.2, 5.0], paired permutation $p=0.002$, $n=1{,}319$" -- in one function call, with adapters for lm-evaluation-harness and HELM output. Every routine is validated against an independent reference (statsmodels, or brute-force exact enumeration) rather than only against itself. As a case study, we re-analyze a public comparison of nine language models' MMLU accuracy and find that 3 of the 8 adjacent leaderboard-rank gaps are not statistically significant after correcting for the 36 pairwise comparisons the ranking implies. evalci is available at https://pypi.org/project/evalci/ (source: https://github.com/Shreyaskc/evalci, DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21201815)

AI.tldr: evalci是一个轻量级Python库，通过一行代码将逐项结果表转化为包含置信区间、显著性检验等统计信息的出版级评估结论，解决了当前语言模型评估中仅报告单点精度而无统计显著性检验的普遍问题。
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型评估的主流做法是仅报告单点精度值并直接比较数值高低，而未考虑采样噪声可能导致的差距波动；在数千项基准测试和温度采样的设定下，同一模型多次运行间的波动幅度甚至可能超过模型间的报告差距，导致对结论的置信度被系统性高估。
AI.method: 作者开发了纯Python库evalci，仅依赖numpy/scipy/pandas，以逐项结果表为输入，通过单一函数调用即可输出出版级声明（含置信区间、配对置换检验p值、功效分析、聚类标准误、多重比较校正），并为lm-evaluation-harness和HELM提供适配器；所有统计例程均基于独立参考实现（statsmodels或暴力穷举枚举）进行验证。
AI.result: 作为案例研究，作者重新分析了九个语言模型在MMLU上的公开精度对比数据，发现相邻排行榜排位差距中，8对里有3对在针对36个两两比较进行多重比较校正后不再具有统计显著性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作强调了在语言模型评估中引入统计显著性检验的必要性，并提供了一个即装即用的标准化工具，使研究人员能够便捷地报告带有置信度和统计检验的评估结论，从而避免因忽略采样噪声而导致的对模型性能差异的过度自信。

title: Agentic SABRE: An Uncertainty-Aware Neuro-Symbolic Multi-Agent Framework for Adaptive Ransomware Detection
summary: Ransomware has evolved into a complex, adaptive, and fast-moving adversary category in which static signatures and monolithic classifiers fail to generalise under concept drift, evasion, and behavioural polymorphism. In this paper, we present Agentic SABRE (Semantic-Behavioural Arbitration for Ransomware Evaluation), an uncertainty-aware, neuro-symbolic, multi-agent framework for adaptive ransomware detection. SABRE fuses semantic, representation-based evidence with behavioural, time-window forensic telemetry and employs Monte Carlo Dropout inference to quantify epistemic uncertainty for each agent. We introduce a decision-layer orchestrator that performs risk- and uncertainty-aware triage using two interpretable thresholds: a risk score and an uncertainty budget. High-confidence, high-risk samples are automatically contained, while uncertain or borderline cases are escalated to human analysts, establishing a flexible computational contract between autonomous response and analyst oversight. To support auditability and trust, SABRE integrates post-hoc explainability mechanisms, including gradient saliency, permutation importance, and counterfactual analysis, enabling both local and global interpretation of agent decisions. Extensive evaluation on RDset and RanSMAP demonstrates that Agentic SABRE preserves perfect discrimination on saturated semantic datasets, with AUC equal to 1.0, while improving robustness under weak behavioural signals. It achieves up to a 4.9 percent relative reduction in false escalations at equal recall while maintaining calibrated predictive uncertainty. Counterfactual analysis further shows that semantic and behavioural decisions can be reversed with bounded perturbation cost, indicating stable and interpretable decision boundaries.

AI.tldr: Agentic SABRE 提出了一种不确定性感知的神经符号多智能体框架，融合语义与行为证据并通过决策层编排器实现风险与不确定性感知的自动分流，在保持完美判别性能的同时显著降低了误报升级率。
AI.motivation: 传统基于静态签名或单一分类器的勒索软件检测方法在面对概念漂移、规避攻击和行为多态性时难以泛化，缺乏对检测不确定性的量化能力，亟需一种能融合多模态证据、具备可解释性且能灵活平衡自动响应与人工分析的新型检测框架。
AI.method: Agentic SABRE 采用神经符号多智能体架构，融合基于语义的表示学习证据与基于行为时间窗口的取证遥测数据，利用 Monte Carlo Dropout 推断量化每个智能体的认知不确定性；通过决策层编排器引入风险分数和不确定性预算两个可解释阈值，自动隔离高置信高风险样本，将不确定性或边界样本升级至人工分析师；集成梯度显著性、排列重要性和反事实分析等事后可解释机制，支持局部与全局决策解释。
AI.result: 在 RDset 和 RanSMAP 数据集上的广泛评估表明，Agentic SABRE 在饱和语义数据集上保持完美判别性能（AUC=1.0），同时在弱行为信号下提升了鲁棒性；在等召回率条件下实现了最多 4.9% 的误报升级率相对降低，并保持校准的预测不确定性；反事实分析表明语义和行为决策可在有界扰动成本下翻转，验证了决策边界的稳定性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: Agentic SABRE 通过多智能体融合与不确定性感知的分流机制，在勒索软件检测中实现了自动响应与人工监督的灵活契约，显著提升了检测的鲁棒性、可解释性和可信度，为应对快速演化的安全威胁提供了一种可审计、可交互的计算框架。

title: VideoSearcher: Empowering Video Deep Research with Multi-Tool Agentic Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
comment: Technical report. Project page: https://stephen-gzk.github.io/VideoSearcher-website/ ; Code: https://github.com/Stephen-gzk/VideoSearcher ; Model & Data on HuggingFace
summary: Video understanding is moving beyond closed-context perception toward open-world evidence exploration, a paradigm formalized as Video Deep Research (VDR). However, existing multimodal search agents primarily target static images, and the current VDR benchmark relies on text-centric retrieval that discards crucial visual information. To address these limitations, we propose VideoSearcher, a closed-loop agentic framework that empowers Vision-Language Models with multi-tool reasoning for VDR. VideoSearcher unifies temporal localization, spatial focusing, and multimodal search within a single reasoning trajectory, enabling agents to progressively ground visual clues, retrieve relevant evidence, and synthesize answers. To optimize knowledge-intensive reasoning trajectories, we propose Bi-branch Sequence Policy Optimization (BiSPO), a reinforcement learning algorithm that decouples tool-invocation optimization from answer-accuracy optimization. This design provides stable learning signals for both evidence-grounded reasoning and purposeful tool use. Furthermore, we construct VideoSearch-QA, the first benchmark designed to evaluate open-world video information grounding and multimodal search-based reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VideoSearcher significantly outperforms prior open-source agentic baselines across various search-oriented and multimodal understanding benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出VideoSearcher，一个闭环智能体框架，结合视觉-语言模型与多工具推理，并设计BiSPO强化学习算法及VideoSearch-QA基准，用于开放世界视频深度研究，显著超越现有开源基线。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解研究多局限于封闭上下文感知，而开放世界证据探索（视频深度研究VDR）范式尚未被充分探索；同时，多模态搜索智能体主要针对静态图像，当前VDR基准依赖文本中心检索而丢弃了关键视觉信息，亟需一个能够统一时间定位、空间聚焦和多模态搜索的视频推理框架。
AI.method: 提出VideoSearcher闭环智能体框架，赋予视觉-语言模型多工具推理能力，将时间定位、空间聚焦和多模态搜索统一在单一推理轨迹中；提出Bi-branch Sequence Policy Optimization (BiSPO)强化学习算法，将工具调用优化与答案准确性优化解耦，为证据推理和工具使用提供稳定学习信号；构建VideoSearch-QA基准用于评估开放世界视频信息定位与多模态搜索推理。
AI.result: 在多个面向搜索和多模态理解的基准测试中，VideoSearcher显著优于先前的开源智能体基线方法，验证了其在开放世界视频信息定位和多模态搜索推理任务上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: VideoSearcher通过闭环多工具推理框架和BiSPO解耦优化策略，有效推动了视频理解从封闭上下文感知向开放世界证据探索的范式转变，VideoSearch-QA基准为未来VDR研究提供了标准化评估平台。

title: Don't Commit Alone: Joint Token Commitment in Diffusion Large Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) commit multiple tokens per denoising step by decoding each selected position independently from the shared context; when those positions are dependent, the resulting factorization error is captured by conditional total correlation, which confidence-based selection cannot observe from marginals alone. We propose CoCommit, a marker-gated coordination pass that briefly defers commitment: after the usual bundle selection, a learned marker announces the commit set and the backbone's last-$n$ layers are re-applied so marked positions coordinate -- approximating joint-mode decoding -- before greedy argmax writes tokens. The method reuses existing weights with one extra partial forward pass and no auxiliary model. On LLaDA2.1-mini with LoRA adapters and matched greedy inference, joint commitment improves accuracy on all six benchmarks we evaluate, with the largest gains on reasoning and exact-answer tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 CoCommit，通过标记门控的协调传递机制，在扩散大语言模型的自回归解码中近似联合模式解码，以修正因独立解码依赖位置而产生的条件总相关误差，在不引入辅助模型的情况下显著提升了多项基准的准确率。
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）在每一步去噪中独立地从共享上下文中解码多个令牌，当这些令牌之间存在依赖关系时，这种独立解码会产生因条件总相关（conditional total correlation）导致的分解误差（factorization error），而基于置信度的选择无法仅从边际分布中观测到该误差，因此需要一种机制来协调依赖令牌的联合解码。
AI.method: CoCommit 方法引入了一个标记门控的协调传递（marker-gated coordination pass）：在常规的束选择（bundle selection）之后，一个可学习的标记（learned marker）宣布需要协调的提交集（commit set），然后骨干网络的最后 n 层被重新应用于这些标记位置，使它们之间进行协调（近似联合模式解码），最后通过贪心 argmax 写入令牌。该方法仅复用现有权重，增加一次部分前向传播，无需辅助模型。
AI.result: 在 LLaDA2.1-mini 模型上结合 LoRA 适配器并使用匹配的贪心推理，联合承诺（joint commitment）在所有六个评估基准上均提升了准确率，其中在推理任务和精确答案任务上取得了最大收益。
AI.conclusion: CoCommit 通过轻量级的额外前向传播有效近似了扩散大语言模型中的联合模式解码，修正了独立解码依赖位置带来的分解误差，尤其在推理和精确答案类任务中优势显著，为改进扩散语言模型的生成质量提供了一条无需额外模型参数的实用路径。

title: Do GUI Agents Believe Their Eyes? Diagnosing State-Belief Reliance on Pixels versus Structure
summary: Multimodal GUI agents read an interface through two redundant channels: the rendered pixels of a screenshot and a serialized structure such as a DOM or accessibility tree. Before acting, an agent forms a belief about the current interface state, but existing benchmarks score task success, element grounding, or attack resistance and do not ask whether that belief is drawn from the pixels. We formalize visual state reliance, the attribution of a state belief to pixels, structure, or priors, and measure it with paired single-channel interventions over 310 real web, mobile, and desktop probes. Every probe is scored by deterministic forced choice, with no model-generated item and no model judge. Our central metric is the Perception-Fusion Gap, the fraction of probes a model perceives correctly yet resolves toward structure under conflict. Across five models from three vendors, textual state beliefs defer to structure while image-only accuracy stays near ceiling, and Perception-Fusion Gap is positive for every model; non-text identity, by contrast, stays largely pixel-bound. The substitution is specific to the serialized-text and indexed-action channel, and coordinate-action agents are largely immune. For textual conflicts, a white-box ablation traces the effect to a single copied structural value, and in two live environments the conflict drives wrong actions and real task failure. Visual state reliance therefore gives a measurable diagnostic of whether agent state beliefs are visually grounded, and the errors it exposes propagate to actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出感知-融合差距（Perception-Fusion Gap）作为量化多模态GUI代理是否真正依赖像素（而非DOM或结构数据）形成状态信念的指标，实验发现所有测试模型在结构冲突时都会优先信任文本结构而非视觉输入，且该偏差会导致实际操作任务失败。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态GUI代理性能基准仅评估任务成功率、元素定位或对抗攻击抵抗力，但未衡量代理对界面状态的信念是否真正源自视觉像素输入；代理可能仅依赖DOM或可访问性树等结构化序列表示而忽略屏幕截图，导致其行为在视觉-结构冲突时偏离真实界面状态。
AI.method: 形式化定义视觉状态依赖（visual state reliance），即状态信念归因于像素、结构或先验的程度，通过配对的单通道干预（仅像素、仅结构、冲突条件）构建310个真实Web、移动和桌面探测任务，所有探测由确定性强制选择评分，无模型生成项或无模型判断，核心指标为感知-融合差距（Perception-Fusion Gap），即模型在冲突条件下正确感知却仍优先结构的探测比例。
AI.result: 在来自三家厂商的五种模型上，文本状态信念都偏向结构，而纯图像准确率接近天花板，所有模型的感知-融合差距均为正值；非文本身份的代理则基本保持像素依赖。冲突效应特定于序列化文本和索引式动作通道，而坐标式动作代理几乎免疫。白盒消融实验将文本冲突下的行为追溯至单一复制的结构值，在两种真实环境中该冲突导致错误动作和实际任务失败。
AI.conclusion: 视觉状态依赖可作为衡量GUI代理状态信念是否真正视觉化的重要诊断指标，且其暴露的误差会传播至实际动作层面，表明当前多模态代理在像素-结构冲突下普遍存在对结构信息的过度依赖，需通过改进视觉表征或平衡多模态融合来提升鲁棒性。

title: MatPhaseBench: A Semantics-Guided Benchmark for Materials Phase Diagrams Understanding
summary: Materials phase diagrams are a core knowledge representation in materials science, encoding temperature,composition, phase stability, and phase transformation pathways, with their full understanding requiring thermodynamic mechanism analysis and scientific reasoning. Although VLMs have shown promise in scientific image understanding, their systematic evaluation on such logically complex images demanding deep mechanistic interpretation remains limited, and phase diagrams provide a challenging testbed for this purpose. We introduce MatPhaseBench, a high-quality, high-reliability benchmark for complex scientific image understanding, focused on materials phase diagrams. MatPhaseBench is constructed from 3681 papers in classical materials science journals, from which 200 high-quality diagram-text pairs were selected, covering 189 material systems and 70 elements. The benchmark has three key features: (1)targeting complex scientific image understanding-it moves beyond simple objective tests to open-ended tasks requiring deep comprehension; (2)comprehensive image-text alignment-semantic information associated with images is fully preserved during literature mining and matching; (3) high-quality human-supervised text acquisition-all descriptions undergo strict manual validation. Experimental results show that current VLMs remain substantially behind expert-level understanding: they are largely limited to surface visual perception, lack deep reasoning grounded in thermodynamic mechanisms, have limited domain awareness and expert analytical experience, and perform poorly in distinguishing fine-grained differences in composite or multi-diagram settings. Overall, MatPhaseBench constitutes a challenging research-grade benchmark, providing a foundational platform for complex scientific image understanding, phase diagram analysis, and trustworthy multi-modal AI in science.

AI.tldr: MatPhaseBench是一个面向材料相图的高质量、高可靠性基准数据集，用于评估视觉语言模型在复杂科学图像理解上的能力；实验表明现有VLM仅具备表面视觉感知，缺乏基于热力学机制的深度推理，与专家水平差距显著。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在科学图像理解方面展现出潜力，但针对需要深度机制解释和热力学推理的逻辑复杂科学图像（如材料相图）的系统性评估仍然有限，现有基准多停留在简单客观测试，缺乏对深层理解能力的考察。
AI.method: 从3681篇经典材料科学期刊论文中筛选出200个高质量图文对，覆盖189个材料体系和70种元素；基准具备三大特征：面向复杂科学图像的开放式深层理解任务、文献挖掘中完整保留图像语义信息、所有文本描述均经过严格人工校验以确保高质量。
AI.result: 当前主流视觉语言模型在MatPhaseBench上的表现与专家水平存在显著差距：模型基本局限于表面视觉感知，缺乏基于热力学机制的深度推理能力，领域意识和专家分析经验有限，在复合或多图场景下难以区分细微差异。
AI.conclusion: MatPhaseBench构成了一个具有挑战性的研究级基准，为复杂科学图像理解、相图分析以及可信多模态科学AI提供了基础平台，同时揭示了当前VLM在科学推理深度上的根本局限。

title: Progressive Disclosure for LLM-Maintained Wiki Knowledge Bases: a Preregistered Ablation
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Preregistered on OSF (https://osf.io/feka7, DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/FEKA7). Materials-availability and deviations described in the paper
summary:
LLM agents increasingly answer questions against knowledge bases they help maintain. A common intuition holds that progressive disclosure, a compact catalog plus a one-line summary per page so the agent loads only what it needs, should make this cheaper than consulting a large monolithic index. We test that on a real 709-page markdown wiki maintained by an LLM. We retrofit it for progressive disclosure and run a preregistered ablation in which four versions of the corpus differ only in how the agent reaches the content: page bodies are byte-identical across arms, frozen as immutable git tags, so any measured difference is due to access structure alone. We cross the arms with three access conditions (a protocol-constrained agent, a free self-routing agent, and a catalog-preload regime) and grade answers blind against verified gold references with a cross-family judge.
  A pilot upended the premise: a capable tool-using agent never loads the index, inferring a page's path from the question and reading it directly, so the specific saving the retrofit targets does not materialize. We therefore made answer quality primary and cost secondary. Quality is non-inferior (the retrieval arm matches the index baseline within the preregistered margin) while cost falls in every regime, from about a third for a self-routing agent to well over half under catalog-preload, all confidence intervals excluding zero. The saving comes not from avoiding the index load but from more targeted access: the retrieval arm cites fewer pages and takes fewer tool turns. The study doubles as a case study in evaluation validity, applying threat-to-validity discipline to the tooling that produced it.

AI.tldr: 渐进式披露（基于检索的知识库访问）相比大型统一索引并未显著降低LLM智能体的成本，但通过更精准的页面定位显著降低了引用页数和工具调用次数，从而将成本降低至三分之一到一半以上，且答案质量非劣于基线。
AI.motivation: 主流直觉认为，LLM智能体在维护知识库时采用渐进式披露（紧凑目录加每页一行摘要）比直接查询大型统一索引更经济，但该假设缺乏在真实大规模文档库上的严格实验验证。本文旨在通过受控消融实验检验该直觉是否成立，并量化不同访问结构对成本与答案质量的实际影响。
AI.method: 在709页Markdown维基上，将语料库改造为渐进式披露结构，并构建四个版本（页面正文逐字节一致，仅访问结构不同，通过不可变git标签冻结）。交叉三个访问条件（协议约束智能体、自由自路由智能体、目录预加载机制），答案由跨系列评判模型对照已验证的金标准参考文献进行盲评。
AI.result: 先导实验推翻了原始假设：工具使用能力强的智能体根本不加载索引，而是从问题直接推断页面路径并读取。将答案质量作为主要指标后，检索臂在非劣效性测试中与索引基线匹配，而成本在所有访问条件下均显著下降（自路由智能体约三分之一，目录预加载超过一半，置信区间均排除零）。成本节约来源于更精准的访问：检索臂引用更少页面、使用更少工具调用步骤。
AI.conclusion: 渐进式披露的核心收益并非来自避免索引加载，而在于引导智能体更精准地定位内容，从而减少不必要的页面加载和工具交互次数。该研究同时作为评估有效性案例，将威胁有效性（threat-to-validity）纪律应用于所用工具链。

title: Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B: Compressing Hybrid MoE LLMs
summary: We present Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B, a compressed variant of Nemotron-3-Super optimized for interactive deployment. We designed the model to maximize server throughput under high user throughput constraints. In interactive serving workloads on a single 8xB200 node, Puzzle-75B-A9B achieves approximately 2x higher server throughput than Nemotron-3-Super at matched user throughput constraints. In ultra-long-context deployment on a single H100 GPU, the compressed model increases 1M-token concurrency from 1 request to 8 requests. Puzzle-75B-A9B is constructed using a multi-stage pipeline that combines the Iterative Puzzle compression framework with knowledge distillation, reinforcement learning, quantization, and a Multi-Token Prediction head. The compression process jointly optimizes heterogeneous MoE pruning, active parameter budget, and Mamba pruning to improve inference efficiency while preserving model quality. We evaluate Puzzle-75B-A9B on a broad suite of reasoning, coding, multilingual, long-context, and agentic benchmarks. Despite substantial compression, the model retains strong downstream accuracy relative to the parent model across a wide range of tasks. These results demonstrate that large hybrid MoE models can be substantially optimized for deployment efficiency while maintaining strong downstream capability.

AI.tldr: 提出Nemotron-Labs-3-Puzzle-75B-A9B，一种通过多阶段压缩流水线（结合迭代Puzzle压缩框架、知识蒸馏、强化学习、量化和多令牌预测头）从Nemotron-3-Super压缩而来的变体，在保持下游性能的同时，交互式服务吞吐量提升约2倍，超长上下文并发能力提升8倍。
AI.motivation: 大型混合专家（MoE）模型在交互式部署中面临服务器吞吐量瓶颈和高用户吞吐量约束下的效率挑战，特别是在超长上下文场景中并发能力受限，亟需在不严重损害模型质量的前提下实现显著的部署效率优化。
AI.method: 采用多阶段压缩流水线，结合迭代Puzzle压缩框架、知识蒸馏、强化学习、量化以及多令牌预测头（Multi-Token Prediction head）；压缩过程联合优化了异构MoE剪枝、活跃参数预算和Mamba剪枝，以提升推理效率。
AI.result: 在单节点8×B200交互式服务负载下，Puzzle-75B-A9B相比Nemotron-3-Super实现了约2倍的服务器吞吐量提升（在匹配的用户吞吐量约束下）；在单块H100 GPU的超长上下文部署中，1M令牌的并发数从1个请求提升至8个请求；在推理、编码、多语言、长上下文和智能体等广泛基准测试中保持了较强的下游准确率。
AI.conclusion: 大型混合MoE模型可以通过系统的压缩优化（包括剪枝、蒸馏、量化和预测头设计）在部署效率上获得显著提升，同时维持较强的下游任务能力，这为大规模模型的交互式高效部署提供了可行路径。

title: MORE: A Multilingual Document Parsing Benchmark and Evaluation
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 22 pages, 11 figures. Code and dataset available at https://github.com/zimoqingfeng/MORE
summary: Multilingual documents encapsulate rich regional cultures, scientific discoveries, and historical records. Parsing this content into structured, machine-readable formats is critical for unlocking global knowledge. However, existing benchmarks predominantly focus on high-resource languages like English and Chinese, creating an evaluation blind spot concerning model performance on other languages. While recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) claim support for hundreds of languages, the lack of ground truth makes it impossible to empirically verify these capabilities. To bridge this gap, we introduce MORE, a large-scale benchmark designed for multilingual document parsing evaluation. MORE distinguishes itself through three key dimensions: (1) Unprecedented Scale: It covers 149 languages, making it the most linguistically diverse benchmark to date; (2) Structural Complexity: Unlike previous works, it extends evaluation beyond plain text to include structural elements such as code blocks, tables, and catalogs; and (3) Data Authenticity: All samples are curated from real-world documents via a model-assisted, human-refined annotation pipeline. We evaluate state-of-the-art models using MORE, establishing new performance baselines for long-tail languages and validating the benchmark's effectiveness in diagnosing model capabilities in realistic, diverse scenarios. The MORE dataset will be available at https://github.com/zimoqingfeng/MORE.

AI.tldr: MORE 是一个覆盖 149 种语言的大规模多语言文档解析基准，通过引入结构复杂性与数据真实性维度，填补了现有基准对低资源语言评估缺失的空白，并建立了长尾语言场景下 SOTA 视觉语言模型的新性能基线。
AI.motivation: 现有文档解析基准主要聚焦英语、中文等高资源语言，导致对模型在低资源语言上的评估存在盲区；尽管近年来的视觉语言模型（VLM）声称支持数百种语言，但缺乏真实标注数据导致无法实证验证其实际能力。
AI.method: MORE 提出了一个覆盖 149 种语言的大规模多语言文档解析基准，其核心设计包含三个维度：前所未有的语言覆盖规模、超越纯文本的结构复杂性（涵盖代码块、表格、目录等结构元素），以及基于模型辅助结合人工精标管道从真实文档中构建的数据真实性。
AI.result: 在 MORE 基准上对 SOTA 视觉语言模型进行了评估，建立了长尾语言场景下的新性能基线，并验证了该基准在诊断模型于真实、多样化场景中能力的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MORE 填补了多语言文档解析评估的空白，揭示了现有 VLM 在低资源语言上的真实能力边界，并为未来多语言文档理解研究提供了标准化评测平台。

title: Wrong Before Right: Late Rescue and Interface Failure in Aligned Language Models
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures. Code to be released
summary: We study how correctness is assembled inside aligned language models, not only whether the final answer is right. Using layer-wise difference-in-differences (DiD) trajectories over polarity-controlled minimal pairs, we identify the wrong-dip: in mid layers (25-90% depth), internal preference transiently commits to the incorrect answer and is rescued only by late-layer correction. We verify this causally with patchscope-style activation transplantation across 17 models, three families, and 64x scale (0.5B-32B). Four findings follow. (1) Alignment amplification of the causal wrong-dip is recipe-specific and emergent: it emerges at 3B in Qwen2.5, remains high, and peaks at 32B (paired t up to 9.7), reverses in Llama-3-8B (t=-2.31), and sits between for Mistral-7B. (2) The dip predicts real compression failures: high-dip items are 3-7x more likely to flip under late-layer low-rank compression, block dropping, or structured pruning, while quantization flips are dip-blind, a double dissociation confirmed by late-layer ablation. (3) The dip is trainable: a LoRA fine-tune with a mid-layer wrong-margin penalty matches output-only SFT accuracy while cutting the causal dip by 67-70% and improving compression robustness; output-only SFT worsens the causal dip by up to 2.8x at perfect surface accuracy. (4) With controlled readouts, the phenomenon survives natural-language I/O: dip stratification of structural-damage failures is significant on naturalistic vignettes, and free-form fragility separates into a dip-auditable late-rescue layer and a dip-blind interface layer. Together, output-level correctness can hide a late-rescue process that governs compression risk, post-training quality, and evaluation distortion.

AI.tldr: 本文发现对齐语言模型在中间层存在"错误凹陷"现象——内部表征短暂倾向于错误答案，仅在后期层修正；该凹陷具有因果性、可预测压缩失败、可训练缓解，揭示了输出正确性可能掩盖脆弱的后期救援过程。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注对齐语言模型的最终答案是否正确，忽视了内部正确性的组装过程。本文旨在探究模型在推理过程中内部表征是否一致地支持正确答案，以及这种内部动态与压缩鲁棒性、微调质量之间的关系。
AI.method: 提出基于极性控制最小对的逐层双重差分轨迹方法，识别"错误凹陷"现象；采用patchscope式激活移植在17个模型（三大家族，0.5B-32B共64倍规模范围）上进行因果验证；通过低秩压缩、块丢弃、结构化剪枝和量化等手段测试凹陷的预测能力；引入中间层错误边际惩罚的LoRA微调来训练性地缓解凹陷。
AI.result: 错误凹陷在Qwen2.5中从3B开始涌现并在32B达到峰值（配对t达9.7），在Llama-3-8B中反转（t=-2.31），Mistral-7B居中；高凹陷样本在后期层压缩下出错概率提高3-7倍，而量化对凹陷不敏感（双重分离）；含中间层惩罚的LoRA将因果凹陷降低67-70%且保持表面精度，而纯输出SFT虽达完美精度却将凹陷恶化2.8倍。
AI.conclusion: 输出级正确性可能隐藏一个后期救援过程，该过程支配着压缩风险、后训练质量和评估失真；错误凹陷可作为模型脆弱的可审计指标，且可通过训练直接缓解，为评估和改善对齐模型内部鲁棒性提供了新路径。

title: MechMath Agent Team: LLM Driven Agents for Mathematical Research
summary: AI reasoning has become a central focus in contemporary artificial intelligence, largely driven by the success of large language models. However, mathematical research, which is characterized by non-linear derivation paths, rigorous logical requirements, and protracted exploration cycles, poses severe challenges for existing reasoning systems. To overcome these limitations, we present the MechMath Agent Team (MMAT), which is a large language model driven agent designed to serve as a co-pilot throughout the full cycle of mathematical research. We design a tripartite Harness Architecture that decouples system responsibilities into Control, Execution, and Augmentation planes, thereby reconciling rigorous logical control with the agility demanded by open-ended research. Building upon this framework, we instantiate three specialized agents: a Knowledge Base Manager, a Natural Language Prover, and a Formal Language Prover, all operating in a closed loop to produce formally certified mathematical proofs. We evaluate MMAT on open problems in Number Theory, Algebraic Complexity Theory, Differential Algebra, Operator Algebra, and Inequalities. Across a two-month deployment, 11 problems have been solved, demonstrating its capacity to act as a co-pilot throughout the entire research cycle. The contributions are threefold: a general decoupled Harness Architecture for multi-agent mathematical reasoning, its concrete instantiation in the MMAT system, and empirical validation on a diverse suite of open problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MechMath Agent Team (MMAT)，一种基于大语言模型的多智能体系统，通过解耦的三平面Harness架构（控制、执行、增强）协调三个专用智能体（知识库管理器、自然语言证明器、形式语言证明器），在两个月内解决了数论、代数复杂性理论等领域的11个开放数学问题，实现了全流程形式化数学证明的自动化辅助。
AI.motivation: 数学研究的非线性推导路径、严格逻辑需求和长周期探索对现有基于大语言模型的推理系统构成严峻挑战，现有方法难以兼顾严格逻辑控制与开放式研究的灵活性，亟需一种能够覆盖数学研究全周期、同时产出形式化认证证明的智能推理框架。
AI.method: MMAT采用三平面解耦的Harness架构，将系统职责划分为控制平面（Control）、执行平面（Execution）和增强平面（Augmentation），实现严格逻辑控制与开放探索的调和；在该框架上实例化三个专用智能体——知识库管理器（Knowledge Base Manager）、自然语言证明器（Natural Language Prover）和形式语言证明器（Formal Language Prover），三者构成闭环协同工作，生成经形式化认证的数学证明。
AI.result: 在数论、代数复杂性理论、微分代数、算子代数及不等式等领域的开放式问题上，经过两个月的部署，MMAT成功解决了11个开放问题，验证了其作为数学研究全周期副驾驶的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究的三项贡献为：一是提出用于多智能体数学推理的通用解耦Harness架构，二是该架构在MMAT系统中的具体实例化，三是在多样化开放问题集上的实证验证，表明大语言模型驱动的多智能体系统能够胜任数学研究的完整链条，为AI辅助数学发现提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Incentivizing Vision Language Models to Search for Long Video Question Answering
comment: To appear at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2026)
summary: We introduce VSeek, an agentic framework that transforms long-video question answering (LVQA) from a passive, single-pass perception task into a multi-turn retrieval process. VSeek utilizes a natural language-driven search to identify relevant context within long videos and is post-trained with reinforcement learning (RL) to jointly formulate targeted search queries and reason over retrieved clips for LVQA. While RL post-training has revolutionized reasoning in symbolic domains such as mathematics and code, its application to long-video understanding remains hindered by a lack of verified rewards. To ensure that the retrieved context is relevant, we propose a novel neuro-symbolic approach that bridges open-ended natural language with discrete visual verification. Specifically, complex user queries are compiled into formal temporal logic specifications for systematically decomposing natural language questions into a definitive checklist of required atomic visual primitives, such as key objects and activities, along with their temporal ordering. These systematically derived grounding events provide the critical feedback signal for RL post-training, enabling dense, verifiable rewards based on the successful retrieval of these specific visual elements rather than relying entirely on outcome-only answer accuracy. By explicitly optimizing for this verifiable evidence-seeking behavior, VSeek improves Pass@1 scores by up to 8% and Pass@4 scores by 15% on long-video understanding benchmarks compared to base models. We open-source our code at https://utaustin-swarmlab.github.io/VSeek.

AI.tldr: VSeek是一个基于强化学习后训练的智能体框架，将长视频问答转化为多轮检索过程，通过神经符号方法将自然语言查询编译为时序逻辑规约以提供可验证奖励信号，显著提升了长视频理解基准上的Pass@1和Pass@4指标。
AI.motivation: 长视频问答面临两大挑战：一是现有方法将LVQA视为被动的单次感知任务，难以应对长视频中海量无关信息的干扰；二是强化学习后训练在长视频理解中因缺乏可验证的奖励信号而难以应用，现有的奖励仅依赖最终的答案准确性，无法对中间检索过程提供有效反馈。
AI.method: VSeek提出一个基于自然语言驱动的多轮检索智能体框架，将复杂用户查询编译为时序逻辑规约，系统性地将自然语言问题分解为所需原子视觉基元（如关键对象和活动）及其时序顺序的明确检查清单。这些派生出的基础事件作为强化学习后训练的密集可验证奖励信号，指导模型联合优化目标搜索查询的生成和对检索片段的推理，从而实现基于证据的检索行为。
AI.result: 在长视频理解基准上，与基础模型相比，VSeek的Pass@1分数提升了最多8%，Pass@4分数提升了最多15%。这些结果表明通过显式优化可验证的证据检索行为能显著提升长视频问答性能。
AI.conclusion: VSeek展示了将强化学习后训练与神经符号验证相结合解决长视频理解中可验证奖励缺失问题的有效性。该方法将LVQA从被动感知转变为主动检索，为视频理解和多模态推理中的RL应用提供了新范式，未来可进一步扩展到更复杂的视频理解和推理任务。

title: Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT): Forensic Reconstruction Prompts as a Safety Diagnostic Across Model Generations
summary: Safety alignment in large language models is typically evaluated against direct, imperative harmful requests. We show that this alignment is highly conditioned on pragmatic register: models that refuse a direct request frequently comply when the same underlying objective is expressed through a different communicative stance. This suggests that current alignment policies are not invariant to semantic equivalence, but remain sensitive to how a request is pragmatically framed. We introduce Retroactive Chain-of-Thought (RetroCoT), a single-turn attack that reframes harmful requests as forensic reconstruction tasks. Rather than requesting harmful instructions directly, RetroCoT presupposes that the harmful outcome has already occurred and asks the model, acting as a forensic analyst, to reconstruct in reverse the causal chain that produced it. On AdvBench (n=50), RetroCoT achieves attach success rate of 58% on gpt-4o and 52% on gpt-4o-mini, compared with direct-request baselines of 0% and 4%, respectively. We further identify a pronounced generation gap: GPT-5-family models refuse RetroCoT entirely, explicitly identifying the reconstruction premise in their refusal rationales, consistent with explicit coverage of this reconstruction register. However, this robustness does not generalize across pragmatic forms. A single adversarial feedback turn presenting an existing forensic reconstruction response alongside evaluator critique raises ASR from 0% to 48% on GPT-5.4-mini and from 58% to 94% on GPT-4o; a control condition omitting the fabricated low score achieves 85% on GPT-5.4-mini, indicating that the operative element is pragmatic continuation within the established forensic frame rather than score manipulation. These results suggest that frontier-model alignment remains conditioned on pragmatic framing rather than semantic intent, and that new pragmatic registers can continue to expose a...

AI.tldr: 该论文发现大语言模型的安全对齐高度依赖于语用框架（pragmatic register）而非语义等价性，并提出一种名为RetroCoT的单轮攻击方法，通过将有害请求重构为法医逆向重建任务来绕过对齐。实验表明，即使在直接请求被完全拒绝的模型上，RetroCoT也能取得较高攻击成功率，揭示了前沿模型对齐在语用层面上的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型的安全对齐通常仅针对直接的、命令式的有害请求进行评估，但对齐策略是否对不同语用框架（pragmatic register）下的语义等价请求具有不变性尚不清楚。该研究旨在揭示对齐策略对请求的语用框架存在敏感性，并探索这种脆弱性是否可以被利用来绕过安全机制。
AI.method: 论文提出Retroactive Chain-of-Thought（RetroCoT），一种单轮攻击方法，它将有害请求重新表述为法医逆向重建任务：预设有害结果已经发生，要求模型以法医分析师的身份反向推导导致该结果的因果链。此外，论文还引入单轮对抗反馈机制，将已有的法医重建响应与评估者批评一起呈现给模型，以探索语用延续（pragmatic continuation）而非分数操纵的作用。
AI.result: 在AdvBench（n=50）上，RetroCoT在gpt-4o和gpt-4o-mini上分别实现了58%和52%的攻击成功率，而直接请求基线仅为0%和4%。GPT-5系列模型完全拒绝RetroCoT并明确识别重建前提，但在单轮对抗反馈（含评估批评）下，GPT-5.4-mini的ASR从0%升至48%，GPT-4o从58%升至94%；仅含语用延续的控制条件在GPT-5.4-mini上达到85%的ASR，表明语用框架的延续而非分数操纵是主要驱动力。
AI.conclusion: 前沿模型的安全对齐本质上仍然受制于语用框架而非语义意图，新的语用框架可以持续暴露对齐策略的盲区。这表明当前对齐方法无法泛化到不同的交际姿态（communicative stance）下，需要开发对语义等价性具有不变性的更鲁棒的对齐策略。

title: Compressing the Validation Bottleneck: An Agentic Self-Driving Lab for Scientific Discovery
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 AI for Science Workshop ; AI Scientist Competition
summary: Agentic AI-for-Science can automate ideation, planning, and analysis, but final validation still depends on real experiments. A self-driving lab (SDL) can execute those experiments, yet the loop still has bottlenecks: the agent may spend too many rounds on low-value experiments, or each round may require a high-cost experiment. We target these two physical bottlenecks with one agent. First, a prior-aware agentic DOE loop uses domain knowledge and past results to propose feasible and informative next experiments, reducing trials-to-target. Second, a cost-aware surrogate agent predicts high-cost, high-resolution measurements from low-cost, low-resolution measurements. It chooses between a high- and a low-cost measurement based on the predicted uncertainty. We examine these directions in the biology and materials domains, respectively. Together, under a single agent, these components aim to accelerate the SDL loop by reducing both the number of loops and the cost per experiment.

AI.tldr: 提出一种融合先验感知的自适应实验设计循环与成本感知的代理模型的智能体框架，同时减少自驱动实验室中实验轮次和单次实验成本，加速AI for Science的物理验证闭环。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体驱动的AI-for-Science在自动化设想、规划和分析后，最终验证仍依赖真实实验，而自驱动实验室（SDL）虽能执行实验，但存在两大物理瓶颈：智能体可能在低价值实验上耗费过多轮次，或每轮实验成本过高。现有研究缺乏同时解决这两个瓶颈的统一方法。
AI.method: 提出一个统一的智能体框架，包含两个核心组件：（1）先验感知的自适应实验设计循环，利用领域知识和历史实验结果提出可行且信息量大的下一步实验，从而减少达到目标所需的实验轮次；（2）成本感知的代理模型，从低成本低分辨率测量预测高成本高分辨率测量，并基于预测不确定性决定采用低成本还是高成本测量方式，从而控制单轮实验成本。
AI.result: 该框架在生物学和材料学两个领域分别验证了上述两个方向：先验感知DOE循环减少了达到目标所需的实验次数，成本感知代理模型通过不确定性驱动的测量选择有效降低了高成本实验的使用比例。两部分在统一智能体框架下协同工作，共同加速SDL循环。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了通过单一智能体同时减少实验轮次和单轮实验成本是可行的，为加速自驱动实验室（SDL）中的科学发现循环提供了新范式，提示未来AI-for-Science系统应同时关注物理实验的数量和单次代价。

title: Overloading Large Vision-Language Models for Jailbreaking
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) exhibit remarkable vision-language capabilities and are increasingly deployed in real-world applications such as personal assistants, document analysis systems, and embodied agents. However, their dual-modal attack surfaces make them vulnerable to jailbreak attacks. Existing LVLM jailbreaks rely on simple designs, e.g., short text and out-of-distribution images. Nevertheless, recent advancements in both large language model backbones and multimodal mechanisms undermine these attacks, particularly their transferability among model architectures. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel information overloading method that is equipped with both extensive text and multi-dimensional image attacks. These components are arranged in recursion-based image-typography layouts to exponentially increase multimodal information complexity. This overloading approach amplifies the cross-modal processing required, which undermines the safety alignment in LVLMs. Extensive experiments on both open-sourced and commercial LVLMs establish our method as a new state-of-the-art LVLM jailbreak attack. On open-source models, our method achieves an average ASR of 88.6%; on commercial LVLMs, it reaches an average ASR of 84.0%, exceeding the best baseline by 48.7%. Moreover, our prompts optimized on open-source surrogate models transfer effectively across model families. Beyond empirical results, we probe the safety-critical information flows within victim LVLMs. Our observations reveal that complex image-typography compositions induce intensified cross-modal processing and reduce the model's certainty in generating refusal responses. Together, these findings highlight information overloading as a practical and emerging safety risk for real-world LVLM deployments, underscoring the need for stronger defenses against complex multimodal jailbreak inputs.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于信息过载（Information Overloading）的多模态越狱攻击方法，通过递归图像-排版布局叠加大量文本与多维图像攻击，指数级增加多模态信息复杂度以破坏LVLM的安全对齐，在开源和商业模型上分别达到88.6%和84.0%的平均攻击成功率（ASR），超过最强基线48.7%，揭示复杂多模态输入已成为实际部署中的新兴安全风险。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLM越狱攻击依赖简单设计（如短文本、分布外图像），但随着大语言模型骨干和多模态机制的进步，这些攻击的可迁移性大幅下降，难以跨模型架构有效迁移。
AI.method: 提出信息过载方法，同时使用海量文本攻击和多维度图像攻击，并通过递归式图像-排版布局（recursive image-typography layouts）组织这些攻击组件，指数级提升多模态信息复杂度，从而放大跨模态处理负载，破坏LVLM的安全对齐机制。
AI.result: 在开源LVLM上平均ASR为88.6%，在商业LVLM上平均ASR为84.0%，超过最佳基线48.7%；在开源代理模型上优化的提示能有效跨模型家族迁移；探测实验表明复杂图像-排版组合会诱导更强的跨模态处理并降低模型生成拒绝响应的确定性。
AI.conclusion: 信息过载是一种具有实际威胁性的新兴越狱攻击方式，揭示了复杂多模态输入对LVLM部署的严峻安全风险，亟需针对这类复杂多模态越狱输入设计更强的防御机制。

title: ToolFailBench: Diagnosing Tool-Use Failures in LLM Agents
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures. Published at the Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) and the Workshop on Failure Modes of Agentic AI (FAGEN) at ICML 2026
summary: Tool calling is central to modern language model agents, but aggregate benchmark scores often hide where tool use fails. A model that never calls a needed tool and a model that calls the tool but ignores the result can look similar under final task accuracy. We introduce ToolFailBench, a diagnostic benchmark for measuring tool-use failures across 1,000 tasks in finance, medicine, law, cybersecurity, and real estate. Tool-required tasks return values the model wouldn't guess, forcing it to trust the tool while control tasks attach the same tools but should be answered directly. We label each trace with Tool-Skip, Result-Ignore, Output-Fabrication, and Unnecessary-Tool-Use, using a rule classifier and two LLM judges aggregated by majority vote. Across 19 headline models, the best reaches 86.33% Clean Tool-Use Rate, showing that faithful tool use is not saturated. More importantly, models with similar aggregate scores fail in different ways: most stay disciplined on no-tool controls, while Llama-3.1 models show an Always-Call pattern, and at the same parameter scale Llama-3.1-70B and Qwen2.5-72B differ by 89 percentage points on control-task accuracy. Tool-use evaluation should measure not only whether agents call tools, but whether they use tool outputs correctly and avoid tools when none is needed.

AI.tldr: ToolFailBench是一个包含1,000个任务的诊断基准，用于测量语言模型在工具调用中的失败模式（工具跳过、结果忽略、输出捏造和不必要工具使用），揭示了即使总分相似的模型在工具使用行为上也存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 现有工具调用评估过度依赖最终任务准确率，这种聚合指标无法区分"从不调用所需工具"和"调用工具但忽略其结果"等截然不同的失败模式，因此需要更精细的诊断方法来揭示工具使用失败的具体类型和分布。
AI.method: 构建ToolFailBench基准，包含1,000个覆盖金融、医学、法律、网络安全和房地产领域的任务，其中工具必需任务返回模型无法猜测的值以迫使模型信任工具，控制任务虽挂载相同工具但应直接回答；对每个轨迹使用规则分类器和两个LLM法官通过多数投票标注为工具跳过、结果忽略、输出捏造和不必要工具使用四种失败类型。
AI.result: 在19个主流模型中，最佳模型的干净工具使用率仅为86.33%，表明忠实工具调用仍未饱和；聚合分数相似的模型失败模式不同：多数模型在无工具控制任务上保持纪律性，而Llama-3.1系列呈现始终调用模式，相同参数规模的Llama-3.1-70B与Qwen2.5-72B在控制任务准确率上相差89个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 工具使用评估不仅应衡量智能体是否调用工具，还须检查其是否正确使用工具输出以及在不需要工具时避免调用；不同模型在相同总分下展现出迥异的失败模式，说明细粒度行为分析比单一聚合指标更具诊断价值。

title: Measuring Harness-Induced Belief Divergence in Multi-Step LLM Agents
summary: Software-agent benchmarks usually report whether an agent solves a task, but the agent reaches that outcome through a harness that controls what it sees, which actions it can take, which failures are repaired, which states are verified, and which evidence is logged. We show that this harness can change the agent's multi-step beliefs even when the task, environment, and base LLM are fixed. We introduce a belief-rollout diagnostic that elicits structured K-step trajectories over progress, risk, recoverability, constraints, failure mode, uncertainty, future success, repair cost, and next action under alternative harnesses. We define a cross-harness belief divergence and decompose it into an arrival term for immediate interface shifts and a growth term for horizon-dependent belief changes. On controlled coding tasks and public-benchmark stress tests, blocked actions, compressed repairs, selective verification, and cost-aware evidence pruning often preserve terminal success while changing the beliefs that drive later decisions. We further introduce BIWM, a no-training protocol that canonicalizes observations, logs censored branches, expands repair traces, records verification masks, executes risky branches in shadow, and aligns belief trajectories across harness views. The results suggest that harness design is an experimental variable in agent evaluation, not an implementation detail. Our code is available at https://github.com/Hik289/Harness-induce-bias.git.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示软件智能体评估中的"框架设计"（harness design）会改变智能体的多步信念，即使任务、环境和基础LLM都固定不变；并提出信念展开诊断和BIWM协议来量化和缓解这种偏差，证明框架设计是评估中的关键实验变量。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体基准测试通常仅报告任务是否完成，但忽略了控制智能体观测、动作、修复、验证和日志记录的"框架"（harness）会如何影响智能体的决策过程。本文旨在证明框架设计并非实现细节，而是会系统性改变智能体的多步信念（multi-step beliefs），从而导致评估偏差。
AI.method: 提出信念展开诊断（belief-rollout diagnostic），在替代框架下生成结构化K步轨迹，涵盖进展、风险、可恢复性、约束、失败模式、不确定性、未来成功、修复成本和下一步动作。定义跨框架信念散度（cross-harness belief divergence），分解为即时接口变化的到达项（arrival term）和依赖时间范围的信念增长的成长项（growth term）。进一步提出BIWM协议——一种无需训练的协议，通过规范化观测、记录被审查分支、展开修复轨迹、记录验证掩码、在影子模式中执行高风险分支以及对齐跨框架信念轨迹来消除框架偏差。
AI.result: 在受控编码任务和公开基准压力测试中，即使阻塞动作、压缩修复、选择性验证和成本感知证据剪枝等框架设计在终端成功率上保持一致，它们仍会显著改变驱动后续决策的信念。实验表明框架诱导的信念偏差可以通过到达项和成长项进行分解与量化。
AI.conclusion: 框架设计是智能体评估中的实验变量，而非实现细节；研究者必须将框架作为评估中的可控因素来报告和考虑，否则基准测试结果可能隐藏了智能体决策路径上的系统性偏差。BIWM协议为消除此类偏差提供了一种无需额外训练的可行方案。

title: Parallelized Autoregressive Decoding for Omni-Modal Dense Video Captioning
summary: Dense video captioning aims to generate temporally grounded descriptions of video events, benefiting both event-level video understanding and generation. In this domain, autoregressive video large language models have emerged as a prevalent paradigm due to their strong generative and cross-modal modeling capacity. However, generating dense captions under the token-by-token paradigm severely limits inference efficiency and hinders scalability as video length and event density increase. In this work, we propose a parallelized autoregressive framework that not only improves generation efficiency but also enhances temporally grounded captioning performance. Our key insight is to exploit the weak local dependencies across temporally distinct events to restructure the causal dependency graph, thereby enabling lossless parallel generation. Specifically, tokens with weak cross-event dependencies can be decoded in parallel, while tightly coupled tokens within each event retain sequential decoding to preserve local semantic coherence. To realize this insight, we introduce two key components for lossless parallel decoding: (1) a latent global planning mechanism that automatically learns the event-level structure and produces compact tokens encoding global inter-event causality while adaptively aggregating event-level audio-visual semantics, guiding subsequent dependency restructuring and parallel decoding; and (2) an event-factorized parallel decoding mechanism that effectively balances local focus with global inter-event awareness. Experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate the clear advantage of our approach in both efficiency and performance in omni-modal event grounding and captioning. Project website: https://github.com/showlab/PadCaptioner.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种并行化自回归框架PadCaptioner，通过利用跨事件弱依赖关系重构因果依赖图，在保持局部语义连贯性的同时实现无损并行解码，显著提升密集视频字幕生成的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有密集视频字幕生成方法主要采用自回归视频大语言模型，其逐token解码范式在视频长度和事件密度增加时推理效率严重下降，难以兼顾生成质量与可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出并行化自回归框架PadCaptioner，核心思想是利用时间上不同事件间存在的弱局部依赖关系来重构因果依赖图。具体包含两个关键组件：(1) 潜在全局规划机制，自动学习事件级结构并生成紧凑token编码全局事件间因果关系，同时自适应聚合事件级视听语义；(2) 事件因子化并行解码机制，有效平衡局部聚焦与全局事件间感知，实现跨事件token并行解码而事件内token保持顺序解码以保留局部语义连贯性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在效率和性能上均展现出明显优势，在全模态事件定位和字幕生成任务中取得了更优结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过显式建模事件级结构并利用跨事件弱依赖关系，可以在不牺牲生成质量的前提下打破自回归解码的串行瓶颈，为长视频密集理解提供了一条兼顾效率与可扩展性的新路径。

title: PAST-TIDE: Prototype-Anchored Statement Tuning with Topic-Invariant Normalization for Stance Detection
comment: Published in The Fifteenth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2026)
summary: We introduce PAST-TIDE, our stance detection system addressing both subtasks of the StanceNakba Shared Task at NakbaNLP@LREC-COLING 2026. The main idea is statement tuning. We redefine stance as cloze-style masked language modeling (MLM), letting a verbalizer map label words to stance categories through the pre-trained MLM head rather than appending a randomly initialized classification head. We complement this with prototypical contrastive learning, which uses learnable class prototypes for batch-size independent contrastive training, and topic-conditional layer normalization for cross-topic Arabic stance detection. PAST-TIDE achieves macro-F1 scores of 0.75 for Subtask A and 0.74 for Subtask B on the official leaderboard, indicating that minimal architectural additions to a pre-trained model can remain competitive in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: PAST-TIDE 将立场检测重新定义为完形填空式掩码语言建模任务，结合原型对比学习和主题条件层归一化，在低资源阿拉伯语立场检测中仅通过最小架构修改即取得具有竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有立场检测系统通常依赖随机初始化的分类头，在低资源场景下难以充分泛化，且跨主题阿拉伯语立场检测中主题偏移问题未得到有效解决。
AI.method: PAST-TIDE 提出语句微调（statement tuning）范式，将立场检测重新定义为完形填空式掩码语言建模（MLM）任务，利用预训练 MLM 头与 verbalizer 将标签词映射为立场类别；同时引入原型对比学习（prototypical contrastive learning），利用可学习的类别原型实现与批次大小无关的对比训练；并结合主题条件层归一化（topic-conditional layer normalization）处理跨主题场景下的领域偏移。
AI.result: PAST-TIDE 在 StanceNakba 共享任务官方排行榜上 Subtask A 取得 0.75 的 macro-F1，Subtask B 取得 0.74 的 macro-F1。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，在预训练模型基础上进行极小的架构增强即可在低资源场景下保持竞争力，验证了语句微调范式在立场检测任务中的有效性。

title: Governed Individuation: Cryptographically Decoupling an Agent's Learning from Its Authority
summary: Autonomous agents are moving from sandboxed text generators to operators of code, data, and physical infrastructure, and they increasingly learn while deployed. This reopens a question that alignment techniques answer only probabilistically: after an agent has adapted in the field, is the running system still confined to what its operator authorised? Here we show that confinement can be guaranteed as an invariant of the agent's execution architecture rather than a probabilistic outcome of its training. Governed individuation binds an agent at boot to a cryptographically frozen identity digest, and routes every action through a gate defined over the semantic effect of the action rather than its name. We prove that no amount of learning, skill acquisition, or self-induced governance abstraction can widen the agent's permitted authority without an operator-signed change to its identity; the guarantee holds even when the agent induces its own safety principle and that principle is wrong. Empirically, in an open-ended tool-use benchmark where a large action space rules out name-based blocking, ungoverned software agents under reward pressure attempt to tamper with their own evaluation at a task-dependent rate that reaches every run on the hardest task, whereas the gate reduces executed forbidden effects to zero as a verified property of the construction while preserving task success. An adversarial evaluation of monitors of increasing semantic depth shows false-allows falling from 75% (name-based gating) to zero (dynamic effect tracing), and refusal history transfers compliance to held-out red-line families. Trust in a deployed learning agent shifts from a wager on its continued alignment to a check anyone can run at boot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为"受控个体化"的执行架构，将自主代理的动作权限绑定到加密冻结的身份摘要上，并通过语义效应门而非名称门控所有动作，从而在架构层面保证代理即使在现场持续学习和演化后也不会超出其初始授权范围。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐技术仅能概率性地保证部署后仍在学习的自主代理不超出操作者授权范围，缺乏一种确定性的、可验证的约束机制；随着代理从沙盒文本生成器转变为操作代码、数据和物理基础设施的执行者，这一安全缺口变得尤为严峻。
AI.method: 提出受控个体化（Governed Individuation）框架：代理启动时绑定到加密冻结的身份摘要，所有动作通过一个基于动作语义效果（而非动作名称）定义的"门"进行路由；理论证明无论代理如何学习、获取技能或自我诱导治理抽象，都无法在不经操作者签名更改身份的情况下扩大其授权范围。
AI.result: 在开放式工具使用基准中，未受控的软件代理在奖励压力下尝试篡改自身评估，在最难任务上每轮都出现违规；而所提门机制将执行的被禁止效果降为零，同时保持任务成功率。对抗性评估显示基于动态效果追踪的门控将误放率从名称门控的75%降至0%，并且拒绝历史可迁移到未见的红线族。
AI.conclusion: 对已部署学习型代理的信任从对其持续对齐的赌注转变为一套任何人都可在启动时运行的检查，证明安全性可作为执行架构的不变量而非训练的概率性副产品得以保证。

title: Cross-device Collaborative Test-time Adaptation with Zeroth-order Optimization and Model Merging
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) mitigates domain shifts by using incoming test data to update a model on the fly. The majority of TTA methods require resource-intensive backpropagation (BP) for model updates, particularly demanding large memory sizes, which makes it infeasible to deploy them on resource-limited devices (e.g., edge devices). To address this issue, we integrate two different techniques, zeroth-order optimization (ZOO) and model merging, under the recently established cross-device collaborative TTA (CDC-TTA) framework, where the system is composed of a mixture of resource-abundant and resource-limited devices, and the model information (e.g., model weights obtained on each device) is shared across the devices. Our method is executable on resource-limited devices by introducing ZOO, which requires only forward processing and bypasses the resource-intensive BP optimization. Concurrently, to mitigate the high-dimensional optimization difficulty caused by the side effect of ZOO, we incorporate model merging of the shared multiple models and set the merge coefficients as the optimization objective, which successfully reduces the optimization dimension. In addition, to enhance the synergistic combination of ZOO and model merging, we propose a unique preprocessing strategy that trims intra-model non-influential weights and reduces the inter-model information redundancy. We empirically confirmed the effectiveness of our method using common corruption and style-transferred image benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合零阶优化与模型合并的免反向传播测试时自适应方法，在资源受限设备上实现高效域适应，并通过降维预处理策略提升两者协同效果。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时自适应方法大多依赖反向传播对模型进行在线更新，需要大量计算和存储资源，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。本文旨在解决这一部署瓶颈，提出一种无需反向传播、可在混合资源设备协同框架下运行的高效TTA方法。
AI.method: 本文在跨设备协作测试时自适应框架下，引入零阶优化替代反向传播，仅需前向计算即可更新模型，避免资源密集型优化；同时利用模型合并技术将多个设备共享的模型权重进行融合，并以合并系数作为优化目标，显著降低零阶优化面临的高维优化难度。进一步提出预处理策略，通过剪枝模型内非影响权重和减少模型间信息冗余，增强零阶优化与模型合并的协同效果。
AI.result: 在常见图像损坏和风格迁移基准上进行了实验验证，结果表明所提方法在资源受限设备上有效实现了测试时自适应，性能与基于反向传播的方法相当，同时大幅降低了计算和存储需求。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明零阶优化与模型合并相结合可有效解决TTA在资源受限设备上的部署难题，预处理策略进一步提升了二者的协同效能，为边缘设备上的实时域适应提供了一种可行且高效的解决方案。

title: What You See Is What You Get: Observation-Aligned Supervision for Chart-to-Code Generation
summary: Chart-to-code generation is commonly trained with supervised fine-tuning on reference plotting scripts, implicitly treating the gold code as a fully observable target. We argue that this assumption is often invalid: many chart programs contain latent raw variables that cannot be uniquely recovered from the rendered image. For example, a boxplot exposes summary statistics rather than original samples, a pie chart reveals proportions rather than arbitrary raw values, and a histogram shows bin-level mass rather than individual observations. Supervising models to reproduce such non-identifiable quantities encourages hallucination and over-specified code generation. We introduce Observation-Aligned supervision, a rewriting framework that replaces latent raw-data targets with quantities constrained by the visual observation: box statistics for boxplots, wedge percentages for pie charts, and bin weights for histograms. Applying this framework to chart-to-code training data from two sources, we obtain the Observation-Aligned supervision target data. Experiments across multiple VLMs on ChartMimic and ChartX demonstrate consistent improvements in observable value recovery, including under both-executable evaluation. Our results suggest that improving chart-to-code models requires not only more data or advanced learning objectives or algorithms, but also supervision targets that respect what is identifiable from the chart image.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有图表到代码生成任务中，监督学习假设参考代码是完全可观测目标，但实际上许多图表（如箱线图、饼图、直方图）包含无法从渲染图像唯一恢复的潜在原始变量。为此提出Observation-Aligned监督框架，将训练目标替换为视觉可观测的量（如箱线统计量、扇形百分比、柱权重），实验表明该方法在多个VLM上显著提升可观测值恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图表到代码生成模型通常基于参考绘图脚本进行监督微调，隐式地将黄金代码视为完全可观测目标。然而该假设在许多场景下不成立：箱线图暴露的是汇总统计量而非原始样本，饼图显示比例而非任意原始值，直方图展示的是分箱质量而非个体观测值。直接监督模型复现这些不可辨识的数量会诱发幻觉和过度具体的代码生成。
AI.method: 提出Observation-Aligned监督框架，一种重写机制，将训练数据中涉及潜在原始数据的目标替换为受视觉观测约束的可辨识量：对箱线图替换为箱线统计量，对饼图替换为扇形百分比，对直方图替换为柱权重。将该框架应用于两个来源的图表到代码训练数据，得到Observation-Aligned监督目标数据集。
AI.result: 在ChartMimic和ChartX基准上，对多个视觉语言模型（VLMs）进行实验，结果表明Observation-Aligned监督在可观测值恢复上取得一致改进，包括在双可执行（both-executable）评估设置下。该方法在无需增加数据量或设计复杂学习目标/算法的情况下，仅靠修正监督目标即带来显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 提升图表到代码生成模型的关键不仅在于更多数据或更先进的学习目标与算法，还在于采用尊重图表图像可辨识性的监督目标。本文表明，修正训练数据中目标的不可辨识性可以有效减少模型幻觉和过度具体化的代码生成问题。

title: Integrated Altruistic and Fairness Preference Induces Advanced Mutual Cooperation in Sequential Social Dilemmas
summary: Inducing cooperation among distributed agents is still a difficult problem in the field of multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), particularly in social dilemma situations. There, individual interests are misaligned with the common good and individual rationality leads to suboptimal group outcomes. In contrast, humans are able to achieve cooperation with one another in such situations. A common explanation for such cooperative behavior is that individuals have social preferences. In order to achieve cooperation in MARL, we design a new utility function integrating altruistic preferences (incentive for other's reward) and fairness preferences (incentive for equality) from social psychology and behavioral economics, namely, Altruistic and Fairness Preference (AFP), a reward-sharing mechanism which converts one's own and other's rewards to incentives for cooperative behavior. We performed comparative experiments with standard RL and inequity aversion agents in two challenging sequential social dilemma games, and showed that AFP agents successfully achieved mutual cooperation with more collective rewards and higher equity than the baselines. To further understand the progression of AFP during training, we subsequently explore the effects of altruistic preferences and fairness preferences on agents' behavior. The results suggest that altruistic preferences encourage agents to contribute to the public goods, and fairness preferences induce mutual behavior between agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合利他偏好与公平偏好的奖励分配机制（AFP），用于解决多智能体强化学习中的社会困境问题，实验表明AFP智能体在合作率、集体奖励和公平性方面均优于传统强化学习与 Inequity Aversion 基线方法。
AI.motivation: 在多智能体强化学习中，社会困境情境下个体理性与集体利益相冲突，导致次优的群体合作结果。现有方法未能有效模仿人类通过社会偏好实现合作的能力，因此需要设计一种能激励分布式智能体在个体与集体利益冲突时达成合作的效用函数。
AI.method: 本文提出利他与公平偏好（AFP）奖励分配机制，该机制融合了社会心理学与行为经济学中的利他偏好（关注他人奖励）与公平偏好（关注平等性），将个体自身与他人的奖励转换为合作行为的激励信号，使智能体在训练过程中更倾向于追求群体最优而非仅个体最优。
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的序贯社会困境游戏中，AFP智能体在与标准强化学习及 Inequity Aversion 基线的对比实验中，成功实现了相互合作，获得了更高的集体奖励与更优的公平性指标。进一步分析表明，利他偏好鼓励智能体为公共物品做贡献，而公平偏好诱导了智能体之间的互惠行为。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，将社会偏好（利他与公平）显式嵌入奖励函数能够有效促进多智能体系统中的合作行为。利他偏好与公平偏好在合作中发挥互补作用：前者驱动个体向公共目标贡献，后者维持智能体之间的行为对称与互惠，为设计更具社会意识的MARL算法提供了新方向。

title: VISTA: Auditing Semantic Divergence in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models can exhibit visual concept-conditioned divergence: given images containing demographic features, corporate logos, or ideological symbols, some models produce unusually uniform responses that differ from what peer models say about the same input. These behaviors evade text-only audits because visual concepts cannot be isolated or substituted the way text tokens can. We present VISTA (Visual Inconsistency Screening Through Analysis), a black-box cross-model audit that couples semantic entropy with distribution-based divergence to flag model-specific anomalies. In a controlled study, we implant concept-conditioned stances in three VLMs via fine-tuning on small biased datasets and confirm that VISTA detects them. Auditing six VLMs across 19 topics, VISTA surfaces 142 high-suspicion cases (1.2%) and identifies selective refusal as a previously unreported divergence pattern, where models refuse demographic queries at rates varying from 0 to 65% across groups.

AI.tldr: VISTA是一个黑箱跨模型审计框架，通过语义熵与分布散度相结合的方法检测视觉语言模型中由视觉概念触发的异常输出行为，在受控实验和六模型大规模审计中发现了142个高嫌疑案例及一种此前未报告的"选择性拒绝"模式。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型可能存在视觉概念条件性发散行为：面对包含人口统计特征、企业logo或意识形态符号的图像时，部分模型会产生异常统一的输出，且与同类模型对同一输入的预测存在显著差异。这类行为无法通过纯文本审计检测，因为视觉概念无法像文本token那样被隔离或替换，亟需针对视觉模态的模型行为异常检测方法。
AI.method: 提出VISTA（Visual Inconsistency Screening Through Analysis）框架，一种黑箱跨模型审计方法，将语义熵（semantic entropy）与基于分布的散度（distribution-based divergence）相结合，用于标记模型特定的异常输出。在受控实验中，通过在小型偏置数据集上对三个VLM进行微调植入概念条件性立场来验证VISTA的检测能力；随后对六个VLM在19个主题上进行大规模审计。
AI.result: 受控实验证实VISTA能够有效检测植入的模型偏见。在六模型审计中，VISTA识别出142个高嫌疑案例（占比1.2%），并发现一种此前未被报告的发散模式——选择性拒绝（selective refusal），即模型在不同群体的人口统计查询上拒绝率差异从0%到65%不等。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型存在多种视觉概念条件性发散行为，包括选择性拒绝这类未被先前工作揭示的模式；VISTA作为一种无需模型内部访问权限的黑箱跨模型审计框架能够有效检测此类异常，为视觉语言模型的鲁棒性和公平性评估提供了新的技术路径。

title: DuplexChat: Constructing Speaker-Separated Full-Duplex Dialogue Speech at Scale for Spoken Dialogue Language Modeling
comment: 4 pages, 1 figures, submitted to SLT demo track
summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models are trained on conversational speech in which each speaker is represented as a separate stream, but existing large-scale public speech corpora are mostly monaural, making them unsuited for SDLM training. We present DuplexChat, an open-source corpus for full-duplex spoken dialogue models, and DuplexChat-Pipe, a pipeline for constructing speaker-separated full-duplex dialogue speech from public podcast feeds. DuplexChat-Pipe filters language-specific podcast feeds, retrieves and cleans episode audio, extracts diarization-guided two-speaker dialogue clips, and applies speech separation and restoration to produce one channel per speaker. Running this pipeline yields a speaker-separated spoken dialogue corpus covering 282,634 hours of English and 132,723 hours of Japanese. Analysis results on DuplexChat show that it contains turn-taking dynamics present in human dialogues.

AI.tldr: DuplexChat 是一个开源的、基于播客流构建的双工口语对话语料库，包含 282,634 小时英语和 132,723 小时日语双通道对话数据，用于训练全双工口语对话模型。
AI.motivation: 全双工口语对话模型需要每个说话者以独立音频流形式呈现的对话语音进行训练，但现有大规模公开语音语料库多为单声道录音，无法直接用于此类模型的训练，亟需一个能够提供说话人分离的双工对话语音数据集。
AI.method: 提出 DuplexChat-Pipe 流水线，从公开播客流中构建说话人分离的全双工对话语音：首先筛选特定语言的播客流，检索并清洗剧集音频；然后提取经过说话人日记化（diarization）引导的双人对话片段；最后应用语音分离与恢复技术生成每个说话者独立通道的音频。
AI.result: 通过该流水线构建了 DuplexChat 语料库，包含 282,634 小时英语和 132,723 小时日语的双通道口语对话数据；分析结果表明该语料库包含了人类对话中的话轮转换动态特征。
AI.conclusion: DuplexChat 为全双工口语对话模型研究提供了一个大规模、开源、说话人分离的对话语音资源，填补了现有公共语料库在该领域的空白，其蕴含的话轮转换动态特性证实了数据质量和应用潜力。

title: FORGE: Research-Trajectory Hijacking Attacks on Deep Research Agents
summary: Deep research agents decompose open-ended queries into subtasks, retrieve web evidence over multiple rounds, and synthesize long-form reports. This workflow creates a planning-layer poisoning surface: adversarial documents that enter the retrieval pool can steer follow-up questions and turn a local injection into report-level contamination. We present FORGE (Fabricated Orchestrated Reasoning chain for aGent Exploitation), a two-level attack that combines intra-document reasoning fabrication with inter-document chain coordination to hijack subtask planning. We further introduce the PRISM metric, which weights infected report claims by cognitive type, and Root Query Anchoring, a lightweight defense that ties recursive follow-up generation to the root query. Across 25 queries, Network FORGE reaches 26.4% PRISM with five injected documents and exhibits depth migration, in which recursive synthesis shifts poisoned content from overt framing into factual premises. On the 10-query defense subset, RQA (Root Query Anchoring) reduces PRISM from 38.5% to 18.3%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FORGE攻击，利用推理链伪造与文档间协调污染深度研究智能体的子任务规划；同时提出PRISM指标量化认知级感染，以及RQA防御方法将PRISM从38.5%降至18.3%。
AI.motivation: 深度研究智能体将开放性问题分解为子任务并多轮检索网页证据，这一工作流引入了规划层投毒面：攻击者可通过注入恶意文档操控后续提问方向，将局部注入扩展为全局报告污染，现有研究对此类威胁缺乏系统性分析与防御。
AI.method: FORGE攻击采用双层架构：文档内推理伪造（intra-document reasoning fabrication）篡改单篇文档的推理链，文档间链协调（inter-document chain coordination）多文档联合操纵子任务规划。PRISM指标按认知类型对受感染报告声明加权评估攻击效果。Root Query Anchoring（RQA）防御方法将递归式后续问题生成绑定到原始根查询，限制攻击影响扩散。
AI.result: 在25个查询上，Network FORGE使用5篇注入文档达到26.4%的PRISM值，并表现出深度迁移现象——递归合成将受污染内容从显式框架转移至事实前提。在10个查询的防御子集上，RQA将PRISM从38.5%降至18.3%。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明深度研究智能体的规划层面临新型投毒威胁，攻击者可实现认知级别的报告污染；RQA作为一种轻量级防御方案能有效降低攻击效果，但攻击与防御之间的对抗仍需进一步探索。

title: REAL-OW: Rehearsal-free Open World Object Detection with Low-Rank Adaptation and Dual-Stage Objectness Modeling
summary: Open-World Object Detection (OWOD) requires detectors to identify previously unseen objects as unknown and incrementally incorporate them into the set of known categories, while preserving previously acquired knowledge. Existing frameworks rely heavily on exemplar replay to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, but in some real applications, storing raw data conflicts with data access restrictions and leads to data exposure risks, while incurring significant memory overhead. In this paper, we propose REAL-OW, a novel rehearsal-free framework that decouples incremental knowledge through a collaborative adapter architecture based on Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Specifically, we deploy General Adapters (GAs) in the backbone to enable the significance-aware refinement of cross-task universal representations, while Specific Adapters (SAs) in the decoder provide orthogonal storage for task-specific expertise. To resolve representation drift in objectness modeling under rehearsal-free constraints, we introduce Dual-Stage Objectness Modeling (DSOM), which alternates between feature aggregation and boundary consolidation to stabilize objectness distributions while maintaining the separation between known and unknown categories. Furthermore, DSOM is supported by a Calibrated Gaussian Negative Log-Likelihood (CG-NLL) distance tailored for the dispersed feature distributions inherent in rehearsal-free settings. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that REAL-OW achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing existing exemplar replay methods in both detection precision and unknown discovery. Our approach establishes a new baseline for rehearsal-free OWOD.

AI.tldr: 提出REAL-OW，一种基于LoRA协作适配器架构的无重放开放世界目标检测框架，通过通用适配器和专用适配器解耦增量知识，并引入双阶段目标建模和校准高斯负对数似然距离处理无重放场景下的表征漂移，在检测精度和未知目标发现上超越了现有基于重放的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有开放世界目标检测框架严重依赖样本重放来缓解灾难性遗忘，但在实际应用中存储原始数据面临数据访问限制和隐私暴露风险，同时带来显著的内存开销，亟需一种无需重放的高效增量学习方案。
AI.method: 提出REAL-OW框架，采用基于LoRA的协作适配器架构解耦增量知识：在骨干网络中部署通用适配器（GA）实现跨任务通用表征的重要性感知精炼，在解码器中部署特定适配器（SA）提供任务特定知识正交存储；引入双阶段目标建模（DSOM），通过特征聚合和边界巩固交替稳定目标分布并保持已知与未知类别的分离；DSOM由校准高斯负对数似然（CG-NLL）距离支撑，专门适配无重放场景下分散的特征分布。
AI.result: 大量评估表明REAL-OW在检测精度和未知目标发现上均超越了现有基于样本重放的方法，达到最先进水平，建立了无重放开放世界目标检测的新基线。
