AI.conclusion: 无重放策略结合参数高效微调（LoRA）可以有效解决开放世界目标检测中的灾难性遗忘问题，同时规避数据存储风险；DSOM和CG-NLL为无重放场景下的目标建模提供了有效的技术路径，为隐私敏感的实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: Progressive Refinement: An Iterative Pseudo-Labeling Approach for Mandarin-English Code-Switching ASR
summary: Code-switching (CS), alternating languages within the same utterance, poses significant challenges for automatic speech recognition (ASR) due to limited CS training data. This paper applies an iterative pseudo-labeling training approach to CS-ASR for the first time, demonstrating its effectiveness in leveraging unlabeled data to improve CS-ASR performance. The approach comprises three phases: pseudo-label generation, two-stage bilingual model training, and iterative improvements. It begins by generating pseudo-labels from a large unlabeled corpus, creating a semi-supervised dataset. This dataset supports a two-stage training framework where the model is pre-trained and then fine-tuned on supervised CS data. Iterative refinements further enhance the model's accuracy in handling complex CS scenarios. Our approach significantly advances CS-ASR systems, achieving notable Mix Error Rate (MER) reductions on SEAME's devman (6.35%) and devsge (8.29%) subsets.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将迭代伪标签训练方法应用于代码转换语音识别（CS-ASR），通过利用无标注数据有效提升CS-ASR性能，在SEAME数据集上实现了显著的混合错误率（MER）降低。
AI.motivation: 代码转换（CS）语音中同一话语内交替使用不同语言的现象，给自动语音识别（ASR）带来了严峻挑战，其核心瓶颈在于缺乏充足的CS训练数据，导致模型在复杂混合语言场景下性能受限。
AI.method: 提出了一种包含三个阶段的迭代伪标签训练框架：首先从大规模无标注语料库生成伪标签，构建半监督数据集；然后采用两阶段训练策略，对双语模型进行预训练后在监督CS数据上微调；最后通过多轮迭代优化进一步精炼模型，提升对复杂CS场景的处理能力。
AI.result: 在SEAME基准数据集上，该方法在devman和devsge两个子集上分别实现了6.35%和8.29%的混合错误率（MER）下降，验证了伪标签迭代训练在CS-ASR任务中的有效性和显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明迭代伪标签训练是一种有效利用无标注数据增强CS-ASR系统的可行方案，为缓解CS训练数据稀缺问题提供了新思路，并指出了通过迭代优化持续提升模型性能的研究方向。

title: CARL: Constraint-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Planning with LLMs
summary: Despite their strong reasoning capabilities and extensive world knowledge, Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently generate plans that violate task constraints, undermining their reliability in real-world applications. This deficiency arises from a lack of systematic mechanisms to incorporate constraint information during the generation process. While existing approaches attempt to mitigate this by relying on external tools or task decomposition, they fail to enhance the model's intrinsic constraint awareness. To address this, we propose Constraint-Aware Reinforcement Learning (CARL), a novel RL framework designed to strengthen LLMs' intrinsic focus on constraints. CARL introduces a constraint-aware reward by comparing the model's output distributions under constrained and unconstrained inputs, encouraging constraint focus and penalizing neglect. Compatible with various RL frameworks and requiring no external solvers or top models, CARL enables scalable, end-to-end constraint-aware planning. Extensive experiments on BlocksWorld, TravelPlanner, and T-Eval demonstrate that CARL significantly outperforms standard Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) baselines and state-of-the-art reasoning models, exhibiting a markedly increased focus on constraints.

AI.tldr: 提出约束感知强化学习（CARL）框架，通过比较受约束与无约束输入下的模型输出分布设计约束感知奖励，在不依赖外部工具或顶级模型的情况下增强LLM对任务约束的内在关注，在多个规划基准上显著优于标准强化微调和先进推理模型。
AI.motivation: LLM虽具备强大推理能力和广泛世界知识，但在生成计划时频繁违反任务约束，根源在于缺乏在生成过程中系统融入约束信息的机制，现有方法依赖外部工具或任务分解，未能提升模型内在的约束感知能力。
AI.method: 提出Constraint-Aware Reinforcement Learning (CARL)框架，通过比较模型在受约束与无约束输入下的输出分布来设计约束感知奖励，以鼓励模型聚焦约束并惩罚对约束的忽视，该框架兼容多种RL算法，无需外部求解器或顶级模型，实现可扩展的端到端约束感知规划。
AI.result: 在BlocksWorld、TravelPlanner和T-Eval三个基准上的实验表明，CARL显著优于标准Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT)基线和当前最先进的推理模型，模型对约束的关注度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: CARL有效增强了LLM对任务约束的内在感知能力，提供了一种不依赖外部工具的可扩展解决方案，为提升LLM在现实规划任务中的可靠性开辟了新路径。

title: PosterHarness: Turning Scientific Poster Generation into an Auditable Instruction-Following Benchmark
summary: Text-rich image models can now design poster-scale layouts, but we lack ways to measure whether they honor scientific communication contracts: legible labels, prescribed aspect ratios, and -- above all -- abstaining from fabricated scientific figures. We present POSTERHARNESS, an auditable harness reframing poster generation as measurable instruction-following tasks, with a pilot benchmark and failure taxonomy. POSTERHARNESS uses a placeholder-first contract to separate two jobs models otherwise conflate. The model performs visual-summary design: typography, reading path, color, and background -- but never draws data-bearing figures. Every figure region must be an empty labeled placeholder; a deterministic compositor inserts real source-paper figures at detected coordinates. This makes properties measurable: placeholder count and ID accuracy, blankness, aspect-ratio compliance, abstention from synthesized graphics, public-text hygiene, and source-figure provenance -- with failures logged as explicit rejections, not hidden in plausible-looking output. We instantiate the harness on 12 papers (6 HEP, 6 AI/ML-adjacent) and report three findings. (i) A counterfactual probe shows the placeholder contract drives VLM-counted synthesized figures from 34 to 0 across three papers. (ii) A failure taxonomy identifies blocking contracts: placeholder geometry, placeholder QA, template critic, and public text. (iii) Comparison with Paper2Poster shows a trade-off: PosterHarness yields higher-resolution artifacts, lower white-canvas fraction, and stronger VLM visual preference; the deterministic baseline retains slightly more PosterQuiz-style information and runs faster. We report this as regime characterization, not a superiority claim. All artifacts, prompts, manifests, and audit scripts are released as a reusable evaluation component.

AI.tldr: POSTERHARNESS 是一个可审计的评测框架，通过占位符优先合约将科学海报生成重构为可测量的指令遵循任务，分离视觉摘要设计与数据图形绘制，从而量化模型在标签可读性、宽高比合规及拒绝虚构科学图形等方面的表现，并在12篇论文的基准测试中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本丰富图像模型能够生成海报级布局，但缺乏系统化方法衡量其是否遵守科学传播的基本契约，包括标签可读性、规定的宽高比，尤其是不能生成虚构的科学图形。现有评估方式往往将布局设计与数据图形生成混为一谈，无法明确区分模型在哪些环节失败。
AI.method: POSTERHARNESS 采用占位符优先合约，将海报生成解耦为两个独立任务：模型负责视觉摘要设计（排版、阅读路径、颜色、背景），但绝不能绘制包含数据的图表；每个图表区域必须是一个空的带标签的占位符，由确定性合成器在检测到的坐标处插入真实源论文图表。该框架定义了可测量的指标，包括占位符数量和ID准确性、空白性、宽高比合规、拒绝合成图形、公共文本卫生以及源图溯源，并将失败记录为显式拒绝而非隐藏在看似合理的输出中。
AI.result: 在12篇论文（6篇HEP、6篇AI/ML相关）上实例化该框架，实验发现：（i）反事实探针显示占位符合约将三篇论文中VLM计数的合成图形从34降至0；（ii）失败分类学识别出四类阻塞性合约：占位符几何、占位符QA、模板评判器和公共文本；（iii）与Paper2Poster的对比表明，POSTERHARNESS 能生成分辨率更高、空白画布占比更低且VLM视觉偏好更强的人工制品，而确定性基线在保留PaperQuiz风格信息和运行速度上略有优势。
AI.conclusion: POSTERHARNESS 提供了一种可审计、可复用的评测组件，能够系统量化科学海报生成模型对科学传播契约的遵守程度。该工作揭示了不同方法之间存在权衡而非绝对优劣，为后续研究提供了基准任务、失败分类学以及开源评测工具。

title: STAPO: Selective Trajectory-Aware Policy Optimization for LLM Agent Training
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) is the dominant paradigm for training Large Language Model (LLM) agents on long-horizon tasks. However, sparse and delayed rewards often lead to trajectory neglect, in which agents lose focus on the task goal and interaction history at intermediate steps. Prior work has explored step-level supervision using Shannon-entropy-based uncertainty signals, which conflate inherent state complexity with agent confidence and therefore provide unreliable estimates of decision reliability. To address this issue, we propose normalized entropy, which measures confidence deviations relative to an agent's average behavior under a given state, thereby strengthening the association between low-quality actions and trajectory neglect. Building on this insight, we introduce Selective Trajectory-Aware Policy Optimization (STAPO), a hierarchical group-based RL framework. STAPO leverages normalized entropy to locate outlier steps associated with trajectory neglect and optimizes them via a joint mechanism of trajectory-aware reward and trajectory-independent penalty, enhancing trajectory awareness while preserving training stability. Extensive experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Search-Augmented QA demonstrate that STAPO achieves state-of-the-art performance while substantially alleviating trajectory neglect, validating its effectiveness and robustness for agentic tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出归一化熵以区分智能体置信度与状态复杂性，并基于此构建STAPO框架，通过层级分组策略与轨迹感知奖励/独立惩罚的联合优化机制，有效缓解长程任务中LLM智能体的轨迹忽视问题，在ALFWorld、WebShop和Search-Augmented QA上取得最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在训练大语言模型智能体处理长程任务时，稀疏与延迟奖励常导致轨迹忽视问题，即智能体在中间步骤失去对任务目标和交互历史的关注；现有基于香农熵的不确定性信号无法区分状态复杂度与智能体置信度，对决策可靠性的估计不可靠，亟需更精确的度量与优化方法。
AI.method: 本文提出归一化熵，通过衡量在给定状态下智能体置信度偏离其平均行为的程度，强化低质量动作与轨迹忽视之间的关联；基于此设计选择性轨迹感知策略优化（STAPO），采用层级分组RL框架，利用归一化熵定位与轨迹忽视相关的异常步骤，并通过轨迹感知奖励与轨迹独立惩罚的联合机制进行优化，在保持训练稳定性的同时提升轨迹感知能力。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和Search-Augmented QA三个基准上的大量实验表明，STAPO取得了最先进的性能，同时显著缓解了轨迹忽视问题，验证了该方法在智能体任务中的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 归一化熵能够更可靠地识别智能体在长程决策中的轨迹忽视行为，STAPO框架通过层级分组与双重信号联合优化有效兼顾了轨迹感知能力与训练稳定性，为LLM智能体在复杂交互场景中的强化学习训练提供了新的有效范式。

title: $C^3$ASD: Multi-Level Consistency-Driven Representation Learning
summary: Active Speaker Detection determines whether a visible person in a video is speaking at each moment. While recent audio-visual fusion methods perform well on clean data, they degrade under real-world corruptions such as background noise, occlusion, or simultaneous modality degradation. We attribute this limitation to the absence of explicit consistency constraints that promote robust, semantically aligned representations across modalities. Without such guidance, models tend to learn fragile modality-specific shortcuts that fail under corrupted conditions. We propose $C^3$ASD, a multi-level consistency-driven framework with three complementary constraints: embedding-level inter-modality consistency aligns audio-visual representations during speech; sequence-level intra-modality consistency separates speaking and non-speaking clusters via track-aware contrastive learning; and prediction-level consistency stabilizes fusion through knowledge distillation. Extensive experiments demonstrate significant improvements under diverse audio, visual and joint corruptions, while maintaining competitive performance on clean data.

AI.tldr: C3ASD 提出了一种多层级一致性驱动框架，通过嵌入级、序列级和预测级三类一致性约束来增强主动说话人检测模型在音视频联合噪声下的鲁棒性，在保持干净数据性能的同时显著提升了对真实世界退化的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有主动说话人检测（Active Speaker Detection）方法在干净数据上表现良好，但面对背景噪声、遮挡或多模态同时退化等真实世界腐败时性能显著下降，原因是缺乏显式的一致性约束来促进跨模态的鲁棒语义对齐表示，导致模型倾向于学习脆弱的模态特异性捷径。
AI.method: 提出 C3ASD 框架，包含三种互补的一致性约束：嵌入级跨模态一致性（embedding-level inter-modality consistency），在说话时段对齐音视频表示；序列级模态内一致性（sequence-level intra-modality consistency），通过轨迹感知对比学习分离说话与非说话聚类；预测级一致性（prediction-level consistency），利用知识蒸馏稳定融合过程。
AI.result: 在多种音频、视觉及联合腐败条件下，C3ASD 相比基线方法实现了显著的性能提升，同时在干净数据上保持了具有竞争力的表现，验证了多层级一致性约束对提升模型鲁棒性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 明确的跨模态与模态内一致性约束是提升主动说话人检测模型对现实世界退化鲁棒性的关键，多层级约束的协同设计优于单一约束；未来研究可探索更强的一致性形式及更复杂的退化场景。

title: DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by decoupling draft generation from target verification. While recent parallel drafters efficiently propose long token sequences in a single forward pass, they suffer from rapid acceptance decay due to a lack of inter-token dependencies. Furthermore, indiscriminately verifying these extended blocks wastes critical batch capacity on tokens with high rejection risks, severely degrading throughput in high-concurrency serving systems. We introduce DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that unifies high-throughput parallel generation with adaptive, load-aware verification. To maintain draft quality, DSpark utilizes a semi-autoregressive architecture, coupling a parallel backbone with a lightweight sequential module, to introduce intra-block dependency modeling and mitigate suffix decay. To optimize system efficiency, DSpark employs confidence-scheduled verification, dynamically tailoring the verification length for each request based on estimated prefix survival probabilities and engine-specific throughput profiles. On offline benchmarks across diverse domains, DSpark substantially improves the accepted length over state-of-the-art autoregressive and parallel drafters. When deployed within the DeepSeek-V4 serving system under live user traffic, DSpark successfully mitigates verification waste. Compared to the established production baseline (MTP-1), DSpark accelerates per-user generation speeds by 60 to 85 percent at matched throughput levels. More importantly, by preventing severe throughput degradation under strict interactivity constraints, it enables performance tiers that were previously unattainable, shifting the Pareto frontier of our serving system.

AI.tldr: DSpark提出了一种统一并行推测解码与负载感知验证的框架，通过半自回归架构缓解并行草稿生成中的后缀衰变问题，并利用置信度调度验证动态控制验证长度，在实际部署中实现了60%–85%的单用户加速并推动了服务系统Pareto前沿的扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有的并行推测解码方法虽然能单次前向传播生成较长草稿序列，但缺乏token间依赖建模，导致接受率快速衰减（后缀衰变）；同时，无差别地验证这些长块会浪费批处理容量在高拒绝风险的token上，在高并发服务系统中严重降低吞吐量。
AI.method: DSpark框架采用半自回归架构，在并行骨干网络基础上引入轻量级顺序模块，对草稿序列进行块内依赖建模以缓解后缀衰变；同时提出置信度调度验证机制，基于估计的前缀存活概率和引擎特定的吞吐量曲线，动态为每个请求调整验证长度，实现负载感知的验证优化。
AI.result: 在跨多个领域的离线基准测试中，DSpark在接受长度上显著优于现有最先进的自回归和并行草稿生成器。在DeepSeek-V4生产服务系统上的实际用户流量部署中，与已建立的MTP-1基线相比，DSpark在匹配吞吐量水平下将单用户生成速度提升了60%–85%，并避免了严格交互约束下的吞吐量退化，实现了此前无法达到的性能层级。
AI.conclusion: DSpark通过统一高质量并行草稿生成与负载感知验证，有效解决了推测解码中草稿质量与系统效率之间的矛盾，在实际部署中将单用户延迟大幅降低，并推动了服务系统Pareto前沿的扩展，表明兼顾模型生成质量与系统级调度优化是大模型推理加速的重要方向。

title: Natural Language Camera Movement Understanding
summary: Understanding camera movement in natural language is critical for training and evaluating video generation models, among other applications. However, we demonstrate that existing vision-language models (VLMs) fail this task in surprising ways, frequently confusing translation with rotation, left with right, and object movement with camera movement. To address these limitations, we establish natural language camera movement understanding as a standalone research task. We introduce a two-level cinematographic taxonomy and an extensive, atomic benchmark featuring both real and synthetic videos. Furthermore, we curate a large-scale, multi-source training set enhanced by targeted camera movement augmentation. Our fine-tuned VLM-8B outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro by 10% and 11% on our benchmark's real and synthetic videos, respectively. Despite these gains, a significant gap remains relative to human performance, underscoring the need to promote and facilitate future research on natural language camera movement understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自然语言中的相机运动理解作为独立研究任务，通过构建双层次电影分类法、大规模多源训练集和原子级基准（涵盖真实与合成视频），并结合目标性相机运动增强策略微调VLM-8B，其在基准上超越Gemini 3.1 Pro达10%和11%，但与人类表现仍有显著差距。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）在理解自然语言描述的相机运动时存在严重缺陷，频繁混淆平移与旋转、左右方向、物体运动与相机运动，该问题在视频生成模型的训练与评估等关键应用中尤为重要，但目前缺乏系统性的独立研究。
AI.method: 本文首先建立了一个两层次的电影学分类法（two-level cinematographic taxonomy）作为语义框架，在此基础上构建了原子级（atomic）基准测试，包含真实视频与合成视频两类数据；同时从多个来源整理大规模训练集，并引入目标性的相机运动数据增强（targeted camera movement augmentation）策略，最后对VLM-8B模型进行微调。
AI.result: 微调后的VLM-8B在真实视频和合成视频上分别超越Gemini 3.1 Pro达10%和11%，取得显著领先；然而，与人类表现相比仍存在明显差距，表明当前模型在自然语言相机运动理解任务上尚未达到人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明自然语言中的相机运动理解是一个尚未解决的挑战性任务，现有VLMs在此任务上表现不足，本文提出的基准、数据集和微调方法为该方向奠定了坚实基础，同时显著性能差距也凸显了进一步研究该问题的必要性与紧迫性。

title: AgentGym2: Benchmarking Large Language Model Agents in De-Idealized Real-World Environments
comment: Accepted as a main conference paper at ACL 2026
summary: Language agents, i.e., LLM agents, progress rapidly and are increasingly deployed in production environments. This trend underscores the urgent need for rigorous and realistic evaluations. However, most existing benchmarks evaluate agents in simplified, idealized settings. They typically rely on pre-packaged tool interfaces, overlook critical steps, and assume inputs are clean and fully specified. Consequently, they understate the difficulty of real deployments, where uncertainty and noise are ubiquitous and agents must proactively explore the environment to uncover new tools. To bridge this gap, we present AgentGym2, a new evaluation framework with task instances grounded in real-world end-to-end working demands. Beyond reasoning and planning, it measures agents' ability to execute end-to-end procedures, discover tools via exploration, compose tools for unseen tasks, and remain robust to noisy and underspecified information. Experiments on 15 proprietary and open-source models show that even SOTA systems like Gemini and GPT-5 struggle on AgentGym2, revealing a substantial gap between the capability of current agents and the demands of real-world applications.

AI.tldr: AgentGym2 是一个面向真实部署环境的 LLM 智能体评估框架，通过引入工具探索、组合与噪声鲁棒性等维度，揭示了当前最先进模型（如 Gemini 和 GPT-5）在真实端到端任务中的能力显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 智能体评估基准多基于简化和理想化设定，依赖预封装的工具接口、忽略关键执行步骤、假设输入干净且完整，无法反映真实部署中存在的噪声、未明确信息以及需要主动探索发现新工具等实际挑战，因此亟需更贴近真实工作需求的评估方法。
AI.method: AgentGym2 提出了一种新的评估框架，其任务实例基于真实世界端到端工作需求构建，除评估推理与规划能力外，还专门衡量智能体在执行完整端到端流程、通过探索发现工具、组合工具处理未见任务以及在噪声和未明确信息条件下保持鲁棒性等方面的能力。
AI.result: 在 15 个闭源和开源模型上的实验结果显示，包括 Gemini 和 GPT-5 在内的最先进系统在 AgentGym2 上表现不佳，表明当前智能体的能力与现实应用需求之间存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明现有 LLM 智能体在应对真实环境中的不确定性、工具探索和噪声鲁棒性等关键能力上存在严重不足，AgentGym2 可作为更贴近实际需求的评估标准，引导智能体研究向更真实的应用场景迈进。

title: PixCon: Clean-Positive Contrastive Learning for Foundation-Model Semi-Supervised Segmentation
summary: Semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSSS) has long turned on one question, which pseudo-labels to trust, and answered it with ever more careful confidence filtering. Foundation backbones change the regime: with a DINOv2 teacher a strict threshold already retains a measured 98%-clean pseudo-label set, so the accuracy that remains lives not in the filter but in how the embedding space is structured by class. We propose PixCon, a clean-positive pixel-contrastive framework. PixCon maintains a per-class memory bank that admits only labeled pixels the student already classifies correctly, guaranteeing a contamination-free positive set ($ρ_F=0$) by construction, unlike prior contrastive SSSS banks (ReCo, U$^2$PL) built from confidence-filtered pseudo-labels. It is a single branch over a consistency backbone, adds no inference-time parameters, and needs no bank-specific threshold. A first-order analysis of the supervised-InfoNCE gradient explains why contamination hurts: its false-positive term scales as $ρ_F/(1-ρ_F)$, which we measure (0.018 on Pascal, 0.106 on ADE20K) rather than assume. Across Pascal VOC, Cityscapes, and ADE20K, PixCon matches or improves a strong DINOv2-based UniMatch V2 baseline in a compute-matched one-switch protocol: it improves every Pascal-1/8 seed (a per-seed gain of about +0.2 mIoU) and its three-seed mean reaches 87.90, the published UniMatch V2-B figure. Because contamination is already rare under foundation-model teachers, our analysis indicates the $ρ_F=0$ guarantee acts chiefly as robustness as teachers weaken, while the accuracy gain comes from cleaner positive supervision, making clean-positive contrast a robust, low-cost default for foundation-model SSSS.

AI.tldr: PixCon提出一种基于干净正样本的像素对比学习框架，用于半监督语义分割。在DINOv2等基础模型教师生成的伪标签已高度干净（98%）的新范式下，PixCon通过构建无污染的记忆库（ρ_F=0）替代传统置信度过滤方法，实验表明其在Pascal VOC、Cityscapes和ADE20K上匹配或超越强基线UniMatch V2，并揭示了伪标签污染对对比学习的定量影响机制。
AI.motivation: 半监督语义分割长期围绕“该信任哪些伪标签”这一核心问题展开，但已有方法依赖日益精细的置信度过滤策略。随着DINOv2等基础模型教师出现，严格阈值已能生成98%纯净度的伪标签集，使得准确率提升不再取决于过滤机制，而取决于如何通过类别信息构建嵌入空间。现有对比学习框架（如ReCo、U^2PL）的记忆库基于置信度过滤的伪标签建立，无法保证正样本集无污染，从而限制了性能提升。
AI.method: PixCon提出一种干净正样本像素对比学习框架，维护一个逐类别的记忆库，仅接收学生模型已正确分类的标注像素，从而通过构造保证正样本集无污染（ρ_F=0）。该方法基于一致性训练骨干网络构建单分支架构，不引入推理时参数，也不需要针对记忆库设置特定阈值。论文还通过InfoNCE梯度的一阶分析推导出伪标签污染对训练的影响：假正项的梯度贡献与污染率ρ_F/(1-ρ_F)成正比，并在Pascal（0.018）和ADE20K（0.106）上实际测量了这一比值。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC、Cityscapes和ADE20K三个基准上，PixCon在计算量匹配的单开关协议下匹配或超越基于DINOv2的强基线UniMatch V2：在Pascal VOC的1/8标注设定下，PixCon改善了每一个随机种子的性能（每种子提升约+0.2 mIoU），三种子平均达到87.90 mIoU，与已发表的UniMatch V2-B结果持平。
AI.conclusion: 在基础模型教师下伪标签污染已较为罕见的背景下，PixCon的ρ_F=0保证主要作为教师模型弱化时的鲁棒性机制，而精度提升的真正来源是更干净的正面监督信号。干净正样本对比方法可作为基础模型半监督语义分割的鲁棒且低成本的默认方案。

title: Reason, Reward, Refine: Step-Level Errors Corrections with Structured Feedback for Physics Reasoning in Small Language Models
summary: Physics reasoning fails structurally in small language models: an error at any step propagates forward, corrupting every inference that follows. Limited domain knowledge, hallucination under multi-step derivation, and distributional sensitivity compound this failure. We propose a step-level reward framework that identifies the first reasoning error, generates targeted structured feedback, and trains the model to revise its solution via policy gradient with KL regularization, without exposing it to ground truth solutions as generation targets. Unlike annotation-dependent step-level methods, no preference data construction is required and the external verifier operates exclusively at training time. Across five physics benchmarks, our framework delivers accuracy gains of 17-20% over CoT prompting and 10-16% over the strongest baseline, reduces calculation errors from 56.9% to 23.5%, and reduces miscomprehension errors from 22.3% to 12.0% in the best observed cases. Conceptual errors reduce from 89.7% to 68.7%, yet persist as the hardest failure mode across all conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需偏好数据标注的步骤级奖励框架，通过定位首次推理错误并生成结构化反馈，结合策略梯度与KL正则化训练小语言模型修正自身推理过程，在五个物理推理基准上实现17-20%的准确率提升，并将计算错误率从56.9%降至23.5%。
AI.motivation: 小语言模型在物理推理中面临结构性失败问题：任何一步的错误都会向前传播，污染后续所有推理结果；同时，有限的领域知识、多步推导下的幻觉以及分布敏感性进一步加剧了这一失效模式，现有方法依赖偏好数据构建或暴露真实解作为生成目标，存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出一种步骤级奖励框架，利用外部验证器在训练时识别首次推理错误并生成结构化反馈，通过策略梯度与KL正则化训练模型对自身输出进行修订，无需构建偏好数据，也不向模型暴露真实解。
AI.result: 在五个物理基准上，该方法相比CoT提示提升准确率17-20%，相比最强基线提升10-16%；计算错误率从56.9%降至23.5%，理解错误率从22.3%降至12.0%，概念错误率从89.7%降至68.7%但仍是最难克服的失效模式。
AI.conclusion: 步骤级反馈与策略梯度微调能有效缓解小语言模型的多步推理错误累积问题，但概念性错误作为最顽固的失败类型仍需进一步研究，且外部验证器仅在训练时使用避免了推理阶段的额外开销。

title: SafeGuard: A Multi-Agent Perception-Reasoning Framework for Social-Risk AI-Generated Video Detection
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026, The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/williamw99/SafeGuard
summary: As video generation paradigms evolve from localized manipulation to full-scene synthesis, AI-generated video detection becomes increasingly challenging, as forgeries exhibit coherent global structure and high perceptual realism. However, existing benchmarks are biased toward perceptual fidelity and primarily evaluate detectors based on perceptual artifacts, providing limited coverage of scenarios that require reasoning about violations of physical laws, structural coherence, or social logic. This dataset bias shapes current approaches and results in a Perception-Reasoning Gap: artifact-centric models capture low-level statistical irregularities yet lack semantic inference, whereas vision-language models perform semantic reasoning but remain insensitive to fine-grained forensic cues. To bridge this gap, we propose SafeGuard, a multi-agent framework that enables collaborative specialization between forensic perception and semantic reasoning. A hierarchical perceptual solver extracts fine-grained forensic evidence, while a self-reflective verifier enforces consistency between semantic inference and physical plausibility, forming an interpretable evidence chain. To support evaluation, we introduce SafeVid, a novel AI-generated video detection benchmark comprising 20K videos spanning 10 social risk categories, designed to evaluate physical plausibility, structural consistency, and the rationality of social behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate the generalization of SafeGuard, improving accuracy on SafeVid by +18.7% and consistently outperforming prior methods across four public benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 针对现有AI生成视频检测基准偏向感知伪影、缺乏物理与社会逻辑推理能力的问题，本文提出SafeGuard多智能体框架，通过层次化感知求解器与自反思验证器协同实现取证感知与语义推理的桥接，并构建了包含20K视频、涵盖10个社会风险类别的SafeVid基准，在多个公开基准上取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成视频检测基准存在感知偏差，主要基于感知伪影评估检测器，对物理定律违背、结构连贯性或社会逻辑推理等场景覆盖有限；这种数据集偏差导致感知-推理鸿沟：基于伪影的模型捕获低层统计异常但缺乏语义推理，而视觉语言模型能进行语义推理但对细粒度取证线索不敏感。
AI.method: 本文提出SafeGuard多智能体框架，包含一个层次化感知求解器用于提取细粒度取证证据，以及一个自反思验证器用于强制执行语义推理与物理合理性之间的一致性，形成可解释的证据链；同时构建SafeVid基准，包含20K视频和10个社会风险类别，用于评估物理合理性、结构一致性和社会行为合理性。
AI.result: SafeGuard在SafeVid基准上准确率提升18.7%，并在四个公开基准上持续优于以往方法，展现了良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了现有AI生成视频检测中感知-推理鸿沟问题，通过多智能体协作框架实现了取证感知与语义推理的有效桥接，为构建更鲁棒、更具推理能力的视频伪造检测方案提供了新范式，SafeVid基准也为该领域的系统评估建立了更具挑战性的标准。

title: Pathways of Visual Information Flow in Vision-Language Models
summary: We study how visual information is routed in vision-language models (VLMs). Using causal patching on controlled synthetic and natural datasets, we find that models rely on two distinct pathways to solve visual tasks: A direct pathway, where visual information is retained in image token representations and read out by the final token at later layers, and a text-mediated pathway, where visual information is first transferred to the query tokens and then read out by the final token. Across three visual tasks, we show that pathway selection is task-dependent, and that data distribution and prompt design can also modulate which pathway is used to solve the image-based query. Moreover, using attention knockouts and corrupted-input patching, we find that these pathways are flexible, under certain interventions, models can rely on the text-mediated pathway as a fallback when the usual pathway is ablated. This behavior unifies findings in prior work and shows that ablation-based interventions can reveal what models could do rather than what they normally do. Together, our results provide a mechanistic characterization of visual information flow in VLMs and highlight the flexibility of their internal mechanisms under intervention.

AI.tldr: 通过因果干预方法，本文揭示了视觉-语言模型在解决视觉任务时存在两条可灵活切换的信息通路——直接通路（图像token保留视觉信息）和文本中介通路（视觉信息先传递至查询token），并证明通路选择受任务类型、数据分布和提示设计影响，且模型在通路被消融时可启用备用通路作为回退机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对视觉-语言模型中视觉信息如何流动与路由的机制性理解，特别是不同视觉任务下信息传递路径的差异以及模型内部机制在受干预时的灵活性尚未被系统刻画。
AI.method: 采用因果干预（causal patching）方法，在受控合成数据集和自然数据集上对VLM进行神经机制分析；通过注意力消融（attention knockouts）和基于损坏输入的干预（corrupted-input patching）来测试通路可塑性，分别追踪图像token表示和查询token表示中的视觉信息流向。
AI.result: 发现两条信息通路：直接通路（图像token保留视觉信息并由最终token在深层读出）和文本中介通路（视觉信息先转移到查询token再由最终token读出）；三种视觉任务上的通路选择具有任务依赖性，数据分布和提示设计也可调节通路偏好；当常用通路被消融时，模型可启用以文本中介通路作为回退机制。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为VLM中视觉信息流提供了机制层面的刻画，揭示了模型内部机制在干预下的灵活性；指出基于消融的干预方法可能揭示模型"能做什么"而非"通常做什么"，统一了先前研究中看似矛盾的发现。

title: MoP-JEPA: Hard-Assigned Predictor Mixtures for Stochastic JEPA World Models
summary: JEPA world models predict the next latent state with a single deterministic predictor trained by latent regression. We show that this fails structurally when the environment is stochastic: at a branching transition, the regression-optimal predictor outputs the conditional mean of the successor embeddings, a point between the true next states that corresponds to no state at all. We prove this collapse for deterministic and gated mixture-of-experts predictors, and prove that MoP-JEPA's hard-assigned predictors converge instead to a quantizer of the transition distribution: one head per successor mode, enumerable in a single forward pass, which is the interface a planner consumes. On official OGBench offline data with leak-free evaluation, planning over single-predictor rollouts performs poorly ($0.02$--$0.09$ success) while planning over our predicted modes reaches up to $0.85$, ahead of deterministic, gated-MoE, and variational predictors on every task. Because multi-prediction evaluation invites coverage freeloading, a verification protocol is part of the method: an input-agnostic codebook control, a shuffled-context test, router-gated readouts, transition-precision guards, and a verified-route criterion in which the model proposes its transition graph blind and ground truth is used only to check the result. Under this criterion our method outperforms the strongest soft alternative on all three mazes ($2$--$5\times$), and the protocol identifies the remaining gap in that baseline's raw scores as routes through predicted transitions that do not exist. The same model executes in the real environment, placing second of seven against the published OGBench baselines on the hardest maze. Multimodal dynamics decide whether a JEPA world model can plan at all; a mixture of predictors with hard assignment is a minimal and verifiable fix.

AI.tldr: 本文证明标准JEPA世界模型在随机环境中因回归最优预测器输出条件均值而导致潜在表示塌缩，并提出MoP-JEPA：使用硬分配混合预测器将每个预测头收敛到转移分布的一个模态，配合验证协议在OGBench离线数据和实际环境中显著超越单预测器、gated-MoE和变分基线。
AI.motivation: 标准JEPA世界模型使用单个确定性预测器通过潜在回归进行训练，但在随机环境中存在根本性结构缺陷：在分支转移处，回归最优预测器输出后继嵌入的条件均值，该均值落在真实下一状态之间，不对应任何实际状态，导致潜在表示塌缩。
AI.method: 本文提出MoP-JEPA，使用硬分配混合预测器（hard-assigned mixture-of-predictors），每个预测头收敛到转移分布的一个模态（即一个后继模式），可在单次前向传播中枚举所有模态；同时提出一套完整的验证协议，包括输入无关的码本控制、混洗上下文测试、路由器门控读出、转移精度守卫和验证路由准则，其中模型盲提转移图而仅用真实数据校验结果。
AI.result: 在OGBench离线数据上，单预测器规划成功率仅为0.02–0.09，而MoP-JEPA预测模态规划成功率可达0.85，在所有任务上领先确定性、gated-MoE和变分预测器；在验证路由准则下，MoP-JEPA在所有三个迷宫中以2–5倍优势超越最强软替代基线；协议揭示了基线原始分数中的剩余差距来源于预测了不存在的转移路径；在实际环境执行中，MoP-JEPA在 hardest 迷宫中位列七个已发布基线中的第二名。
AI.conclusion: 多模态动力学决定了JEPA世界模型是否能够进行规划；硬分配混合预测器是一种最小且可验证的修复方案。

title: SNR-Adaptive Unified Diffusion for Multi-Task Medical Image Segmentation
comment: Accepted to IEEE SMC 2026. 6 pages, 15 figures
summary: Clinical cardiac imaging pipelines currently deploy separate models for each dataset and modality, incurring redundant training costs and precluding knowledge sharing across anatomically related tasks. Consolidating semi-supervised learning, unsupervised domain adaptation, and domain generalisation into one model is therefore a practical necessity, yet naive joint training exposes a fundamental barrier: conflicting label semantics between datasets collapse LA Dice from 90.31\% to 83.38\%, while gradient imbalance across tasks of unequal complexity suppresses the weaker tasks throughout training. We present UniT-Diff, a unified diffusion segmentation framework that resolves these conflicts through three targeted mechanisms. An 11-channel task-specific output space physically partitions label categories, eliminating cross-task gradient sign reversal by construction. SNR-Adaptive Task Conditioning (SATC) scales the task token by the log signal-to-noise ratio of the current diffusion timestep, suppressing domain-specific bias during coarse denoising and restoring full task guidance as the signal clears. Task-Type-Aware Conditional Dropout (TTACD) permanently removes the task token for domain-generalisation inputs, routing them through a shared neutral pathway that draws on cross-dataset cardiac anatomy rather than source-vendor statistics. Under a single parameter set, UniT-Diff surpasses independently trained task-specific baselines on all three benchmarks simultaneously: +0.87\% on LA, +1.77\% on MMWHS, and +0.88\% on MNMS.

AI.tldr: UniT-Diff 提出了一个统一的扩散分割框架，通过任务特定输出空间、SNR自适应任务调节和条件丢弃机制，在单一参数集下同时超越三个独立训练的基线模型，解决了多数据集联合训练中的标签语义冲突和梯度不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 临床心脏成像管线通常为每个数据集和模态单独部署模型，导致训练成本冗余且阻碍跨解剖相关任务的知识共享。将半监督学习、无监督域适应和域泛化整合到单一模型中虽为实际需求，但简单的联合训练面临两大障碍：不同数据集间的标签语义冲突使LA Dice从90.31%降至83.38%，而梯度不平衡则使较弱任务在整个训练过程中被抑制。
AI.method: UniT-Diff 提出三种针对性机制解决冲突：一是11通道的任务特定输出空间，通过构造物理分割标签类别来消除跨任务梯度符号反转；二是信噪比自适应任务调节（SATC），根据当前扩散时间步的对数信噪比缩放任务令牌，在粗去噪阶段抑制域特定偏差，在信号清晰后恢复完整任务引导；三是任务类型感知条件丢弃（TTACD），对域泛化输入永久移除任务令牌，使其通过共享中性路径学习跨数据集的心脏解剖结构而非源厂商统计特征。
AI.result: 在单一参数集下，UniT-Diff 在三个基准上同时超越了独立训练的任务特定基线：LA 数据集提升 0.87%，MMWHS 数据集提升 1.77%，MNMS 数据集提升 0.88%。
AI.conclusion: UniT-Diff 证明通过精心设计的去冲突机制，统一的扩散分割框架能够在单一模型中同时处理多种学习范式并超越各自独立训练的基线，为临床多任务、多模态心脏成像的模型整合提供了可行的技术路径，其任务条件调控和特征路由策略对未来统一医学图像分析模型的设计具有借鉴意义。

title: When Simpler Is Better: Evaluating Translation Pipelines for Medieval Latin Manuscripts
summary: Despite remarkable progress in machine translation, Vision Language Models (VLMs) struggle on historical manuscripts, a domain that stresses core Natural Language Processing (NLP) capabilities: low-resource transliteration, archaic vocabulary, and noisy input signals. We present a systematic framework for evaluating the full image-to-translation pipeline on medieval Latin manuscripts, a setting in which scribal shorthand, ligatures, and parchment degradation expose failure modes that are invisible in clean-text benchmarks. Benchmarking on the CATMuS Latin dataset reveals a specialization gap: domain-specific Optical Character Recognition (OCR) models reduce character error rate by up to 4.3$\times$ compared to general-purpose VLMs, despite operating at orders of magnitude fewer parameters. We introduce the Interpres-Parallel-Corpus (IPC), a novel dataset comprising 1,383 aligned manuscript image lines, transcriptions, and expert translations, the first of its kind for medieval Latin. Our experiments uncover a complexity paradox: the simplest pipeline, a specialized OCR model feeding directly into a VLM, outperforms all multi-component variants. Adding retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) or post-OCR correction introduces prompt saturation and error propagation that degrade aggregate translation quality. These findings offer both a new benchmark and practical guidance for deploying translation systems in low-resource historical settings.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了中世纪拉丁文手稿的图像到翻译流程，发现领域专用OCR模型在字符错误率上比通用VLM低4.3倍，并提出首个中世纪拉丁文平行语料库IPC，揭示出专用OCR接VLM的简单管线优于多组件变体等复杂性悖论。
AI.motivation: 现有机器翻译在历史手稿领域存在明显空白，通用视觉语言模型在处理低资源转写、古词汇和噪声输入信号时表现不佳，而历史手稿中的抄写缩略语、连字和羊皮纸退化等问题在清洁文本基准测试中无法暴露。
AI.method: 基于CATMuS拉丁文数据集，系统评估了从图像到翻译的完整管线，提出了Interpres-Parallel-Corpus（IPC）数据集，包含1,383条对齐的手稿图像行、转录文本和专家翻译，并对比了领域专用OCR模型与通用VLM以及多种管线变体的表现。
AI.result: 领域专用OCR模型在字符错误率上比通用VLM降低高达4.3倍，尽管参数量少几个数量级；最简单的管线（专用OCR直接接入VLM）优于加入检索增强生成或后OCR校正的多组件变体，后者引发提示饱和和错误传播，降低整体翻译质量。
AI.conclusion: 研究成果为低资源历史文本翻译提供了新基准和实践指导，揭示了历史手稿翻译中简单管线优于复杂组合的复杂性悖论，强调了专用OCR的关键作用。

title: MetaSkill-Evolve: Recursive Self-Improvement of LLM Agents via Two-Timescale Meta-Skill Evolution
summary: Recent LLM agents tackle increasingly long-horizon, open-ended tasks, and external skills, reusable procedural knowledge supplied to the agent, further extend this capability. However, a fixed, hand-authored skill is rarely optimal, and cannot adapt to the diversity of tasks an agent encounters. Self-improving agents address this by rewriting their own skill files from execution traces, yielding meaningful gains on challenging benchmarks. Yet such self-evolution remains non-recursive: it improves only the task skill (what the agent does) while the improvement procedure (how it improves) is authored once and held fixed. We introduce MetaSkill-Evolve, a two-timescale framework that makes agentic skill improvement recursive: every branch carries both a task skill $s$ and a branch-local meta-skill $m=(ψ,σ,α,π,\varepsilon)$ whose five components parameterise the Analyzer, Retriever, Allocator, Proposer, and Evolver agents of the improvement pipeline. Task skills evolve on a fast loop while the meta-skill evolves on a slower one under the same pipeline applied to itself, with no additional model or objective. With all five pipeline agents sharing a single frozen backbone, MetaSkill-Evolve outperforms no-skill, static-skill, and single-level evolution baselines on three agentic benchmarks (OfficeQA, SealQA, ALFWorld), improving held-out test accuracy over the raw backbone by +23.54, +16.09, and +1.92 points respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出MetaSkill-Evolve，一种双时间尺度框架，使智能体技能改进过程本身具备递归演化能力，在三个智能体基准上显著超越无技能、静态技能和单层演化基线。
AI.motivation: 现有自改进智能体仅能优化任务技能（智能体做什么），而改进程序（如何改进）由人工编写并固定不变，无法递归演化，限制了智能体在多样化长视野开放任务中的自适应能力。
AI.method: MetaSkill-Evolve采用双时间尺度框架：每个分支同时持有任务技能s和元技能m=(ψ,σ,α,π,ε)，后者五个分量分别参数化分析器、检索器、分配器、提议器和演化器五个改进流水线智能体；任务技能在快循环上演化，元技能在同一流水线下以更慢速率对自身进行递归演化，无需额外模型或目标函数。
AI.result: 在OfficeQA、SealQA和ALFWorld三个智能体基准上，MetaSkill-Evolve相比无技能、静态技能和单层演化基线均取得最优性能，在保持测试准确率上分别比原始骨干提升+23.54、+16.09和+1.92个百分点，且所有五个流水线智能体共享单个冻结骨干。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实现了智能体技能改进过程的递归演化，证明了元技能通过自引用演化能从执行轨迹中持续优化自身改进流程，为构建真正自我进化的智能体系统提供了新范式。

title: A Multi-Task Deep Learning Framework for Real-Time Intelligent Video Surveillance with Temporal Event Validation
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. Project repository available at: https://github.com/DumitruEstera/ai-surveillance-system
summary: Modern video surveillance systems generate far more video streams than human operators can effectively monitor, making automated analysis essential for timely detection of security events. This paper presents a unified multi-task deep learning framework that simultaneously performs face recognition with zone-based authorization, automatic license plate recognition, weapon detection, fire and smoke detection, and human action recognition on a shared GPU platform. Among the integrated modules, two task-specific deep-learning models are proposed in this work to address scenarios that are insufficiently represented in publicly available datasets: a single-class weapon detector fine-tuned on a merged and relabeled dataset, achieving a mean average precision (mAP@0.5) of 0.947, and a SlowFast-R50 action recognition model trained on a purpose-built vandalism dataset comprising 614 video clips, achieving 94.33% classification accuracy. To improve robustness in continuous video, all detection modules are integrated into a temporal event-validation architecture based on multi-frame confirmation, confidence-weighted voting, and cascaded filtering, transforming frame-level predictions into reliable security events. Each module is evaluated independently on established public datasets (LFW, D-Fire, FIRESENSE, and UCF-Crime), followed by integrated end-to-end system evaluation. The proposed temporal validation strategy reduces the fire and smoke false-alarm rate from 52% to 4% and improves video license plate exact-match accuracy from 66.7% to 81.8%, while the complete framework maintains real-time operation with a per-frame latency below 100 ms on commodity hardware. These results demonstrate that combining specialized deep-learning models with temporal event validation provides an effective and practical solution for reliable real-time intelligent video surveillance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的多任务深度学习框架，集成人脸识别、车牌识别、武器检测、火烟检测及行为识别功能，并针对公开数据集不足的场景设计了单类武器检测器（mAP@0.5=0.947）和SlowFast-R50破坏行为识别模型（准确率94.33%）；通过基于多帧确认与置信度加权投票的时间事件验证架构，将烟雾火情误报率从52%降至4%，车牌准确率从66.7%提升至81.8%，并在商用硬件上实现低于100ms每帧的实时性能。
AI.motivation: 现代视频监控系统产生的视频流远超人工监控能力，亟需自动化分析实现安防事件的及时检测；同时，现有公开数据集中某些关键场景（如武器检测、破坏行为识别）的标注数据不足，限制了深度学习模型在该领域的实际部署效果。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个统一的多任务深度学习框架，在共享GPU平台上同时执行人脸识别（基于区域的授权）、车牌识别、武器检测、火烟检测及人体行为识别；其中武器检测器基于合并重标数据集微调的单类检测模型，行为识别采用在614个自建破坏行为视频片段上训练的SlowFast-R50模型；所有检测模块集成到基于多帧确认、置信度加权投票和级联过滤的时间事件验证架构中，将帧级预测转化为可靠的安全事件。
AI.result: 武器检测器在mAP@0.5上达到0.947，破坏行为识别分类准确率为94.33%；时间验证策略将火烟检测的误报率从52%降至4%，视频车牌精确匹配准确率从66.7%提升至81.8%；整套系统在商用硬件上每帧延迟低于100ms，满足实时运行要求。
AI.conclusion: 将专用深度学习模型与时间事件验证相结合，能够有效降低帧级误报、提升整体检测可靠性，为实际部署中的实时智能视频监控提供了一种实用且高效的解决方案。

title: Does It Fail to See or Fail to Know? Attributing Errors in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) perform well on visual question answering with high-quality images but struggle when questions require knowledge beyond what is clearly and directly visible. In such settings, uncertainty quantification should not only indicate whether the model is likely to fail but also diagnose why it is uncertain, across dimensions such as perception, entity recognition, and knowledge retrieval. While prior work has focused on individual failure modes in isolation or treated incorrect answers as monolithic failures, we propose a unified framework for disentangling these failure modes and investigate whether pre-generation signals can predict these failure sources. Across a range of datasets and model families, we find a consistent pattern in VLM errors: some failures arise from visual or recognition bottlenecks, while others persist after the relevant entity is identified. Our main finding is that these failure sources can be predicted before decoding: recognition-related failures are best captured by visual-token representations, while failures that remain after recognition are better captured by prompt-conditioned hidden states. This pre-generation signal enables efficient failure-source prediction before the model produces an answer, allowing uncertain cases to be routed to targeted interventions such as image repair, entity recognition support, or external retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，用于解耦视觉语言模型在视觉问答中因感知、实体识别和知识检索等不同维度导致的失败模式，并发现这些失败来源可以在模型解码之前通过预生成信号（视觉token表示或提示条件隐状态）进行预测，从而实现对不确定案例的定向干预。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在处理需要超出图像直接可见信息的知识时表现不佳，而以往的不确定性量化工作或仅关注单一失败模式，或将所有错误视为同质失败，缺乏对失败来源进行系统解耦与预测的统一框架。
AI.method: 本文提出一个统一框架，将VLM的失败模式解耦为感知/识别瓶颈和知识检索瓶颈两类，并利用预生成信号（解码前的视觉token表示和提示条件隐状态）来预测失败来源，从而在模型生成答案前识别不确定性来源。
AI.result: 在多种数据集和模型家族上，实验发现VLM错误存在一致模式：部分失败源于视觉或识别瓶颈，部分失败在相关实体被识别后仍然存在。识别相关的失败主要由视觉token表示捕捉，而识别后仍存在的失败则由提示条件隐状态更好地预测，这些预生成信号能够高效地在解码前预测失败来源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，VLM的失败来源可以在答案生成前被有效预测，从而允许将不确定案例路由到针对性的干预措施（如图像修复、实体识别支持或外部检索），为提升VLM在复杂视觉问答任务中的可靠性提供了实用路径。

title: Evaluating and Understanding Model Editing for Medical Vision Language Models
comment: Accepted to the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026. Code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/BioMed-AI-Lab-U-Michgan/M3Bench
summary:
Model editing promises a fast, targeted way to correct post-deployment mistakes in medical vision-language models (VLMs) without costly retraining. However, existing multimodal model editing benchmarks focus on general-purpose tasks and do not reflect realistic clinical domain requirements and variability. To address this, we introduce M3Bench, a clinically grounded benchmark for multimodal model editing that evaluates whether an edit remains reliable, precise, and generalizable under the challenges of image and text variation, modality and protocol shifts, clinical knowledge composition, and temporal progression. M3Bench contains 16,276 questions spanning diverse anatomy, modalities, and specialties, and supports both single and sequential edits.
  By evaluating 4 representative editors across 6 medical and general VLMs, we find that no method excels across all criteria. Gradient-based editors achieve strong transfer but suffer from catastrophic locality violations, whereas memory-based methods preserve locality but lack compositional generality and exhibit high backbone-dependent hyperparameter sensitivity. We further attribute these failures to the latent space geometry of VLMs and how different editing methods shift its landscape. Overall, M3Bench establishes a rigorous clinical stress test for multimodal model editing and offers actionable guidance for safer post-deployment adaptation. The benchmark is publicly available at https://github.com/BioMed-AI-Lab-U-Michgan/M3Bench .

AI.tldr: M3Bench是一个面向医学视觉语言模型的临床级多模态编辑基准，包含16,276个问题，涵盖多样解剖结构、模态和专业领域，用于评估模型编辑在图像/文本变化、模态/协议迁移、临床知识组合和时间演进下的可靠性、精确性和泛化性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型编辑基准主要针对通用多模态任务，缺乏对临床领域特有挑战（如图像与文本变化、模态与协议迁移、临床知识组合和时间演进）的覆盖，无法真实反映医学视觉语言模型在实际部署后的编辑需求。
AI.method: 构建了M3Bench基准，包含16,276个问题，涵盖多样解剖结构、成像模态和医学专业领域，支持单次和序列编辑两种模式；在6种医学和通用视觉语言模型上系统评估了4种代表性编辑方法（包括基于梯度和基于记忆的方法），从可靠性、精确性、泛化性三个维度进行压力测试。
AI.result: 没有一种编辑方法在所有评估标准上表现优异：基于梯度的编辑方法具有较强的迁移能力但存在严重的局部性破坏问题，而基于记忆的方法保留了局部性但缺乏组合泛化能力且对骨干模型超参数高度敏感；进一步分析表明，失败原因可归因于视觉语言模型的潜在空间几何结构以及不同编辑方法对其空间格局的改变。
AI.conclusion: M3Bench为多模态模型编辑建立了严格的临床压力测试框架，揭示了现有方法在医学领域部署中的根本性缺陷，为更安全的部署后模型适配提供了可操作的指导。

title: Text as Partial Constraint: Core-Residual Alignment for Robust Vision-Language Learning
summary: Vision-language alignment powers open-vocabulary recognition, retrieval, and LVLM grounding, yet natural captions are often underspecified, making similarity brittle and overly confident under paraphrase and omitted details. We aim to learn representations whose matching is stable across caption views and whose confidence reflects how strongly text constrains an image. We propose Text as Partial Constraint (TPC), a core-residual alignment framework that treats multi-view captions as incomplete supervision. It distills a consensus semantic core as the alignment target, learns a single-view core predictor for standard inference with one query, and explicitly discourages vision-language similarity from depending on the orthogonal unsaid residual. An uncertainty-aware contrastive objective further softens alignment when caption views disagree, reducing overconfident updates under weak language constraints. Across zero-shot recognition and adversarial robustness, TPC achieves 81.42/64.05 Top-1 clean/robust accuracy on ImageNet and 76.19/52.03 on an Avg-14 transfer suite, while improving LVLM transfer with 85.16 POPE F1 and 59.57 OKVQA accuracy under an LLaVA-1.5-7B stack. These results suggest that modeling text as a partial constraint is a practical and principled route to more reliable vision-language representations under underspecified language supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出文本作为部分约束（TPC）框架，通过核心-残差对齐将多视角字幕视为不完整监督，使视觉-语言匹配对标题视角稳定且置信度反映文本对图像的约束强度，在零样本识别、对抗鲁棒性和LVLM迁移中取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言对齐在开放词汇识别、检索和LVLM中被广泛使用，但自然语言字幕常常存在描述不充分（underspecified）的问题，导致相似度匹配在释义或细节省略时变得脆弱且过度自信。现有方法未能有效处理这种由弱语言约束带来的对齐不稳定性和置信度偏差。
AI.method: 提出Text as Partial Constraint（TPC）核心-残差对齐框架，将多视角字幕视为不完整监督，蒸馏出共识语义核心作为对齐目标，并学习单视角核心预测器以支持标准单查询推理；明确抑制视觉-语言相似度依赖于正交的未表述残差（unsaid residual），并通过不确定性感知的对比学习目标在字幕视角不一致时软化对齐、降低过度自信的更新。
AI.result: 在零样本识别和对抗鲁棒性上，TPC在ImageNet达到81.42/64.05 Top-1干净/鲁棒准确率，在Avg-14迁移套件上达到76.19/52.03；在LVLM迁移上，基于LLaVA-1.5-7B栈实现85.16 POPE F1和59.57 OKVQA准确率。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，将文本建模为部分约束是实现更可靠的视觉-语言表示的一种实用且原则性的路径，尤其是在语言监督不充分的情况下，能够有效提升对齐的稳定性和置信度的合理性。

title: OptiAgent: End-to-End Optimization Modeling via Multi-Agent Iterative Refinement
summary: We propose OptiAgent, a multi-agent framework that, given a natural language description of an Operations Research problem, is able to output a solver-ready mathematical formulation as well as executable code. Our architecture prioritizes the mathematical modeling step, where dedicated agents extract structures, such as decision variables and constraints, enabling iterative self-correction. We introduce a novel multi-loop validation architecture with four specialized feedback mechanisms, each targeting a distinct failure mode such as misinterpretation, structural defects, mathematical inconsistencies, validation failures, and code errors. Alongside accuracy, our modular design improves the process of solving optimization problems by improving transparency, as each agent exposes its reasoning and feedback, making the full modeling process auditable. Our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance on 3 out of 4 benchmarks across LP, MILP, and Nonlinear Programming tasks, while remaining highly competitive on the remaining dataset.

AI.tldr: OptiAgent是一个多智能体框架，能够将运筹学问题的自然语言描述自动转化为求解器可读的数学公式和可执行代码，通过多环验证架构和四种专用反馈机制，在LP、MILP和非线性规划任务上取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前将自然语言描述的运筹学问题转化为数学建模和可执行代码的过程高度依赖人工专家，缺乏自动化且透明的解决方案，现有方法在建模准确性、错误检测和过程可审计性方面存在明显不足。
AI.method: OptiAgent采用多智能体框架，核心是优先强化数学建模步骤，由专用智能体提取决策变量和约束等结构，支持迭代自纠正；同时引入新颖的多环验证架构，包含四种专用反馈机制，分别针对误解、结构缺陷、数学不一致性、验证失败和代码错误等不同失效模式进行定向修正，且每个智能体暴露其推理和反馈过程以实现完全可审计。
AI.result: 在LP、MILP和非线性规划任务的4个基准测试中，OptiAgent在其中3个上取得了最先进性能，在剩余1个数据集上也保持高度竞争力。
AI.conclusion: OptiAgent证明了通过模块化多智能体设计与专用反馈回路可以有效提升自动化运筹建模的准确性和透明度，为将自然语言问题描述到数学规划求解的端到端自动化提供了可行范式。

title: DistillH-Mamba: A Hypergraph-Mamba-Based Knowledge Distillation Model for Efficient Impact Fall Detection
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures. Published in IEEE Sensors Journal, 2025
summary: Falls among the elderly represent a significant public health concern due to their prevalence, consequences, and societal burden. While deep learning has improved fall detection, accurately identifying impact moments (when an individual hits the ground) remains challenging. Additionally, current algorithms often rely on complex models with high computational demands, limiting real-time deployment feasibility. In this work, we propose DistillH-Mamba, a novel architecture for impact fall detection that addresses these challenges through three key innovations: First, we introduce a hypergraph-based approach that captures higher-order relationships between multiple joints simultaneously, enabling more accurate modeling of complex interactions during impact falls. Second, we integrate the Mamba architecture with hypergraphs for impact detection, significantly accelerating processing speed while efficiently capturing both long-term dependencies and sudden skeletal motion changes. Third, we employ relational knowledge distillation that preserves crucial spatial-temporal relationships while reducing computational demands for real-time impact fall detection. Evaluated on the 3D Skeletons UP-Fall and UMAFall datasets, our DistillH-Mamba model achieves 97.38% accuracy in detecting impact within fall events and 73.8% reduction in inference time compared to its teacher model, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in both precision and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DistillH-Mamba架构，通过超图建模高阶关节关系、融合Mamba状态空间模型加速序列处理、并采用关系知识蒸馏降低计算开销，在UP-Fall和UMAFall数据集上以97.38%的冲击检测准确率和73.8%的推理时间缩减，实现了高效精准的老年人跌倒冲击检测。
AI.motivation: 老年人跌倒是重大公共卫生问题，现有深度学习方法虽提升了跌倒检测能力，但在准确识别冲击时刻（着地瞬间）方面仍存在困难，且现有模型计算复杂度高，难以满足实时部署需求。
AI.method: DistillH-Mamba架构包含三项核心创新：一是提出基于超图的方法，同时捕获多个关节点之间的高阶关系，以更精确建模跌倒冲击过程中的复杂交互；二是将Mamba架构与超图融合用于冲击检测，在捕捉长程依赖和突发骨骼运动变化的同时显著加速处理速度；三是采用关系知识蒸馏，在保留关键时空关系的同时降低计算需求，实现实时跌倒冲击检测。
AI.result: 在3D Skeletons UP-Fall和UMAFall数据集上，DistillH-Mamba模型在跌倒事件中冲击检测准确率达到97.38%，推理时间相比教师模型减少73.8%，在精度和效率上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过超图、Mamba架构与知识蒸馏的有机结合，有效解决了跌倒冲击检测中精度与效率的权衡问题，为实时跌倒检测系统的实用化部署提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Graph Sparse Sampling: Breaking the Curse of the Horizon in Continuous MDP Planning
summary: Planning under uncertainty in continuous domains is essential for autonomous systems, yet computationally demanding. Tree-based search methods such as Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) remain popular, but their branching structure can require sampling budgets that grow exponentially with lookahead depth in the worst case. From a tree perspective, continuous state or action spaces become especially challenging, since the planner must decide where to search in an infinite branching hierarchy. We propose Graph Sparse Sampling (GSS), an online planning algorithm that shares sampled futures across many candidate decisions, rather than sampling separate successors for each candidate action. This branch-free graph exposes large GPU-friendly batches, while using heuristics to focus computation. We prove finite-sample performance guarantees for GSS covering full-rank or low-rank generative simulators via smoothed backups, and discrete or sampled continuous action spaces. Under suitable overlap, regularity, and action-coverage conditions, these bounds have polynomial dependence on the planning horizon, formalizing when shared futures can avoid the exponential horizon dependence of tree-shaped sparse sampling. We demonstrate continuous-control simulations where GSS substantially outperforms tree-based planners on long horizons or achieves near-optimal performance, supporting no-branching graph planning as a complementary design principle for online control.

AI.tldr: 提出图稀疏采样（GSS）算法，通过共享未来采样轨迹实现无分支在线规划，在理论上证明其多项式级依赖规划时界的性能保证，并在连续控制任务中显著优于基于树的规划器。
AI.motivation: 连续域在线规划面临计算挑战，基于树的搜索方法（如MCTS）在最坏情况下采样预算随搜索深度指数增长，连续状态/动作空间带来的无限分支层次使得搜索决策困难。
AI.method: 提出Graph Sparse Sampling (GSS)在线规划算法，采用无分支图结构共享不同候选决策间的未来采样轨迹，替代传统树结构中为每个候选动作独立采样后继节点的做法；利用启发式方法聚焦计算资源，并通过平滑备份机制适配满秩或低秩生成模拟器。
AI.result: 理论证明在适当的交叠、正则性和动作覆盖条件下，GSS的有限样本性能保证对规划时界呈多项式依赖，形式化了共享未来采样可避免树形稀疏采样的指数级时界依赖的条件；连续控制仿真实验中，GSS在长时域任务上大幅超越基于树的规划器，或达到接近最优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 无分支图规划可作为在线控制的补充设计范式，有效缓解树形搜索在连续域中因深度增加而面临的指数级采样预算增长问题，为长时域连续控制提供更高效的计算方案。

title: Rethinking Brain Decoding with CLIP: The Role of Adversarial Robustness
summary: Brain decoding aims to uncover neural mechanisms by inferring stimulus-related representations from brain signals. In fMRI studies, this is typically achieved by mapping fMRI responses to the latent representations of computational models. Recently, CLIP has become a popular choice for brain decoding due to its rich vision--language embedding space. However, aligning fMRI signals with CLIP representations remains challenging. As CLIP is not explicitly optimized for neural alignment, its representations may capture statistically predictive cues that are only partially reflected in brain activity, limiting decoding performance. In this paper, we investigate whether adversarially robust representations improve neural decoding with CLIP. Adversarial training suppresses non-robust features and promotes more stable, perceptually structured representations, which may better align with brain activity. We evaluate this by fixing the fMRI decoder and varying only the target representation (standard CLIP vs. robust variants) on fMRI-image retrieval and zero-shot classification tasks across NSD and GOD datasets. Empirical results show that this simple change consistently improves task performance and yields stronger alignment across multiple metrics. Attribution analysis further reveals consistently low agreement between standard CLIP and its robust variants, suggesting that adversarial robustness reorganizes feature importance in the visual representation. These findings suggest that the choice of target representation influences neural decoding performance and that adversarial robustness may serve as a useful criterion for brain decoding.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将fMRI解码器固定、仅将目标表征从标准CLIP替换为对抗鲁棒CLIP变体，发现对抗鲁棒表征能显著提升脑解码在检索和零样本分类任务上的性能，表明对抗鲁棒性可作为脑解码中目标表征选择的有效准则。
AI.motivation: CLIP因其丰富的视觉-语言嵌入空间而被广泛用于fMRI脑解码，但CLIP并非为神经对齐而优化，其表征可能捕捉仅部分反映在脑活动中的统计预测线索，限制了解码性能。
AI.method: 在NSD和GOD数据集上，固定fMRI解码器不变，仅将目标表征从标准CLIP替换为对抗鲁棒CLIP变体，在fMRI-图像检索和零样本分类任务中评估解码性能，并通过归因分析对比标准CLIP与鲁棒变体的特征重要性一致性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用对抗鲁棒表征一致性地提升了fMRI-图像检索和零样本分类的性能，并在多个对齐指标上取得更强的一致性；归因分析显示标准CLIP与其鲁棒变体之间特征重要性的一致性较低，表明对抗训练重组了视觉表征的特征重要性。
AI.conclusion: 目标表征的选择显著影响神经解码性能，对抗鲁棒性可作为一种有用的脑解码准则，对抗训练抑制非鲁棒特征并促进更稳定、更具感知结构的表征，从而更好地与脑活动对齐。

title: SovereignPA-Bench: Evaluating User-Owned Personal Agents under Evolving Intent, Platform Mediation, and Consent Constraints
summary: Personal agents are becoming persistent user-owned intermediaries: they remember preferences, filter platform-mediated information, use tools, and negotiate with services. Existing benchmarks evaluate tool use, web navigation, desktop control, personalization, recommendation, and evolving context, but rarely ask whether an agent preserves user sovereignty: advancing the user's current interests while respecting privacy, consent, evidence, user burden, and resistance to manipulative incentives. We introduce SovereignPA-Bench, an executable benchmark for evaluating user-owned personal agents under evolving intent, platform mediation, privacy boundaries, consent constraints, evidence requirements, and burden tradeoffs. The benchmark separates agent-visible ObservableState from evaluator-only HiddenLabels, reports component metrics for task success, alignment, privacy, consent, evidence, manipulation, burden, and auditability, and preserves paired scenario ordering for model and policy comparisons. We evaluate 120 sovereignty stress scenarios across 4 model families and 8 policy baselines, yielding 3,840 frozen-prompt trajectories with raw prompts, outputs, provider-form responses, parsed actions, recomputable metrics, hard-set analyses, qualitative cases, and a blinded 3-annotator audit over 240 items. Full-sovereign scaffolding improves sovereignty score over direct, memory-only, consent-only, evidence-only, ReAct/tool-use, safety-prompt, and judge-guard baselines while reducing privacy leakage, consent violation, over-concession, and manipulation capture. Human audit shows high agreement on privacy and consent and lower agreement on manipulation, identifying the subjective frontier of platform-persuasion judgments. These results show that personal-agent evaluation must move beyond task completion toward representative, consent-aware, evidence-grounded action.

AI.tldr: 提出SovereignPA-Bench基准，用于评估用户拥有的个人智能体在用户主权维度（隐私、同意、证据、负担、操纵抵抗力）上的表现，实验表明全面主权脚手架优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有个人智能体基准主要集中在工具使用、网页导航、桌面控制、个性化推荐和演化上下文等任务完成能力上，但很少评估智能体是否维护用户主权——即在推进用户当前利益的同时尊重隐私、同意、证据、用户负担并对抗操纵性激励，这一评估空白亟需填补。
AI.method: 设计SovereignPA-Bench可执行基准，将智能体可见的ObservableState与仅评估者可见的HiddenLabels分离，报告任务成功、对齐、隐私、同意、证据、操纵、负担和可审计性等多维度指标，保持成对场景排序以支持模型与策略比较；在120个主权压力场景上评估4个模型家族和8个策略基线，生成3,840条冻结提示轨迹并包含原始提示、输出、解析动作、可重算指标及人工审计。
AI.result: 全面主权脚手架在主权得分上优于直接、仅记忆、仅同意、仅证据、ReAct/工具使用、安全提示和裁判守卫等基线方法，同时降低隐私泄露、同意违反、过度让步和操纵捕获率；人工审计显示在隐私和同意维度上一致性高，在操纵维度上一致性较低，揭示了平台说服判断的主观边界。
AI.conclusion: 个人智能体评估必须超越任务完成指标，转向具有代表性、同意感知、基于证据的行动评估；用户主权的多个维度（尤其是操纵抵抗力）存在主观判断边界，需要更细致的审计机制。

title: A Decomposable Probe for Few-Step Diffusion Models: Prompt, Latent, and Score Selectivity across Backbone Families and Distillation Paradigms
summary: Few-step distilled diffusion students cut text-to-image inference from ~50 to 1-8 network evaluations, but the quality gap is usually summarised by a single FID/CLIP scalar that cannot say which axis of the conditioning response changed, nor whether a behaviour comes from the architecture, the distillation objective, or simply from being a diffusion model. We replace the scalar with a decomposable probe that injects controlled perturbations along three layers (prompt encoder, denoiser input, denoiser output) under three modes (mean, variance, scale) and six strengths, reporting a bootstrap-median Bures W2^2 selectivity ratio on Inception features. Under a single matched estimator across 23 models -- five teachers and 18 distilled students spanning five backbone families (SDXL, SD1.5, SD3.5, PixArt-alpha, FLUX), three architecture classes (UNet, DiT, MMDiT), and five distillation paradigms -- the three layers read three empirically separable factors: the prompt layer is a universal prompt-mean response (a sanity channel, not a discriminator), the latent layer reads the prediction type, and the score layer reads the distillation objective. Our main result: within this sweep, the latent layer is a near-binary detector of rectified-flow backbones. Its ratio exceeds 1 across a sustained low-to-mid band only for rectified-flow models (SD3.5, FLUX); no epsilon-prediction model qualifies. A matched epsilon-prediction control (PixArt-alpha) rules out wide-T5 conditioning, and the fingerprint survives adversarial (ADD) distillation as both teacher and student. Two secondary score-layer findings hold under narrower scopes: a canonical 4-step ADD-vs-rest contrast on the UNet families with a non-ADD baseline, and a CI-separated trajectory-rollout early-strength score spike on both UNet and DiT. All ratios are CI-citable under one estimator; we release the per-cell tables and the estimator.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可分解的诊断工具（扰动探针），通过测量不同层（提示编码器、去噪器输入、输出）对条件响应的选择性比率，系统区分了蒸馏扩散模型中架构、蒸馏目标和扩散模型本征对生成质量的影响，发现潜在层是整流流模型的近二元检测器。
AI.motivation: 现有评估蒸馏扩散模型质量的方法仅依赖FID/CLIP等单一标量指标，无法区分模型性能退化是由条件响应中的哪个轴（如提示编码、潜在表示、评分预测）引起，也无法判断行为来源是架构、蒸馏目标还是扩散模型本身。缺乏可分解、可解释的诊断工具来系统定位蒸馏模型与教师模型之间的差异来源。
AI.method: 提出一种三层次（提示编码器层、去噪器输入层、去噪器输出层）、三模式（均值、方差、尺度）、六强度的可控扰动注入探针，在Inception特征上计算bootstrap中位数Bures W2^2选择性比率。对23个模型（5个教师、18个蒸馏学生）进行统一估计，涵盖5种主干族（SDXL、SD1.5、SD3.5、PixArt-alpha、FLUX）、3种架构类（UNet、DiT、MMDiT）和5种蒸馏范式。
AI.result: 三个层次对应三个经验可分离因子：提示层反映通用提示均值响应（理智通道而非判别器），潜在层读取预测类型，评分层读取蒸馏目标。核心发现：潜在层是整流流（rectified-flow）后端的近二元检测器——仅整流流模型（SD3.5、FLUX）在低到中频带比率超过1，所有epsilon预测模型均不满足；PixArt-alpha控制实验排除了宽T5条件的影响。评分层在更窄范围内发现两个次要结果：UNet族上的4步ADD-vs-rest对比，以及UNet和DiT上的轨迹卷及早强度评分尖峰。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了首个系统解耦蒸馏扩散模型行为来源的诊断工具，证明潜在层可作为整流流后端的可靠指纹，且该指纹在对抗性蒸馏（ADD）下仍保持稳健。研究为理解蒸馏扩散模型的本质行为差异提供了可复现、可引用的定量分析框架，为未来蒸馏方法设计提供了诊断依据。

title: SiamixFormer: a fully-transformer Siamese network with temporal Fusion for accurate building detection and change detection in bi-temporal remote sensing images
summary: Building detection and change detection using remote sensing images can help urban and rescue planning. Moreover, they can be used for building damage assessment after natural disasters. Currently, most of the existing models for building detection use only one image (pre-disaster image) to detect buildings. This is based on the idea that post-disaster images reduce the model's performance because of presence of destroyed buildings. In this paper, we propose a siamese model, called SiamixFormer, which uses pre- and post-disaster images as input. Our model has two encoders and has a hierarchical transformer architecture. The output of each stage in both encoders is given to a temporal transformer for feature fusion in a way that query is generated from pre-disaster images and (key, value) is generated from post-disaster images. To this end, temporal features are also considered in feature fusion. Another advantage of using temporal transformers in feature fusion is that they can better maintain large receptive fields generated by transformer encoders compared with CNNs. Finally, the output of the temporal transformer is given to a simple MLP decoder at each stage. The SiamixFormer model is evaluated on xBD, and WHU datasets, for building detection and on LEVIR-CD and CDD datasets for change detection and could outperform the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SiamixFormer的孪生网络模型，通过同时输入灾前和灾后遥感影像，利用层次化Transformer架构与时序Transformer模块进行特征融合，在建筑物检测、变化检测及灾害评估任务上均超越现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: 现有建筑物检测模型大多仅使用灾前单张影像，其假设是灾后影像中毁坏建筑物的存在会降低模型性能，这忽视了灾后影像中蕴含的灾损信息；因此亟需一种能够同时利用灾前和灾后影像、兼顾时序信息以提升建筑物检测与变化检测能力的模型。
AI.method: 提出SiamixFormer模型，采用双编码器的孪生架构，每个编码器基于层次化Transformer；两个编码器各阶段的输出被送入时序Transformer进行特征融合，其中查询（query）来自灾前影像，键值对（key, value）来自灾后影像，从而显式建模时序特征；融合后的特征再由各阶段的轻量MLP解码器输出预测结果。
AI.result: 在xBD和WHU数据集上进行建筑物检测评估，在LEVIR-CD和CDD数据集上进行变化检测评估，SiamixFormer在所有数据集上均超越了现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，联合利用灾前和灾后影像并显式建模时序特征能够显著提升建筑物检测与变化检测性能；时序Transformer在特征融合中能更好地保持Transformer编码器生成的大感受野，相比CNN方法更具优势。

title: Defending from GeoLocalization through Adversarial Road Trips
summary: Retrieval-based image geolocalization has emerged as a powerful technique for determining the location of a query image by matching it against a large, geotagged database. The success of deep learning based approaches has raised concerns regarding privacy and safety. A way to protect users from geolocalization is to design adversarial attacks for such methods. In this paper, we introduce RoadTrip Attack (RTA), a novel and highly effective targeted adversarial attack for geolocalization. RTA conceptualizes the adversarial process as finding an optimal distractor journey to a specific, attacker-chosen location. It employs a beam search algorithm to iteratively construct a sequence of incorrect geographic locations that form a path to the target. At each step, the attack generates subtle perturbations to the query image, guiding the geolocalization model toward the next location in this deceptive path. We show that our method is also strong in black-box settings, obtaining highly transferable attacks with less perceptible image artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 RoadTrip Attack (RTA)，一种针对检索式地理定位模型的高效定向对抗攻击方法，通过波束搜索算法构造通向攻击者指定位置的欺骗性路径，并沿路径逐点施加微小扰动，在黑盒场景下也表现出强迁移性和低可感知性。
AI.motivation: 基于深度学习的地理定位技术日益强大，引发了关于用户隐私与安全的严重担忧；现有对抗攻击方法在多步定向攻击和黑盒迁移性方面仍存在不足，亟需一种能够有效保护用户免受地理定位模型识别的高效攻击方法。
AI.method: RTA 将对抗攻击建模为寻找一条通向攻击者指定目标位置的“最优干扰旅程”，采用波束搜索算法迭代构造一个由错误地理位置序列构成的欺骗性路径，每一步对查询图像施加细微扰动，引导地理定位模型沿该路径逐步偏离真实位置并最终到达目标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，RTA 在定向攻击任务中取得了高成功率，产生的图像伪影较少且不易感知；在黑盒设置下，攻击依然具有较强的迁移能力，表明该方法在实际部署场景中具有广泛适用性和对抗鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RTA 提供了一种新的对抗攻击范式，将攻击过程概念化为路径规划问题，揭示了地理定位模型在面对结构化、逐级欺骗性扰动时的脆弱性，为后续隐私保护与防御机制研究提供了重要启示。

title: LBTCap: A Lightweight Bilateral Transformer for Real-Time Remote Sensing Image Change Captioning
summary: Remote sensing image change captioning (RSICC) generates natural-language descriptions of semantic changes between paired remote sensing images (RSIs), supporting applications such as urban planning, disaster response, and environmental monitoring. Although recent methods achieve strong captioning accuracy, most overlook computational efficiency and inference speed, which are essential for real-time deployment in practice. To this end, we propose LBTCap, a lightweight RSICC framework built on a bilateral Transformer that jointly models pre- and post-change features for efficient processing of paired RSIs. Specifically, we introduce a bilateral attention mechanism for paired inputs: the two temporal images are projected into separate queries and keys by the same query and key matrices shared across the two images, the value is formed from their concatenation, and the two resulting attention maps are combined by a learnable, structurally bilateral weighting instead of a fixed subtraction. This design keeps both temporal branches explicit while remaining compact, and, together with a truncated backbone and grouped-query attention, LBTCap uses only 39.99M parameters, of which the change-aware encoder accounts for just 2.78M. Extensive experiments on two public RSICC datasets show that LBTCap matches or closely approaches the accuracy of state-of-the-art methods while using far fewer parameters and running at markedly higher inference speed, with the benefit of the bilateral formulation most pronounced in the low-resource setting, demonstrating a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off for practical RSICC.

AI.tldr: 提出LBTCap，一种基于双边Transformer的轻量级遥感图像变化字幕框架，通过双边注意力机制、截断骨干网络和分组查询注意力以39.99M参数（变化编码器仅2.78M）达到与SOTA方法相当或接近的精度，同时显著提升推理速度，在低资源场景下优势尤为明显。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感图像变化字幕方法虽然取得了较高的字幕生成精度，但大多忽视了计算效率和推理速度，难以满足实际场景中实时部署的需求。
AI.method: LBTCap构建于双边Transformer之上，提出一种面向配对输入的双边注意力机制：两个时相图像通过共享的查询矩阵和键矩阵分别投影为各自的查询和键，值由两者拼接而成，两个注意力图通过可学习的结构双边权重（而非固定减法）进行组合；同时结合截断骨干网络和分组查询注意力来减少参数量。
AI.result: 在两个公开RSICC数据集上，LBTCap仅使用39.99M总参数（变化感知编码器仅2.78M）即达到与最先进方法相当或接近的精度，同时推理速度显著提升，在低资源设置下双边公式的优势最为突出。
AI.conclusion: LBTCap在精度与效率之间取得了良好的平衡，为实际RSICC应用提供了一种可行的轻量级方案，验证了双边注意力机制在保持双时相显式建模的同时实现紧凑设计的有效性。

title: Beyond Post-Quantization: Native Hash Learning with a Dedicated HASH Token
summary: Efficient large-scale image retrieval requires compact representations that preserve semantic similarity under fast Hamming-space search. Deep hashing is appealing, but most existing CNN- and ViT-based methods still follow a post-quantization paradigm, where continuous visual features are first learned and binary codes are then produced by a terminal hash projection or binarization operation. This late code generation creates a feature-to-code discrepancy between the continuously optimized representation space and the discrete Hamming space used for retrieval. To address this limitation, we propose HashViT, a Vision Transformer framework for native hash token learning. Instead of treating hashing as a terminal readout, HashViT introduces a dedicated HASH token that serves as a persistent, hash-oriented retrieval state inside the transformer. The HASH token is structurally decomposed into a Hash Register for direct binary code generation and a Semantic Workspace for preserving auxiliary continuous semantics. To enable effective workspace-to-register interaction, we further design a lightweight Hash Refinement Adapter that progressively refines the Hash Register across transformer layers. As a result, binary-oriented representations are formed through token evolution within the backbone, rather than being abruptly induced by an output-level projection. HashViT is optimized with a unified objective that combines learnable semantic center supervision, class-token similarity distillation, and quantization regularization, encouraging the HASH token to encode semantically structured and compact binary representations. Extensive experiments on three widely used benchmarks demonstrate that HashViT achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive retrieval performance while preserving the efficiency of compact Hamming codes. Code is available at https://github.com/Xinze919/HashViT.

AI.tldr: HashViT提出了一种原生哈希标记学习框架，通过在Vision Transformer中引入结构化解耦的HASH token（包含哈希寄存器和语义工作区）以及轻量级哈希精炼适配器，直接在骨干网络内部渐进式生成紧致二值化表示，避免了传统后量化方法中连续特征空间与汉明空间之间的特征-编码不一致问题，在多个基准上达到了最先进的图像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN和ViT的深度哈希方法普遍遵循后量化范式，即先学习连续视觉特征，再通过末端的哈希投影或二值化操作产生二值编码，这种晚期编码方式导致连续优化表示空间与离散汉明检索空间之间存在特征-编码不一致（feature-to-code discrepancy），限制了检索性能。
AI.method: HashViT提出在Vision Transformer中引入一个专用的HASH token，作为持久的、面向哈希的检索状态；该token在结构上解耦为哈希寄存器（Hash Register，直接生成二值编码）和语义工作区（Semantic Workspace，保留辅助连续语义），并设计了轻量级哈希精炼适配器（Hash Refinement Adapter）在跨Transformer层之间渐进式精炼哈希寄存器，使二值化表示通过骨干网络内部的token演化自然形成而非通过输出层投影突兀产生；优化目标融合了可学习语义中心监督、类别token相似度蒸馏和量化正则化。
AI.result: 在三个广泛使用的图像检索基准数据集上的大量实验表明，HashViT取得了最先进或极具竞争力的检索性能，同时保持了紧致汉明码的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明通过在骨干网络内部原生化地学习哈希token而非在输出端进行后量化，能够有效消除特征空间与哈希空间的不一致性，为深度哈希检索提供了一种新的范式；代码已开源。

title: Brand-as-Memory: Vision-Language Models Encode Causal, Mechanistically Localizable Credibility Priors for News Sources
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) increasingly read news and web content as images, where the publisher's identity is visually present. We show that VLMs carry a strong source-credibility prior keyed on outlet identity, and study it along three axes. (i) Cross-model benchmark. We introduce CueTrust, a cross-model diagnostic that measures which surface source cue overrides an article's content evidence via a Source-Override Index (SOI). Across seven VLMs and five cues, the vulnerability profile is model- and scale-dependent, and the override is outlet-identity-specific and encoding-invariant, firing from the masthead name, the logo image, or the bare domain, but not from a named author, in-text authority, or page layout (clean negative controls). (ii) Mechanistic account. For the brand cue, we give a full mechanistic account: swapping only the masthead moves credibility across an approximately 11 log-odds range that tracks professional ratings (rho = 0.88 with Media Bias/Fact Check). The prior is dual-coded (name and logo), strengthens with scale, is causally formed at layers 19-21, carried by interpretable seed-stable sparse-autoencoder features, and recurs at the same relative locus in a second model family. It overrides content (about 1.8x) as a signal-magnitude effect within a shared pathway, not a privileged route. Steering the localized direction selectively reduces the override (41% reduction) and generalizes to held-out outlets, confirming the prior is causally used, not merely decodable. Deployed VLMs may thus defer to source identity over the evidence in front of them, a reliability failure we can measure across models, localize, and causally probe. We release the stimulus suite and CueTrust.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了视觉语言模型（VLM）在阅读新闻图像时存在基于媒体标识的源可信度先验，通过CueTrust诊断框架和源覆盖指数（SOI）跨模型测量了这种覆盖效应，并从机制上定位了其神经基础，表明部署的VLM会优先考虑来源身份而非文本内容证据。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在读取新闻和网页图像时，会接触到视觉呈现的发布者身份信息，但学界尚不清楚VLM是否以及如何利用这些源可信度线索，以及这种先验是否可能覆盖实际内容证据，构成可靠性隐患。
AI.method: 论文提出CueTrust跨模型诊断框架，通过源覆盖指数（SOI）量化表面源线索对文章内容证据的覆盖强度；对7种VLM和5种线索进行系统评估；采用消融实验、对数几率分析、稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征提取、激活干预（steering）等方法进行机制性因果分析。
AI.result: 源覆盖效应具有模型和规模依赖性，且仅针对媒体品牌标识（报头名称、Logo图像、裸域名）触发，而对具名作者、文中权威引用或页面布局等对照线索无反应；仅替换报头即可使可信度产生约11 log-odds的变化，与专业评分相关性达rho=0.88；先验在层19-21因果形成，由可解释的种子稳定SAE特征承载，信号量级上可覆盖内容证据约1.8倍；通过定向激活干预可减少41%的覆盖效应并泛化到未见媒体。
AI.conclusion: 部署的VLM存在一种系统性的源可信度先验，使其可能优先考虑来源身份而非实际文本证据，这是一种可跨模型测量、可定位和可因果探测的可靠性失效；研究提供了刺激套件和CueTrust框架以供后续研究使用。

title: WorldBagel: Uncovering the Power of Unified Multimodal Models for Vision-Language-Action-World Modeling
summary: World models aim to capture environment dynamics in ways that support perception, reasoning, and action, and have recently become a central direction in Vision-Language-Action-World (VLAW) modeling. Meanwhile, unified vision-language models have demonstrated strong multimodal generation capabilities, yet their potential as world models remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce \texttt{WorldBagel}, a unified VLAW framework built on BAGEL, a modern multimodal unified model, and use it to systematically investigate the role of unification in world modeling. Across multi-task robotic manipulation and cross-domain experiments, \texttt{WorldBagel} consistently outperforms task-specific alternatives and learns action representations that are more structured and semantically aligned with visual and linguistic context. Experiments on LIBERO, Language Table, and Franka show that unification is not only an architectural convenience, but also a key factor in learning effective VLAW models, leading to consistent empirical gains and deeper insights into multimodal world modeling. Code and model checkpoints will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WorldBagel，一个基于统一多模态模型BAGEL构建的VLAW（视觉-语言-动作-世界）框架，通过系统实验证明模型统一性不仅是架构便利性，更是学习有效世界模型的关键因素，在多项机器人操作任务中优于任务特定方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管世界模型在VLAW建模中日益重要，且统一视觉-语言模型已展现强大的多模态生成能力，但其作为世界模型的潜力尚未得到充分探索，统一性在世界建模中的具体作用也缺乏系统性研究。
AI.method: 本文提出WorldBagel框架，构建于BAGEL这一现代多模态统一模型之上，通过统一的架构进行视觉、语言、动作和世界（VLAW）建模，并在多任务机器人操作和跨域实验中进行系统评估。
AI.result: 在LIBERO、Language Table和Franka等基准上，WorldBagel在多项机器人操作任务中一致优于任务特定替代方案，其学到的动作表示在结构和语义上与视觉及语言上下文更加对齐，验证了统一性带来的持续经验增益。
AI.conclusion: 统一性不仅是架构上的便利，更是学习有效VLAW世界模型的关键因素，为多模态世界建模提供了更深入的理解和实证依据。

title: Flex-Forcing: Towards a Unified Autoregressive and Bidirectional Video Diffusion Model
summary: Recent progress in large-scale generative models has substantially advanced video generation, yet existing methods remain constrained by a rigid inference paradigm. Bidirectional diffusion models excel at global coherence and visual fidelity but suffer from slow inference, while autoregressive models offer efficient and streaming generation at the cost of long-range consistency and exposure bias. We introduce Flex-Forcing, a unified training and inference framework that enables a video diffusion model to seamlessly operate under both bidirectional and autoregressive generation regimes. The core idea is a flexible chunking mechanism jointly defined over the temporal axis and denoising steps. This design allows the model to (1) perform flexible chunking according to different device budgets, (2) perform bidirectional inference across chunks for global structure planning, while generating frames autoregressively within each chunk for efficient and fine-grained synthesis, and (3) perform any-order, any-timestep autoregressive generation without the strict causal constraint. Extensive experiments on multiple video generation benchmarks demonstrate that Flex-Forcing achieves consistently better video quality, long-video stability than strong baselines with a rigid inference schedule, while offering faster inference.

AI.tldr: Flex-Forcing 提出了一种统一的训练与推理框架，使视频扩散模型能够在双向全局规划和自回归逐块高效生成两种模式间无缝切换，在提升视频质量和长视频稳定性的同时实现更快推理。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法存在刚性推理范式的局限：双向扩散模型虽全局连贯性和视觉保真度高但推理缓慢，自回归模型虽高效且支持流式生成但长程一致性差且存在曝光偏差。本文旨在统一两种范式的优势，解决速度与质量之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: Flex-Forcing 提出一种基于时间轴与去噪步骤联合定义的灵活分块机制（flexible chunking），使视频扩散模型能同时支持双向推理（跨块规划全局结构）和自回归帧生成（块内高效精细合成），且无需严格因果约束即可实现任意顺序、任意时间步的自回归生成。
AI.result: 在多个视频生成基准上的实验表明，Flex-Forcing 在视频质量和长视频稳定性上一致优于具有刚性推理调度的强基线方法，同时推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: Flex-Forcing 通过统一双向与自回归生成范式，有效克服了现有方法的刚性推理限制，为兼顾生成质量、长程一致性与推理效率提供了可行的训练与推理框架，并展示了柔性分块机制在设计可扩展视频生成模型中的潜力。

title: EPRA U-Net: An Efficient Pyramid Residual Attention Framework for Accurate Infarct Segmentation in Diffusion-Weighted MRI
summary: Objective: Accurate identification of acute ischemic infarcts on diffusion-weighted magnetic resonance imaging (DWI) is a critical prerequisite for reliable lesion quantification and effective clinical decision support in the management of cerebrovascular events. Methods: This study presents EPRA U-Net (Efficient Pyramid Residual Attention U-Net), a task-specific integrated architecture for efficient and accurate infarct segmentation of DWI images. In the proposed architecture, an EfficientNet-based encoder was used as a hierarchical feature extractor with a minimized parameterization. In addition, a Residual-Recurrent (R2) block (recurrent unrolling step t = 2, following the original formulation) and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) were integrated to enhance the performance of spatial dependency modeling. Additionally, a dual attention mechanism was incorporated to highlight lesion-related activations while concurrently enabling the suppression of extraneous background responses. To prioritize lesion detection consistent with clinical imperative, a Tversky loss function was adopted, emphasizing the sensitivity of detection over its specificity during the optimization process. Results: Experimental evaluations were conducted utilizing an in-house dataset comprising 167 patients with 4,895 DWI slices; subsequently, the performance of the proposed EPRA U-Net was assessed in comparison with state-of-the-art models, specifically UNet++, DeepLabV3+, and TransUNet. The experimental results suggest that EPRA U-Net attained superior performance, evidenced by a pixel-aggregated Dice of 0.8984, a per-sample Dice of 0.9469, an IoU of 0.8155, a Recall of 0.8887, a Lesion F1 of 0.9378, and an HD95 of 11.62 px. Furthermore, a clear reduction in the rate of missed lesions, specifically by 16%, 25%, and 29%, was observed when compared with UNet++, DeepLabV3+, and TransUNet, respectively.

AI.tldr: EPRA U-Net 是一种集成 EfficientNet 编码器、R2 模块、ASPP 和双重注意力机制的高效 DWI 脑梗死分割架构，采用 Tversky 损失优化灵敏度，在内部数据集上取得了优越的 Dice 和 Recall 性能，并将漏检率相比 UNet++、DeepLabV3+ 和 TransUNet 分别降低 16%、25% 和 29%。
AI.motivation: 急性缺血性梗死灶在 DWI 图像上的准确识别对于可靠的病灶量化和临床决策支持至关重要，但现有分割方法在病灶检测灵敏度与漏检率方面仍有不足，亟需一种兼具高效参数化和高灵敏度检测能力的专用分割架构。
AI.method: 提出 EPRA U-Net（Efficient Pyramid Residual Attention U-Net）架构，采用 EfficientNet 作为层次化特征提取器以最小化参数量；集成 Residual-Recurrent (R2) 模块（循环展开步数 t=2）和空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）以增强空间依赖建模能力；引入双重注意力机制以突出病灶相关激活并抑制无关背景响应；采用 Tversky 损失函数替代 Dice 损失，优先提升检测灵敏度而非特异性。
AI.result: 在包含 167 名患者、共 4,895 张 DWI 切片的内部数据集上，EPRA U-Net 取得了像素聚合 Dice 0.8984、每样本 Dice 0.9469、IoU 0.8155、Recall 0.8887、病灶 F1 0.9378 和 HD95 11.62 px 的优越性能；相比 UNet++、DeepLabV3+ 和 TransUNet，漏检率分别降低了 16%、25% 和 29%。
AI.conclusion: EPRA U-Net 通过多组件集成设计与 Tversky 损失优化，在 DWI 梗死分割任务上显著优于当前主流方法，尤其在大幅降低漏检率方面契合临床对高灵敏度的核心需求，为缺血性卒中影像的自动化定量分析提供了有效方案。

title: Token-Based Affordance Grounding with Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Affordance grounding aims to localize image regions that support a specific action, serving as a core capability for physical intelligence and embodied perception. Previous studies have primarily relied on weakly supervised learning with action labels from exocentric images. However, these methods often struggle with visually ambiguous exocentric images containing co-occurring actions; moreover, they fail to distinguish semantically similar actions because existing methods typically rely on brief action phrases that lack rich semantic details for action-specific localization. Although large vision-language models (LVLMs) encode rich action semantics and their action-conditioned textual outputs implicitly contain spatial cues, they do not directly provide action-specific spatial localization. To address these problems, we propose TokAG, a zero-shot affordance grounding framework that exploits the token-level semantic-spatial signals in LVLMs to localize action-relevant regions without external supervision. We observe that attention maps associated with different LVLM output tokens vary significantly, with many attending to irrelevant regions such as the background. Thus, we introduce a spatial-aware token-selection mechanism to systematically evaluate each output token and select the one whose attention maps exhibit dominant activation over the target object, instead of relying on arbitrary attention maps. By extracting these object-focused attention maps, we transform the LVLM's implicit semantic signals into zero-shot affordance heatmaps. Our zero-shot framework consistently outperforms prior weakly supervised approaches across multiple benchmarks, improving NSS by 10.7% on the unseen split of AGD20K and by 29.7% on HICO-IIF. The code and models will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TokAG，一种利用大型视觉语言模型中token级语义-空间信号的零样本可供性定位框架，通过空间感知的token选择机制提取聚焦于目标对象的注意力图，无需外部监督即可生成可供性热图，在多个基准上显著超越先前的弱监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有可供性定位方法主要依赖弱监督学习，但面临两大问题：外中心图像中并发动作导致视觉模糊，以及简短动作短语缺乏丰富语义细节，难以区分语义相似的动作。虽然大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）编码了丰富的动作语义，但其输出仅提供隐式空间线索，无法直接实现动作特定的空间定位。
AI.method: TokAG提出一种零样本可供性定位框架，通过空间感知的token选择机制系统评估LVLM的每个输出token，选取注意力图在目标对象上呈现主导激活的token，而非使用任意注意力图；然后将这些聚焦于对象的注意力图转换为零样本可供性热图，将LVLM的隐式语义信号转化为显式空间定位。
AI.result: TokAG在多个基准上一致优于先前的弱监督方法：在AGD20K的未见分割上NSS提升10.7%，在HICO-IIF上NSS提升29.7%。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明，通过精心选择LVLM中具有空间感知能力的输出token，可以有效将隐式语义信号转化为精确的零样本动作空间定位，为无需外部监督的可供性定位提供了新范式。

title: A Step Towards Robust Unsupervised Domain Adaptation via Fine-Tuning and Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted and presented at the 28th European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI 2025), Bologna, Italy
