summary: Adversarial robustness in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) remains a significant challenge due to noisy pseudo labels and inherent distributional shifts between the clean source and adversarially perturbed target domains. Existing approaches often fail to achieve an optimal trade-off between robustness and accuracy, as pseudo-labels generated by domain-adapted models tend to introduce classification errors under adversarial attacks. In this work, we propose \textbf{SFT+RL}, a two-stage robust UDA framework that integrates Supervised Fine Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) on top of CLIP's pre-trained visual encoder. In the SFT stage, we adversarially fine-tune a linear classifier using PGD-based perturbations over the labelled source domain while partially unfreezing CLIP's projection layer. It allows adaptation to adversarial noise while preserving CLIP's rich semantic priors. We introduce a confidence-guided pseudo-labeling strategy in the RL stage to annotate unlabeled target samples progressively. Pseudo labels are filtered using a decaying confidence threshold to balance quality and coverage, and the model is trained on a composite dataset formed by combining clean source samples with high-confidence target samples. Adversarial training is applied to mixed batches of clean and adversarial examples to enhance cross-domain robustness. Comprehensive evaluations on three benchmark datasets OfficeHome~\cite{tomm-ude}, PACS~\cite{pacs}, and VisDA~\cite{visda} demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Notably, \textbf{SFT+RL} achieves average improvements of \textbf{10.2\%} in clean accuracy and \textbf{15.8\%} in adversarial robustness across all three datasets, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出SFT+RL两阶段鲁棒UDA框架，在CLIP视觉编码器上结合监督微调与强化学习，通过置信度引导的伪标签策略和对抗训练，在三个基准数据集上分别实现10.2%的干净准确率和15.8%的对抗鲁棒性平均提升。
AI.motivation: 无监督域适应中的对抗鲁棒性面临两大挑战：噪声伪标签和源域与受扰目标域之间的固有分布偏移。现有方法生成的伪标签在对抗攻击下引入分类错误，难以在鲁棒性与准确率之间取得最优平衡。
AI.method: 提出SFT+RL两阶段框架：在SFT阶段，基于CLIP预训练视觉编码器，使用PGD扰动对带标签源域进行对抗微调线性分类器并部分解冻CLIP投影层，在适配对抗噪声的同时保留语义先验；在RL阶段，采用置信度引导的伪标签策略以衰减阈值渐进标注无标签目标样本，结合干净源样本与高置信度目标样本构建混合数据集，对干净与对抗样本的混合批次进行对抗训练以增强跨域鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在OfficeHome、PACS和VisDA三个基准数据集上的全面评估表明，SFT+RL在所有数据集上平均提升干净准确率10.2%、对抗鲁棒性15.8%，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合CLIP语义先验的对抗微调与强化学习渐进伪标签策略，能够有效兼顾无监督域适应中的准确率与对抗鲁棒性，为鲁棒UDA提供了高效且可扩展的新范式。

title: IDEAL-Bench: Indoor Dataset and Evaluation suite for Analyzing 3D Layout reasoning
summary: Spatial question answering is the dominant paradigm for evaluating spatial intelligence in Vision-Language Models (VLMs), but it leaves a complementary axis of spatial competence under-evaluated: holistic 3D layout inference, which predicts every visible object's pose and extent from a single image in a structured form. To this end, we introduce IDEAL-Bench, an evaluation suite that requires VLMs to predict structured 3D layouts on photorealistic indoor scenes across 10 room types, scored along five numerical dimensions and a perceptual render-and-compare protocol. By operating on semantically realistic scenes with full asset substitution under controlled lighting and viewpoint, IDEAL-Bench moves beyond CLEVR-style simple geometric primitives so that any image-space discrepancy reflects spatial reasoning alone. The benchmark is built on IDEAL-Scenes, a procedurally generated dataset of 1,000 re-renderable Blender environments with ground-truth layouts. Evaluating 15 prominent VLMs reveals three findings: the task remains substantially unsolved, with the strongest model reaching only 62.1/100 overall; all models exhibit a sharp asymmetry between object recognition and geometric regression, indicating that current VLMs are trained to describe scenes rather than to measure them; model rankings partially diverge from those on QA-based and primitive-reconstruction benchmarks: top-tier consensus holds, but mid-tier rankings shift substantially. Collectively, these findings establish IDEAL-Bench as a diagnostic suite, targeting the geometric and structural competencies that QA-based evaluation cannot surface, and paving the way towards more rigorous evaluation of spatial intelligence in next-generation VLMs. Together, these findings position IDEAL-Bench as a principled diagnostic for whether future VLMs achieve genuine spatial understanding rather than linguistic approximations of it.

AI.tldr: IDEAL-Bench 是一个用于评估 VLM 从单张图像推理结构化 3D 布局能力的基准，包含 10 种室内场景类型的 1000 个可重渲染环境；实验表明该任务远未解决，最强模型得分仅 62.1/100，且所有模型在物体识别与几何回归之间存在严重不对称性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）的空间智能评估主要依赖空间问答（QA）范式，无法有效衡量模型从单张图像推断每个可见物体的完整位姿与范围（即结构化 3D 布局推理）这一互补轴上的能力，导致对 VLM 空间理解能力的评估存在空白。
AI.method: 构建了 IDEAL-Scenes，一个通过程序化生成的包含 1000 个可重渲染 Blender 环境并带有真实布局的数据集；在此基础上提出 IDEAL-Bench 评估套件，要求 VLM 对涵盖 10 种房间类型的光真实室内场景预测结构化 3D 布局，沿五个数值维度以及一个基于渲染-比较的感知协议进行评分；通过语义真实的场景（完整资产替换、受控光照与视角）确保任何图像空间差异仅反映空间推理能力。
AI.result: 对 15 种主流 VLM 的评估表明：该任务远未解决，最强模型总体得分仅 62.1/100；所有模型均表现出物体识别与几何回归之间的严重不对称性，表明当前 VLM 更擅长描述场景而非测量场景；模型排名与基于 QA 及原始图元重建的基准部分出现分化——头部模型共识一致，但中游排名变化显著。
AI.conclusion: IDEAL-Bench 建立了一个能够揭示 QA 评估无法触达的几何与结构能力缺陷的诊断性基准，为判断未来 VLM 是否真正实现空间理解（而非语言近似）提供了原则性评估工具。

title: A Vision Based System for Guided and Collaborative Reconstruction of Fragmented Documents
comment: The paper was presented at MetroArchaeo 2024 in Malta. Publication in Springer Proceedings is still delayed
summary: This paper presents the development and evaluation of a collaborative system for real-time reconstruction of fragmented paper documents in the context of cultural heritage preservation. The developed system includes a collaborative robot, or cobot, that can fully manage the positioning of paper fragments using a specially designed vacuum-based suction attachment. This attachment enables gentle and precise positioning, ensuring the preservation of fragile materials. With this device, we are able to achieve a positioning repeatability of 0.57mm for fragments of 8cm^2. The system offers users the flexibility to choose between manual positioning, with visual guidance, or fully automated positioning performed by the cobot. To further improve the reconstruction process, AI methods for image interpretation, specifically for segmentation and positioning tasks, were applied and evaluated for their applicability to template-based reconstruction of damaged paper fragments. Our investigation provides critical insights into the performance of different local feature matching methods under different document types, taking into account rotation, scale robustness, and the degree of damage to the fragments. With a focus on the reconstruction of damaged and optically altered archival material, SE2-LoFTR, a detector-free local feature matching method, was chosen as the preferred method for the system due to its robust performance in our experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了一个结合协作机器人、真空吸附装置和AI图像匹配方法的协同系统，用于文化遗产保护中受损纸质碎片的实时重建，其中SE2-LoFTR因其在旋转、尺度鲁棒性和损伤适应性上的优异表现被选为最优局部特征匹配方法。
AI.motivation: 文化遗产保护中，纸质文档碎片的重建通常依赖人工操作，效率低且难以精确处理脆弱材料；现有自动化方法在处理受损、光学变形的档案材料时，缺乏兼顾精确定位与材料保护的集成系统，且不同局部特征匹配方法在碎片重建场景下的适用性尚未被系统评估。
AI.method: 开发了一个包含协作机器人的协同重建系统，机器人通过专门的真空吸力附件实现对纸质碎片的轻柔、精确定位；系统支持人工引导定位和全自动定位两种模式；同时应用并评估了多种AI图像分割与定位方法，重点比较了不同局部特征匹配方法在旋转、尺度鲁棒性和碎片损伤程度下的表现，最终选定无检测器的局部特征匹配方法SE2-LoFTR作为最优方案。
AI.result: 该系统对8cm²大小的纸质碎片实现了0.57mm的定位重复精度；实验表明SE2-LoFTR在受损和光学变形的档案材料上，相较于其他局部特征匹配方法表现出更强的旋转与尺度鲁棒性及损伤适应性，被选为系统首选方法。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，将协作机器人、真空吸附装置与先进的AI局部特征匹配方法（如SE2-LoFTR）相结合，能够有效实现受损纸质文档碎片的自动化精确重建，为文化遗产数字化修复提供了可行的技术路径和关键方法选择依据。

title: RADIO1D: Elastic Representations for Condensed Vision Modeling
comment: Published as main conference paper at ICML 2026
summary: This paper challenges the assumption that vision-language models (VLMs) require fixed patch-based 2D vision features. Analyzing fine-tuned vision encoders, we find that representations become increasingly abstract and less spatially coherent during VLM training. Notably, models trained with image-text alignment (such as SigLIP2) develop a small number of specialized tokens that effectively summarize global image content. Building on this, we introduce RADIO1D, which compresses images into a compact, variable-length 1D token sequence using multi-teacher knowledge distillation and an autoencoder design. The resulting representations exhibit strong hierarchical summarization, enabling accurate scene understanding - even with a single token - and support improved composition-aware image retrieval. In VLMs, RADIO1D provides flexible accuracy-efficiency tradeoffs through adjustable token counts, delivering competitive performance on diverse multimodal benchmarks with lower computational overhead and better accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RADIO1D，通过多教师知识蒸馏和自编码器设计将图像压缩为紧凑、可变长度的一维token序列，挑战了VLM需固定块状2D视觉特征的假设，在降低计算开销的同时在多项多模态基准上取得具有竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）通常依赖固定块状的2D视觉特征，但研究发现微调后的视觉编码器表征变得愈发抽象且空间一致性降低，说明固定2D网格并非最优设计，亟需更灵活高效的视觉表征形式。
AI.method: 本文提出RADIO1D，采用多教师知识蒸馏（Multi-Teacher Knowledge Distillation）结合自编码器（Autoencoder）设计，将图像压缩为紧凑且长度可变的1D token序列；通过分析SigLIP2等图像-文本对齐训练模型，发现其形成了少量专门用于汇总全局图像内容的特殊token，RADIO1D进一步利用这一特性实现层级化摘要表征。
AI.result: RADIO1D生成的表征展现出强大的层级化摘要能力，单token即可实现准确的场景理解，并支持改进的、对组合信息敏感的图像检索；在VLM中，通过可调节的token数量提供了灵活的精度-效率权衡，在多种多模态基准上以更低的计算开销取得了具有竞争力的性能，甚至在某些场景下精度更高。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了VLM训练中视觉特征逐渐抽象化的现象，并证明一维可压缩token序列可有效替代传统固定2D网格特征，为构建更高效、更灵活的视觉语言模型提供了新范式，在计算效率与性能之间实现了更优的平衡。

title: Do Medical Vision Language Models Actually See? A Counterfactual Grounding Framework and Hard-Negative Contrastive Training for Visually-Reliant Medical VLMs
summary: Large vision language models (VLMs) report strong accuracy on medical question-answering, yet it remains unclear whether they reason from visual evidence or exploit textual shortcuts. We introduce a counterfactual evaluation framework that decouples visual and textual contributions by substituting input images with controlled surrogates blank, pixel-shuffled, image-absent, and CLIP-retrieved hard negatives and derive a suite of grounding metrics including the Visual Reliance Score (VRS) and Visual Hallucination Rate (VHR). We further introduce CORAL (COntrastive Retrieval-Augmented Learning), a 7B-parameter LoRA fine-tune of Qwen2.5-VL-7B trained with a Contrastive Grounding Objective (CGO) that penalises answer invariance under hard-negative image swaps. On a paired controlled evaluation across four closed-form medical VQA benchmarks (PathVQA, PMC-VQA, SLAKE, VQA-RAD; n=400 total), CORAL improves macro accuracy by +6.7 pp (P(Delta>0)=0.988) and reduces VHR by 8.0 pp (P<0.001) over the matched Qwen2.5-VL-7B base; neither MedVLThinker RL variant achieves a significant gain on either metric. Cross-domain diagnostics further reveal that image substitution costs only <=6.5 pp on medical benchmarks versus 48-61 pp on general-domain tasks, situating the grounding gap that CGO targets. We discuss evaluation limitations openly including train/eval benchmark overlap and underpowered secondary metrics and release our framework, training code, and model weights to support reproducible grounding audits of medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个反事实评估框架(CORAL)，用于解耦视觉语言模型在医学问答中的视觉与文本贡献，并通过对比检索增强学习和对比基础目标训练，将7B参数Qwen2.5-VL-7B在四个医学VQA基准上的宏观准确率提升6.7个百分点，同时将视觉幻觉率降低8.0个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型(VLM)在医学问答上表现出高准确率，但其推理过程是否真正依赖视觉证据而非利用文本捷径尚不明确，缺乏系统性的评估方法来解耦视觉与文本贡献，因此需要一种可控的反事实评估框架来量化VLM的视觉依赖程度和视觉幻觉问题。
AI.method: 提出了反事实评估框架，通过将输入图像替换为空白、像素打乱、图像缺失和CLIP检索的硬负样本等受控替代物来解耦视觉与文本贡献，并衍生出视觉依赖分数(VRS)和视觉幻觉率(VHR)等基础指标；进一步提出CORAL架构，基于Qwen2.5-VL-7B进行7B参数规模的LoRA微调，采用对比基础目标(CGO)函数惩罚模型在硬负样本图像交换下的答案不变性。
AI.result: 在PathVQA、PMC-VQA、SLAKE、VQA-RAD四个闭式医学VQA基准(n=400)上进行配对可控评估，CORAL相较于Qwen2.5-VL-7B基线将宏观准确率提升6.7个百分点(P(Delta>0)=0.988)，视觉幻觉率降低8.0个百分点(P<0.001)；MedVLThinker强化学习变体在两项指标上均无显著提升。跨领域诊断显示，图像替换在医学基准上仅造成不超过6.5个百分点的性能下降，而在通用领域任务上达48-61个百分点，揭示了对比基础目标所针对的基础差距。
AI.conclusion: CORAL通过对比基础目标有效提升了医学VLM的视觉基础能力并降低了幻觉率，揭示了医学VLM与通用领域VLM在视觉依赖程度上的显著差距；研究公开讨论了训练/评估基准重叠和次要指标统计效力不足等评估局限性，并开源了框架、训练代码和模型权重以支持可复现的医学VLM基础审计。

title: ClinOCR-Bench: A Comprehensive Clinical Scanned Document Dataset for Optical Character Recognition Model Evaluation
summary: Extracting textual information from scanned medical documents, such as external laboratory reports and manually filled forms, has been a major challenge in modern electronic health records (EHRs). Recent advancements in vision language models (VLMs) have shown great promise over traditional OCR tools. However, at this point, most clinical OCR studies were conducted on private, institutional data. To our knowledge, there are few publicly available datasets for evaluating OCR models in the clinical domain. Furthermore, common scanning artifacts that undermine OCR performance are not reflected in those datasets, leaving a systematic evaluation unfeasible. Therefore, we release a publicly available, realistic-looking OCR benchmark dataset, ClinOCR-Bench, with 384 scanned images across 6 subsets: Normal, Handwriting, Poor Quality, Rotation, Tables, and Mix-artifacts. ClinOCR-Bench features: 1) diverse document types and layouts, 2) full coverage of common EHR scan artifacts, 3) protected health information-free, 4) template-aware train/test split, and 5) adequate sample size for OCR benchmarking. Baseline OCR performance was evaluated using state-of-the-art open-weight and proprietary VLMs. The dataset and documentation are available on GitHub (https://github.com/ClinOCR-Bench/ClinOCR-Bench).

AI.tldr: ClinOCR-Bench 是一个面向临床文档的公开 OCR 基准数据集，包含 384 张扫描图像和 6 种常见扫描伪影子集，用于系统评估视觉语言模型在医疗文本提取任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有临床 OCR 研究大多基于私有数据集，缺乏公开可用且覆盖真实扫描伪影（如手写、低质量、旋转、表格等）的基准，导致临床领域 OCR 模型的系统评估不可行。
AI.method: 构建 ClinOCR-Bench 公开数据集，包含 384 张扫描图像，覆盖 Normal、Handwriting、Poor Quality、Rotation、Tables、Mix-artifacts 六类子集，并采用模板感知的 train/test 划分；使用开源和商业视觉语言模型（VLMs）建立基线 OCR 性能评估。
AI.result: 基于 ClinOCR-Bench，使用多种开源和商业 VLM 进行了基线 OCR 性能评估，数据集具备多样化文档类型与布局、全面覆盖 EHR 常见扫描伪影、无受保护健康信息、模板感知划分及充足样本量等特点。
AI.conclusion: ClinOCR-Bench 填补了临床领域公开 OCR 基准的空白，为系统评估和比较不同 VLM 在真实医疗文档扫描场景下的 OCR 能力提供了标准化平台，有助于推动 EHR 中文档信息提取技术的发展。

title: ViPo-MLLM: Visual-Pose Multimodal LLM for Gloss-Free Sign Language Translation
summary: Gloss-free Sign Language Translation (SLT) translates sign language videos into spoken-language sentences without gloss annotations, avoiding costly labeling but requiring fine-grained modeling of hands, body, and facial cues. Existing methods often use single-modality or weakly fused features, limiting performance. We propose ViPo-MLLM, a framework that integrates spatio-temporal RGB and human pose features. Dedicated encoders model intra-modal dynamics and cross-modal attention captures long-range dependencies. The fused representation is conditioned with a structured prompt and processed by an LLM trained with contrastive and language modeling objectives. The proposed model was evaluated on the PHOENIX14T and CSL-Daily datasets and achieved new state-of-the-art results on both datasets. Moreover, the ViPo-MLLM model attained competitive performance compared to gloss-based recognition approaches, confirming the effectiveness of the proposed pose cues and cross-modal attention mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 提出ViPo-MLLM框架，通过融合时空RGB与人体姿态特征并利用跨模态注意力和LLM解码，在无标注手语翻译任务上达到新SOTA，且性能可与有标注方法媲美。
AI.motivation: 无标注手语翻译（Gloss-free SLT）无需昂贵的标注信息，但现有方法多采用单模态或弱融合特征，难以对双手、身体和面部等细粒度线索进行有效建模，导致翻译性能受限。
AI.method: ViPo-MLLM框架包含专用编码器分别对时空RGB和人体姿态特征进行模态内建模，随后通过跨模态注意力机制捕捉长程依赖关系；融合后的表示经结构化提示条件化后，输入大语言模型（LLM），并联合使用对比学习和语言建模目标进行训练。
AI.result: 在PHOENIX14T和CSL-Daily两个数据集上均取得新的最优结果（SOTA），且与需要标注的基于词汇表识别的方法相比达到了竞争性性能，验证了姿态线索和跨模态注意力机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合（RGB+姿态）结合跨模态注意力和LLM解码能够显著提升无标注手语翻译性能，姿态线索可作为细粒度信息的有效补充，为降低标注成本的同时保持高性能提供了可行路径。

title: Leveraging Pathology Co-occurrence for Test-Time Adaptation in Chest X-Ray Diagnosis
summary: Medical imaging models often degrade when deployed at new clinical sites due to differences in imaging equipment, protocols, and patient populations. Test-time adaptation (TTA) addresses this by updating a pretrained model using only unlabeled target data, without access to source data. However, existing TTA methods were designed for single-label classification on natural image benchmarks, minimizing entropy uniformly across all samples without considering label dependencies. This overlooks a key property of multi-label medical imaging: pathologies do not occur independently but exhibit structured co-occurrence patterns. In this work, we propose Co-occurrence Weighted Adaptation (CoWA), which leverages disease co-occurrence patterns as a reliability signal for adaptation. CoWA estimates label co-occurrence structure from model predictions and downweights samples that deviate from expected patterns, enabling adaptation to rely more on consistent predictions while reducing the impact of noisy ones. We evaluate CoWA on chest X-ray benchmarks under domain shifts and demonstrate consistent improvements over established baselines.

AI.tldr: CoWA 提出利用疾病共现模式作为可靠性信号，通过加权自适应方法实现多标签医学影像的测试时适应，在胸部 X 光基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应（TTA）方法主要针对自然图像的单一标签分类设计，对所有样本进行统一熵最小化，忽略了多标签医学影像中病理之间存在的结构化共现依赖关系，导致在临床领域偏移下模型性能严重下降。
AI.method: CoWA 先从模型预测中估计标签共现结构，然后对偏离预期共现模式的样本赋予较低权重，从而在无源数据的测试时适应过程中更依赖一致性强的预测、降低噪声样本的影响。
AI.result: 在胸部 X 光基准数据集上，CoWA 在多种域偏移场景下均取得了一致且显著的性能提升，优于多个已建立的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，显式利用标签间的结构化共现关系可以有效提升多标签医学影像模型在领域偏移下的鲁棒性，为 TTA 在临床部署中提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Exploring SAM Supervision for Fine-Grained UAV Target Segmentation under Data Scarcity
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) target segmentation remains challenging due to the small size of objects, appearance variations, cluttered backgrounds, and the scarcity of densely annotated data. These factors hinder the performance and practical deployment of lightweight segmentation models in real-world UAV applications. To address this problem, this paper investigates the use of SAM3 (Segment Anything Model 3) as a pseudo-label generator for training compact segmentation networks. Specifically, two supervision paradigms are explored: (i) direct pseudo-supervision using unaltered SAM3-generated masks, and (ii) a refinement strategy that re-applies SAM3 to localized image patches for improved mask quality. Based on these paradigms, a two-stage SAM3-guided pseudo-label generation framework is proposed. In the first stage, SAM3 generates coarse masks for initial object localization. The localized regions are subsequently cropped into patches and processed by SAM3 again to generate fine masks with accurate object boundaries and discard false positives. The resulting coarse and fine masks are then used as pseudo-labels to optimize a lightweight network, termed IPS-Seg, which consists of three components: an IdentityFormer backbone for feature extraction, an Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling module for multi-scale context aggregation, and a PixelShuffle-based decoder for spatial resolution recovery. Extensive experiments under multiple supervision settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. The results show that IPS-Seg achieves a favorable trade-off between segmentation accuracy and computational efficiency while benefiting consistently from the proposed pseudo-label generation strategy. These findings highlight the potential of large-scale foundation models as annotation sources for training compact task-specific segmentation networks in low-label vision domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用SAM3作为伪标签生成器，通过两阶段粗到细的伪标签生成框架训练轻量化分割网络IPS-Seg，在UAV目标分割任务中实现了分割精度与计算效率的良好平衡，证明了大规模基础模型作为低标签视觉域中紧凑网络训练标注源的潜力。
AI.motivation: UAV目标分割面临目标尺度小、外观变化大、背景杂乱以及密集标注数据稀缺等挑战，这些因素严重制约了轻量化分割模型在真实UAV应用中的性能与部署。现有方法难以在有限标注条件下实现高效且准确的紧凑分割网络训练。
AI.method: 本文提出一种两阶段SAM3引导的伪标签生成框架。第一阶段使用SAM3生成粗粒度掩码以进行初始目标定位，随后将定位区域裁剪为图像块并再次输入SAM3生成具有精确边界的高质量细粒度掩码并剔除误检。粗、细掩码共同作为伪标签训练轻量化分割网络IPS-Seg，该网络由IdentityFormer骨干网络用于特征提取、Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling模块用于多尺度上下文聚合以及基于PixelShuffle的解码器用于空间分辨率恢复三部分组成。
AI.result: 在多种监督设置下的广泛实验表明，所提框架能够有效提升分割性能。IPS-Seg在分割精度与计算效率之间取得了良好的折中，并且从所提出的伪标签生成策略中获得了持续稳定的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了大规模基础模型可以作为低标注视觉域中紧凑任务特定分割网络的有效标注源，为减少对密集人工标注的依赖提供了一条可行路径，对UAV视觉等实际部署场景具有重要应用价值。

title: CineMobile: On-Device Image-to-Video Diffusion for Cinematic Camera Motion Generation
summary: The growing demand for image-to-video creation on mobile devices has increasingly focused on cinematic motion effects like bullet time, dolly zoom, slow motion, etc. While Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) exhibit strong performance in video generation, their large parameter sizes and multi-step iterative denoising processes lead to substantial computational overhead, making efficient generation on mobile devices challenging. We propose CineMobile to bridge the gap. In particular, CineMobile adopts a three-fold optimization strategy: (1) leveraging a distillation-guided pruning approach to derive a compact yet efficient model that retains the essential video generation capabilities required for cinematic effects; (2) optimizing the compressed model into a 4-step generator via a combination of diffusion distillation and reinforcement learning; (3) employing a hybrid post-training quantization strategy to compress the model footprint to under 1 GB. Experimental results show that compared to the teacher model with the Wan 2.1 architecture, CineMobile achieves a 40x speedup in generation while maintaining comparable visual quality. Specifically, CineMobile generates 49-frame 480p videos with a per-step denoising latency of 0.6s on an NVIDIA H200 GPU and 20s on the MediaTek Dimensity 8400 Ultimate 5G platform, with a peak memory usage of 1.8 GB, demonstrating its practical applicability for mobile-based image-to-video creation.

AI.tldr: CineMobile提出三阶段优化策略（蒸馏引导剪枝、扩散蒸馏结合强化学习、混合后训练量化），将Wan 2.1架构的DiT视频生成模型压缩至1 GB以下并实现40倍加速，在移动端480p视频生成中达到每步0.6s（H200 GPU）和20s（联发科Dimensity 8400平台）的延迟，为移动端图像转视频创作铺平了道路。
AI.motivation: 移动设备上对图像转视频创作（如子弹时间、推拉变焦、慢动作等电影级运动效果）的需求日益增长，但Diffusion Transformers（DiTs）模型参数量大且需多步迭代去噪，导致巨大计算开销，难以在移动端实现高效生成。
AI.method: CineMobile采用三方面优化策略：1）通过蒸馏引导剪枝获得紧凑模型，保留生成电影级效果所需的核心能力；2）结合扩散蒸馏与强化学习将压缩模型优化为4步生成器；3）采用混合后训练量化策略将模型大小压缩至1 GB以下。
AI.result: 相比基于Wan 2.1架构的教师模型，CineMobile在保持可比视觉质量的前提下实现40倍生成加速；在NVIDIA H200 GPU上生成49帧480p视频的单步去噪延迟为0.6s，在联发科Dimensity 8400 Ultimate 5G平台上为20s，峰值内存占用1.8 GB。
AI.conclusion: CineMobile证明了通过剪枝、蒸馏、强化学习和量化等多重优化手段，可以将大规模DiT视频生成模型高效部署于移动端，为移动设备上的图像转视频创作提供了切实可行的方案。

title: TestMate: Test-Time Domain Adaptation Aided by Lightweight Vision Foundation Model
summary: Test-Time Domain Adaptation (TTDA) aims to adapt Deep Neural Networks to distribution shifts using only streaming, unlabeled test data in real time. Current methods for semantic segmentation tasks suffer from critical limitations. Entropy minimization techniques require costly backpropagation, risking catastrophic forgetting and producing noisy segmentation boundaries. Memory-bank methods, while backpropagation-free, exhibit slow adaptation, requiring numerous samples to converge and struggle to handle continuous domain shifts. We introduce TestMate, a novel, real-time, and backpropagation-free TTDA framework that overcomes these issues. TestMate leverages generalization capability of a lightweight Visual Foundation Model to guide the adaptation. We use a zero-shot instance segmentation YOLOv8-seg based model to generate unlabeled mask proposals for objects and their parts at multiple scales in real time. These proposals are fused with the primary model via a heuristic, size-ordered competitive scheme, where small, high-confidence regions dominate and refine predictions in surrounding larger, less certain areas. This paremeter-free mechanism enables immediate adaptation from the first frame, inherently avoids catastrophic forgetting and effectively preserves fine object details and boundaries, even for small objects. TestMate can be used as a standalone, efficient refinement module or seamlessly integrated into existing TTDA methods to significantly boost their performance. We demonstrate state-of-the-art results across two benchmark datasets, proving TestMate's effectiveness in three distinct adaptation tasks: TTDA, Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA), and online-TTDA. Code is available.

AI.tldr: TestMate 是一种无需反向传播的实时测试时域自适应框架，利用轻量级视觉基础模型（YOLOv8-seg）生成多尺度无标注掩码提案，通过启发式大小竞争融合机制引导主模型适应分布偏移，在语义分割上实现了最先进的性能，同时避免了灾难性遗忘和边界模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时域自适应（TTDA）方法在语义分割任务中存在关键局限：基于熵最小化的方法需要昂贵反向传播，易导致灾难性遗忘并产生噪声分割边界；基于记忆库的方法虽无需反向传播但适应速度慢，需要大量样本才能收敛，难以处理连续域偏移。因此需要一种实时、高效且能保持细粒度分割质量的TTDA方法。
AI.method: TestMate 提出无需反向传播的实时TTDA框架，利用轻量级视觉基础模型（VFM）的泛化能力指导自适应。具体地，采用基于零样本实例分割的YOLOv8-seg模型实时生成多尺度物体及部件级无标注掩码提案，并通过启发式大小排序竞争机制与主模型预测进行融合：小型高置信度区域主导并细化周围更大、更不确定区域的预测。该机制无参数，从第一帧即可实现立即自适应，天然避免灾难性遗忘并保持精细物体细节和边界。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，TestMate 在TTDA、源无关域自适应（SFDA）和在线TTDA三种自适应任务中均取得最先进结果。该方法既可独立作为高效精炼模块使用，也可无缝集成到现有TTDA方法中显著提升其性能，证明了其广泛的适用性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: TestMate 通过引入轻量级视觉基础模型和启发式竞争融合机制，为实时TTDA提供了一种无需反向传播、无参数的高效解决方案，在保持实时性的同时有效解决了灾难性遗忘和边界质量退化问题。其即插即用的特性为未来域自适应方法的设计提供了新思路，可进一步扩展到更多视觉任务中。

title: How Do Diffusion Classifiers Decide? A Bias-Centric Evaluation
summary: Diffusion models have recently been repurposed for zero-shot classification, giving rise to diffusion classifiers that identify the best-matching text prompt by minimizing the noise-prediction error. Despite their growing adoption, how these models make classification decisions remains poorly understood. We introduce ASOB-Bench, a bias evaluation for diffusion classifiers along three dimensions: Attribute binding, Size-Order bias, and Background dependency. These dimensions serve not as an exhaustive taxonomy but as targeted probes of how the text-conditioned reconstruction-error score reaches a decision. Such a perspective is well studied for discriminative vision-language models, yet remains overlooked for diffusion classifiers. Extending an existing framework with five new attribute categories on newly constructed datasets, we find diffusion classifiers are less prone to attribute misbinding than an OpenCLIP baseline; on the established ComCo benchmark they are substantially more susceptible to size-order shortcuts; and on ImageNet-B they suffer far larger accuracy drops, revealing heavy reliance on background over foreground cues. Reconstruction-error heatmaps and U-Net cross-attention visualizations expose the mechanism behind each bias. Because diffusion classifiers share the same denoiser as text-to-image models, these single-pass diagnostics also point toward analogous failure modes in generation. Overall, diffusion classifiers exhibit a distinct bias profile from vision-language models, offering guidance for building more robust diffusion-based models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASOB-Bench基准，系统评估扩散分类器在属性绑定、大小顺序偏差和背景依赖三个维度上的偏见，发现扩散分类器与视觉语言模型存在截然不同的偏见模式，其中属性绑定优于OpenCLIP但大小顺序和背景依赖问题更严重。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型已被重新用于零样本分类，但扩散分类器的决策机制尚不明确，其在不同偏见维度上的表现与传统的判别式视觉语言模型存在差异，这一研究空白尚未被系统探索。
AI.method: 本文提出ASOB-Bench评估基准，从属性绑定、大小顺序偏差和背景依赖三个维度系统评估扩散分类器；在已有框架基础上扩展了五个新的属性类别并构建新数据集；使用重建误差热图和U-Net交叉注意力可视化揭示偏见背后的机制。
AI.result: 扩散分类器在属性绑定上优于OpenCLIP基线；在ComCo基准上对大小顺序捷径的敏感性显著更高；在ImageNet-B上准确率下降更大，表明严重依赖背景而非前景线索。
AI.conclusion: 扩散分类器具有与视觉语言模型不同的独特偏见分布，这些单次诊断方法也能指向文本到图像生成中的类似失败模式，为构建更鲁棒的扩散模型提供指导。

title: CogRad: A Cognitively-Inspired Multi-Agent Framework for Radiology Report Generation
summary: Automated radiology report generation (RRG) can ease radiologist workload, yet most existing systems produce a report in a single forward pass, with no mechanism to check a claim against the image or revisit a finding once stated. We present CogRad, a cognitively inspired multi-agent framework that structures generation around four stages of a radiologist's reading process. A Scout agent discovers anatomical regions directly from image patches via slot attention and assigns region and disease-level triage scores; an Investigator agent concentrates representational capacity on the regions Scout flags as suspicious; a Writer agent compiles these signals into a disease gated visual prefix for a large language model; and a Verifier agent supervises training with a visual entailment loss and, at inference, re-examines its own draft sentence by sentence, regenerating any report it judges insufficiently grounded. On CheXpert Plus, CogRad attains a BLEU-4 of 0.316 and a CIDEr of 0.322, the best scores among the methods we compare against. On IU X-Ray, it attains a BLEU-4 of 0.201 and a CIDEr of 0.724, leading every baseline on every standard NLG metric. We further evaluate CogRad with RadGraph F1, CheXbert F1, and a hallucination analysis to assess clinical accuracy beyond standard text-overlap metrics, complemented by ablation studies and Grad-CAM-based visualizations that characterize each agent's contribution and the model's visual grounding.

AI.tldr: CogRad提出了一种认知启发的多智能体框架，将放射学报告生成分解为侦察、调查、写作和验证四个阶段，通过槽注意力发现区域、疾病门控视觉前缀引导语言模型以及逐句验证与重写机制，在CheXpert Plus和IU X-Ray数据集上取得了领先的NLG指标并降低了幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有放射学报告生成系统通常采用单次前向传递方式生成完整报告，缺乏对图像内容进行交叉验证的机制，也无法在陈述发现后重新审视或修正，导致报告可能存在视觉不 grounded 的幻觉或遗漏关键发现。
AI.method: CogRad是一个多智能体框架，包含四个智能体：Scout智能体通过槽注意力直接从图像块中发现解剖区域并分配区域和疾病级别分诊分数；Investigator智能体将表征能力集中在Scout标记的疑似区域上；Writer智能体将信号编译为疾病门控视觉前缀供大语言模型使用；Verifier智能体在训练时通过视觉蕴含损失监督，在推理时逐句检查并重新生成不充分 grounded 的句子。
AI.result: 在CheXpert Plus上，CogRad取得BLEU-4为0.316、CIDEr为0.322，优于所有对比方法；在IU X-Ray上，BLEU-4为0.201、CIDEr为0.724，在所有标准NLG指标上领先所有基线。此外还通过RadGraph F1、CheXbert F1和幻觉分析评估临床准确性，并进行了消融研究和Grad-CAM可视化。
AI.conclusion: CogRad通过模拟放射科医生的认知阅读过程，将报告生成分解为多阶段多智能体协作，显著提升了报告的文本质量和临床准确性，其逐句验证与重写机制有效减少了幻觉，为可解释、可验证的医学图像报告生成提供了新范式。

title: Ghosts Beneath Textures: Texture-Relation Cues for Cross-Paradigm AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: AI-generated images have proliferated rapidly, motivating extensive research. Most existing AI-generated image detectors are developed and evaluated under image-free generation paradigms, such as noise-based or text-guided generation. However, image-conditioned generation has become increasingly important in practical applications, as it enables more fine-grained control over generated content. Detecting AI-generated images across these two paradigms creates a critical cross-paradigm detection problem that has long been overlooked. To study this problem, we construct ConImageGen, a benchmark for cross-paradigm AI-generated image detection. Evaluations on ConImageGen show that existing detectors fail to generalize reliably across image-free and image-conditioned generation. To address this failure, this paper identifies a cross-paradigm forensic cue and provides a new perspective for generalized AI-generated image detection. Specifically, by suppressing semantic interference, we visualize, for the first time, semantics-irrelevant texture patterns across generation paradigms. These patterns exhibit structured local-global texture relations, indicating a generalizable form of forensic evidence. Motivated by this finding, we shift the focus from directly exploiting explicit artifacts to modeling texture relations and propose DTS-Det, a detection framework that captures and leverages such relations for generalized AI-generated image detection. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our method. DTS-Det achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse evaluation settings, reaching 99.6% ACC on ConImageGen with a 10.5% gain over the best baseline. It also achieves 93.2%/94.1% ACC in cross-dataset evaluation on PicoBanana/RAID and maintains detection rates of 95.2%/88.1% under reconstruction attacks and black-box adversarial attacks, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了跨范式（图像自由生成与图像条件生成）的AI生成图像检测问题，构建了ConImageGen基准，发现现有检测器无法跨范式泛化，并提出基于语义无关纹理关系建模的DTS-Det框架，在多个评测中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测器大多针对噪声生成或文本引导生成等图像自由生成范式开发，忽略了图像条件生成在实际应用中的重要性，二者之间的跨范式检测问题长期未被研究，导致现有检测器在跨范式场景下泛化能力严重不足。
AI.method: 本文首先构建了跨范式AI生成图像检测基准ConImageGen，并通过抑制语义干扰首次可视化了跨范式通用的语义无关纹理模式，揭示了其中存在的结构化局部-全局纹理关系；基于此发现，提出DTS-Det检测框架，将关注点从直接利用显式伪影转向建模纹理关系，以捕捉和利用这种可泛化的取证线索。
AI.result: DTS-Det在ConImageGen基准上达到99.6%准确率，相较于最佳基线提升10.5%；在跨数据集评测中，在PicoBanana和RAID上分别达到93.2%和94.1%准确率；在重构攻击和黑盒对抗攻击下分别保持95.2%和88.1%的检测率，充分验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了跨范式AI生成图像检测的关键在于语义无关的纹理关系而非显式伪影，为通用化检测提供了新视角；DTS-Det通过建模局部-全局纹理关系实现了优异泛化能力，表明该方法具有实际部署潜力，并为未来跨范式取证研究奠定了基础。

title: GeoSelect: Spatial-Program Execution for Training-Free Referring Remote Sensing Image Segmentation
summary: Referring remote sensing image segmentation isolates the object named by a natural-language expression in an aerial image. Existing training-free methods resolve the expression through implicit vision-language activations or region-text similarity, which gives weak control over the spatial, comparative, and ordinal relations that dominate aerial referring: they cannot represent constructions such as the largest ship or the second court from the left. We propose GeoSelect, a training-free pipeline that reframes referring as the execution of a typed spatial program. A frozen, text-only language model synthesises the expression into a small domain-specific language, a well-formedness checker accepts the program, and a deterministic executor runs it. The central abstraction is a single scored candidate set type under which every operator composes: continuous geometric fields realise position and proximity as dense pixel-level maps, while discrete set and order operators add the extremum, ordinal, counted-union, and relational constructions that fields alone cannot express. Because execution is explicit, every intermediate program, field, and ranking is inspectable, and a reliability ladder degrades any failing program to a field-only special case, so every expression returns an answer. GeoSelect attains 58.86 mIoU on RRSIS-D test and 55.27 mIoU on RISBench test, more than twice the best prior training-free method on RRSIS-D, with no referring supervision and on a single GPU. A controlled comparison with candidates and segmenter fixed attributes the gain to explicit execution, not the backbone; an oracle decomposition localises the residual gap to detection recall on RRSIS-D and selection on RISBench, and an exposure audit confirms robustness to pretraining leakage. Code will be released upon acceptance at the project page https://avalon-s.github.io/GeoSelect/.

AI.tldr: GeoSelect是一个无需训练的流水线，将遥感图像中的指代分割重构为类型化空间程序的显式执行，利用冻结的文本语言模型将自然语言表达式编译为领域专用语言，通过确定性执行器处理空间、比较和序数关系，在RRSIS-D测试集上达到58.86 mIoU，超越此前最佳无训练方法两倍以上。
AI.motivation: 现有无训练方法通过隐式视觉-语言激活或区域-文本相似度来解析指代表达式，无法有效处理遥感指代分割中占主导地位的空间、比较和序数关系（如"最大的船"或"从左数第二个球场"），缺乏对这些结构化关系的显式控制能力。
AI.method: GeoSelect提出了一种无需训练的三阶段流水线：首先利用冻结的纯文本语言模型将自然语言指代表达式编译为小型领域专用语言程序；然后通过格式正确性检查器验证程序合法性；最后由确定性执行器运行该程序。核心抽象是单一的打分候选集类型，所有算子均在此类型上组合：连续几何场将位置和邻近关系实现为密集像素级图，离散集合和序数算子则表达极值、序数、计数并集和关系构造。执行过程完全显式且可审计，当程序执行失败时通过可靠性阶梯降级为纯场特例，确保每个表达式都能返回结果。
AI.result: GeoSelect在RRSIS-D测试集上达到58.86 mIoU，在RISBench测试集上达到55.27 mIoU，在RRSIS-D上比此前最佳无训练方法提升两倍以上，全程无需指代监督且仅需单张GPU。通过控制变量实验（固定候选框和分割器）将性能增益归因于显式执行而非骨干网络；通过oracle分解将剩余误差定位为RRSIS-D上的检测召回问题和RISBench上的选择问题；暴露审计证实了对预训练泄露的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将自然语言指代分割建模为显式的空间程序执行——而非隐式跨模态对齐——能够有效处理遥感场景中复杂的空间、比较和序数关系，且无需任何指代标注数据或训练过程，为训练-零样本指代分割提供了新的范式方向。

title: USE: A Unified Self-Ensembling Framework for Test-Time Prompt Tuning
summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) has emerged as a popular paradigm for improving the performance of vision-language models (e.g., CLIP) on downstream tasks. Among existing CLIP-based TTA methods, Test-Time Prompt Tuning (TPT) is a pioneering work that optimizes textual prompts using multiple test-time augmentations and remains a strong baseline to date. In this work, we revisit TPT and reveal that its optimization can be interpreted as implicitly learning from self-generated pseudo labels. Building on this perspective, we propose a unified self-ensembling framework (USE) that ensures consistency between the optimization and inference stages. During optimization, we introduce a simple yet effective self-ensembling (SE) strategy that emphasizes the test image itself over its augmented views adaptively to obtain more reliable pseudo labels. To fully exploit the potential of augmentations, we further apply the same strategy at inference time, unifying the objectives of both stages. Notably, SE can also act as a lightweight optimization-free TTA method. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that SE and USE outperform their counterparts, respectively. Furthermore, SE yields consistent performance gains when integrated with existing TTA methods. The code is available at https://github.com/sirujiang/USE.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了基于CLIP的测试时提示微调方法TPT，将其解释为隐式学习自生成伪标签，并在此基础上提出统一自集成框架（USE），通过在优化和推理阶段同时引入自适应自集成策略来提升伪标签可靠性和性能，该方法也可作为轻量级免优化TTA方法使用。
AI.motivation: 现有的测试时提示微调方法TPT虽然效果优异，但其优化机制缺乏统一的理论解释，且优化阶段与推理阶段的目标不一致，导致对测试样本本身的信息利用不充分，伪标签的可靠性有限。
AI.method: 本文首先将TPT的优化过程重新解释为隐式地从自生成的伪标签中学习，并在此基础上提出统一自集成框架（USE）。在优化阶段，提出自适应自集成（SE）策略，强调测试图像本身而非其增强视图以获取更可靠的伪标签；在推理阶段，应用同样的策略以统一两个阶段的目标。SE还可作为轻量级免优化TTA方法独立使用。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，SE和USE分别优于各自对应的基线方法；SE在与现有TTA方法集成时也能带来一致性的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了TPT的本质是隐式伪标签学习，提出的统一自集成框架有效弥合了优化与推理阶段的目标差异，为CLIP的测试时自适应提供了更简洁、高效且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Paired Uterine Whole-Slide Images and Pathology Reports for Multimodal Computational Pathology
summary: Uterine diseases represent an important category of gynecologic pathology and require accurate histopathological assessment for diagnosis and treatment planning. Whole-slide images (WSI) have enabled the digital transformation of pathology workflows and provided new opportunities for artificial intelligence (AI) in computational pathology. In particular, multimodal models that jointly analyze histopathology images and pathology reports have shown promising potential for automated pathology report generation and AI-assisted diagnosis. However, the development of such systems remains limited by the scarcity of datasets that pair whole-slide images with clinically meaningful pathology reports. Instead, existing pathology datasets focus on patch- or slide-level annotations of a single endpoint (e.g., disease class), which do not fully capture the rich information in full clinical diagnostic workflow reports. Here, we introduce TUM-Uteria, a uterine pathology dataset comprising WSIs paired with diagnostic pathology reports at both the case and slide levels, collected from a tertiary medical center. The dataset contains 216 clinical cases, comprising 455 slide-level WSI-report pairs. The dataset underwent a structured multi-stage validation procedure involving board-certified pathologists to ensure reliable annotations. TUM-Uteria supports research in computational pathology, including whole-slide image analysis, multimodal learning, and automated pathology report generation.

AI.tldr: TUM-Uteria是一个由子宫病理学全切片图像与对应诊断报告组成的多模态数据集，包含216例临床病例和455个切片级WSI-报告对，经病理学家多阶段验证，旨在支持计算病理学中的全切片分析、多模态学习及自动化报告生成研究。
AI.motivation: 现有的病理学数据集多集中于单一标注（如疾病类别），缺乏同时包含全切片图像与完整临床诊断报告的多模态数据，限制了自动化病理报告生成和AI辅助诊断系统的发展。
AI.method: 本文构建了TUM-Uteria数据集，收集来自三级医疗中心的216例子宫病理临床病例，包含455个切片级WSI-报告对，并经过由委员会认证病理学家执行的结构化多阶段验证流程以确保标注可靠性。
AI.result: 该数据集包含216个临床病例和455个切片级WSI-报告对，覆盖子宫疾病病理学，且经过了严格的多阶段病理学验证。
AI.conclusion: TUM-Uteria填补了现有病理学数据集在多模态配对数据方面的空白，为全切片图像分析、多模态学习和自动化病理报告生成等计算病理学研究提供了重要的数据基础。

title: PreSIST: Vision-Language-Informed Object Persistence Prediction in Open-World Scenes
summary: Robots deployed over long periods must reason about environments that change over time. Existing long-term perception systems often address object change reactively, updating their maps only after revisiting a scene and observing that an object has moved. Instead, robots should reason proactively about how long objects are likely to persist using the context in which they appear. For example, a car at a traffic light and a car in a parking spot share the same semantic class, but their contexts imply different persistence durations. We propose PreSIST (Predictive Scene-conditioned Instance Survival over Time), a method for predicting whether an observed object will remain in its last seen pose at arbitrary future times. PreSIST estimates instance-level persistence priors from object properties and scene context, then integrates these priors with a probabilistic persistence filter as observations become available. Its key insight is that the reasoning capabilities of vision-language models (VLMs) can relate scene context to likely object use and human activity, enabling persistence prediction before long-term observations are available. We develop two interchangeable variants: PreSIST-Lang, which estimates persistence priors using a VLM, and PreSIST-Vis, a novel vision-only model trained using PreSIST-Lang pseudo-labels for efficient deployment. Experiments on a new dataset of in-the-wild object persistence annotations show that PreSIST-Lang and PreSIST-Vis outperform baselines on open-world persistence prediction.

AI.tldr: PreSIST提出了一种基于场景上下文的物体持久性预测方法，利用视觉语言模型的能力在新观察可用之前推断物体在场景中的存留时间，并提供了语言驱动和纯视觉两种变体，在开放世界持久性预测任务上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的长期感知系统通常仅在被部署机器人重新访问场景并观察到物体移动后，才被动地更新地图，缺乏主动推理物体在环境中可能存留时间的能力。虽然同一语义类别的物体（如停在红绿灯前的汽车与停在停车位的汽车）具有相同的类别标签，但其所处的场景上下文暗示了截然不同的持久性时长，现有方法无法捕捉这种基于上下文的差异。
AI.method: PreSIST首先从物体属性和场景上下文中估计实例级别的持久性先验，然后将这些先验与概率持久性滤波器进行集成，随着观测数据的积累不断更新预测。其关键创新在于利用视觉语言模型（VLM）的推理能力将场景上下文与物体的可能用途和人类活动关联起来，从而在长期观测数据可用之前实现持久性预测。该方法包含两种变体：PreSIST-Lang使用VLM直接估计持久性先验，PreSIST-Vis则是一种纯视觉模型，通过PreSIST-Lang生成的伪标签进行训练，以实现更高效的部署。
AI.result: 在作者新构建的野外物体持久性标注数据集上进行的实验表明，PreSIST-Lang和PreSIST-Vis在开放世界持久性预测任务上均优于多种基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PreSIST通过结合VLM的场景理解能力与概率滤波框架，实现了基于上下文主动推理物体持久性的新范式。PreSIST-Vis利用伪标签蒸馏技术实现了高效的纯视觉推理，为长期自主机器人系统的主动地图更新与场景理解提供了可行方案。

title: HCSU: A Dataset and Benchmark for Fine-Grained Historical Calligraphy Style Understanding
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. 17 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables
summary: Automated fine-grained perception of calligraphy styles--a task vital to cultural heritage preservation--remains a critical challenge for Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), largely constrained by existing datasets that suffer from modal mixture and flattened labels. To bridge this gap, we introduce HCSU, the first comprehensive dataset tailored for fine-grained Historical Calligraphy Style Understanding. HCSU comprises 39,307 meticulously curated character images from 49 historically prominent calligraphers across 10 dynasties, systematically decoupling authentic ink manuscripts (Tie) from stone rubbings (Bei) to resolve the long-standing modal mixture problem. Moving beyond conventional flattened labels, HCSU provides hierarchical expert-written aesthetic descriptions, enabling two rigorous evaluation protocols: fine-grained style discrimination and interpretable aesthetic reasoning. Extensive evaluations reveal a persistent gap between calligraphy-related knowledge and visually grounded style perception: state-of-the-art LVLMs show non-trivial performance but remain sensitive to script-level, textual, and source-specific cues, and often struggle to ground aesthetic judgments in fine-grained brushwork evidence. Ultimately, the HCSU benchmark exposes fundamental limitations in current multimodal architectures, aiming to inspire the evolution of expert-level visual reasoning for cultural heritage preservation. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tongji209/HCSU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HCSU，首个面向细粒度历史书法风格理解的数据集，包含39,307张来自49位书法家的汉字图像，解耦墨迹与拓本模态，并提供层次化美学描述，揭示了当前多模态大模型在书法风格感知与可解释美学推理方面的根本局限。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在细粒度书法风格自动感知方面能力不足，根本原因在于已有数据集存在模态混杂（墨迹与拓本未分离）和标签扁平化（缺乏层次化美学描述）两大缺陷，严重制约了面向文化遗产保护的精细化视觉理解研究。
AI.method: 构建包含39,307张精心筛选的汉字图像的HCSU数据集，覆盖10个朝代49位历史著名书法家；系统解耦墨迹（Tie）与拓本（Bei）两种模态以解决模态混杂问题；提供专家撰写的层次化美学描述替代传统扁平化标签，并据此设计细粒度风格区分与可解释美学推理两种严格评测协议。
AI.result: 对当前最先进LVLMs的广泛评测表明，模型在书法相关知识调用与视觉风格感知之间存在持续差距；虽表现出一定能力，但高度敏感于字体类型、文本内容及来源信息等表层线索，且在美学判断中缺乏对细粒度笔法证据的可靠支撑。
AI.conclusion: HCSU基准揭示了当前多模态架构在面向文化遗产的专家级视觉推理方面的根本局限，为推动LVLMs向可解释、细粒度的风格理解能力进化提供了重要数据基础与评测平台。

title: Beyond Scene Priors: Fine-Grained Traffic Scene Reasoning with Benchmarking and Query-Guided Small-Object Focus
summary: In safety-critical traffic scenarios, answering complex questions relies on minute, localized visual cues. However, standard Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) tend to over-attend to backgrounds, overwhelming crucial small objects during visual-language alignment, a failure mode we term 'critical evidence dilution.' Furthermore, existing visual question answering (VQA) datasets rarely expose this flaw, as they lack large-scale, distractor-heavy evaluations that require pinpointing local evidence. To bridge this evaluation and architecture gap, we introduce the Fine-Grained Traffic Reasoning Benchmark (FGTR-Bench) and the Text-Guided Small-Object Reasoning MLLM (TSR-MLLM). FGTR-Bench comprises 40,236 single-image Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQs) created via multi-agent generation, consistency checks, and expert audits, alongside a disjoint 4,947-sample blind test split. To resolve evidence dilution, TSR-MLLM, built on Qwen3-VL-4B, uses a query-conditioned Text-Guided Small-Object Focus (TG-SOF) map. Applied once at the decoder boundary, the map adds sparse Top-K gated residuals to the most question-relevant vision slots while leaving text tokens unchanged. Together with lightweight decoder adaptation, TSR-MLLM preserves single-pass inference without external detectors or image re-encoding. Under matched settings, TSR-MLLM outperforms the strongest 4B baseline by 2.1 points on FGTR-Bench (74.1% overall), with larger gains on evidence-local tracks. Furthermore, it remains competitive on DriveQA-V (CARLA Signs) under greedy decoding without task-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出FGTR-Bench细粒度交通推理基准和TSR-MLLM文本引导小目标推理多模态大模型，通过查询条件化的稀疏门控残差机制解决关键证据稀释问题，在4B参数规模下以74.1%准确率领先最强基线2.1个百分点。
AI.motivation: 标准多模态大模型在安全关键交通场景中容易过度关注背景而淹没关键的细小目标视觉线索（即关键证据稀释问题），同时现有VQA数据集缺乏大规模、含大量干扰项且需定位局部证据的评估，无法暴露这一缺陷。
AI.method: 提出TSR-MLLM，基于Qwen3-VL-4B构建，在解码器边界处引入查询条件化的文本引导小目标聚焦图，通过稀疏Top-K门控残差只对最相关问题的视觉槽位进行增强而不改变文本token，配合轻量级解码器适配，实现单次前向推理，无需外部检测器或图像重编码；同时构建FGTR-Bench基准，包含40,236道单图多项选择题，采用多智能体生成、一致性校验和专家审核流程，并设有4,947样本的盲测集。
AI.result: 在同等设置下，TSR-MLLM在FGTR-Bench上以74.1%总体准确率超越最强4B基线2.1个百分点，在证据定位赛道提升更大；此外，在DriveQA-V（CARLA Signs）数据集上采用贪婪解码且无需任务微调仍保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效缓解了多模态大模型在细粒度交通推理中的关键证据稀释问题，证明了轻量级、查询条件化的视觉聚焦机制在无需外部检测器或多次推理的条件下即可显著提升小目标推理能力，为该方向提供了新的评估基准和架构方案。

title: SeeMe: Mitigating Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models through Effective Visual Token Engineering
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in visual understanding tasks such as image captioning and visual question answering. However, they remain susceptible to hallucinations, generating content that is inconsistent with the actual visual input. Existing methods primarily intervene at the decoding stage, while overlooking a critical source of hallucinations: irrelevant or noisy visual tokens that mislead the decoding process. To address this issue, we propose SeeMe, a training-free framework that introduces the concept of feature engineering from traditional machine learning into LVLMs. SeeMe restructures visual tokens through a three-stage token engineering process to suppress hallucination sources while preserving informative visual evidence. Experiments on MME, POPE, and AMBER benchmarks across four LVLMs demonstrate that SeeMe consistently reduces hallucinations and improves output consistency, providing a novel perspective for mitigating hallucinations in LVLMs.

AI.tldr: SeeMe 提出了一种基于特征工程的免训练视觉令牌工程框架，通过三阶段令牌重组抑制无关或噪声视觉令牌，从而在不引入额外训练的情况下显著减少大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中的幻觉现象。
AI.motivation: 现有的大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在视觉理解任务中尽管取得了显著进展，但仍容易产生与真实视觉输入不一致的幻觉内容。现有方法主要干预解码阶段，但忽视了引发幻觉的一个关键来源：无关或噪声视觉令牌误导了解码过程。
AI.method: SeeMe 是一种免训练框架，将传统机器学习中的特征工程概念引入 LVLM。它通过三阶段令牌工程（token engineering）过程对视觉令牌进行重组，旨在抑制幻觉来源的同时保留信息性视觉证据。
AI.result: 在 MME、POPE 和 AMBER 三个基准上，跨四种不同 LVLM 的实验结果表明，SeeMe 能够一致地减少幻觉并提高输出一致性。
AI.conclusion: SeeMe 提供了一种缓解 LVLM 幻觉问题的新视角，证明了通过特征工程层面的视觉令牌重组可以高效且无需额外训练地改善模型输出可靠性，为后续研究开辟了新的方向。

title: CritiqueDriveVLM: From Verifier-Guided Reinforcement Learning to Latent Thought Distillation for Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end Vision-Language Models (VLMs) show immense potential in autonomous driving. However, standard Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) often suffers from reasoning hallucinations and conservative biases. While traditional tool-augmented frameworks and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) approaches mitigate these issues, they incur exorbitant token consumption and unacceptable latency, rendering real-time deployment impractical. To resolve this reliability-efficiency trade-off, we propose CritiqueDriveVLM, a novel unified three-stage framework internalizing reasoning directly into the VLM. First, we introduce Critique-Driven Multi-Turn Reinforcement Learning (RL) guided by a multi-dimensional verifier. By providing granular scalar feedback and a multi-turn penalty, we force the policy to internalize logical deduction, cultivating a robust System-2 Teacher that achieves high accuracy without fragile external tools. Subsequently, we propose Latent Thought Distillation to overcome the latency bottleneck. By aligning the Student's latent representations with the Teacher's fully converged reasoning states, we compress deep logical capabilities into a fast, CoT-free System-1 Student. Extensive experiments on the widely-used DriveLMM-01 benchmark demonstrate remarkable improvements. Compared to the base model, our tool-free Teacher significantly boosts Multiple Choice Quality (MCQ) from 55.54% to a state-of-the-art 76.54%. Crucially, our distilled Student preserves competitive reasoning depth while drastically minimizing generation length to an average of merely 28 tokens. This slashes inference latency by 88% (from 3482 ms to 416 ms), paving a highly robust pathway for low-latency autonomous driving.Our source code is available at https://github.com/MICLAB-BUPT/CritiqueDriveVLM.

AI.tldr: 提出CritiqueDriveVLM，一种面向自动驾驶的三阶段框架，通过多轮强化学习内化推理能力并利用潜在思维蒸馏将深度逻辑压缩为快速无CoT的学生模型，在DriveLMM-01基准上实现76.54%的MCQ准确率，同时将推理延迟降低88%至平均416毫秒且仅需28个token。
AI.motivation: 端到端视觉语言模型在自动驾驶中受限于监督微调带来的推理幻觉与保守偏差，传统工具增强框架和思维链方法虽能缓解问题但存在过高的token消耗和无法接受的延迟，难以满足实时部署需求，亟需解决可靠性与效率之间的权衡。
AI.method: 提出CritiqueDriveVLM统一三阶段框架：首先通过多维度验证器引导的批评驱动多轮强化学习，利用细粒度标量反馈和多轮惩罚迫使策略内化逻辑推理，训练出无需外部工具的高精度System-2教师模型；随后提出潜在思维蒸馏，通过对齐学生模型的潜在表示与教师已完全收敛的推理状态，将深层逻辑能力压缩为快速无CoT的System-1学生模型。
AI.result: 在DriveLMM-01基准上，无工具教师模型将多项选择质量从基线模型的55.54%提升至76.54%；蒸馏后的学生模型在保持竞争性推理深度的同时将生成长度压缩至平均仅28个token，推理延迟从3482毫秒降至416毫秒，降低达88%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明通过内化推理与潜在蒸馏可以有效解决VLM在自动驾驶中可靠性与效率的冲突，为低延迟场景下的鲁棒部署提供了新途径；代码已开源。

title: Hierarchical Multi-to-Single-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Disruption Prediction in EAST
summary: Plasma disruption is a critical threat to tokamak safety. Existing data-driven predictors mainly rely on time-series diagnostic signals, while visible images provide complementary spatial cues including plasma deformation, local brightening, and radiation-structure evolution. Although the image modality improves the model's discriminative capability, it also substantially increases the computational cost during inference. To address this issue, we propose a hierarchical multi-to-single-modal knowledge distillation framework for disruption prediction on a synchronized EAST multimodal dataset. During training, visible images and time-series signals are used to train a multimodal teacher, which learns disruption precursor representations through Transformer-based encoders and a prototype-guided spatiotemporal hypergraph module. During inference, only the time-series student is retained, with multimodal knowledge transferred through graph-structure-level, representation-level, and decision-level distillation. On the 640-discharge EAST dataset, the results demonstrate that the proposed framework can preserve the discriminative advantages of multimodal learning while substantially reducing inference cost, and providing an effective route for efficient disruption prediction in EAST. The source code of this paper will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenFusion.

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向托卡马克等离子体破裂预测的多模态知识蒸馏框架，在训练阶段利用可见光图像与时序信号训练多模态教师模型，推理阶段仅保留时序学生模型，通过图结构级、表示级和决策级蒸馏实现多模态优势的迁移，在降低推理成本的同时保持预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有托卡马克等离子体破裂预测方法主要依赖时序诊断信号，虽然引入可见光图像可提供空间线索以提升判别能力，但图像模态显著增加了推理阶段的计算成本，如何在保留多模态学习优势的同时降低推理开销是一个关键研究空白。
AI.method: 提出一种层次化多模态到单模态知识蒸馏框架：训练阶段构建基于Transformer编码器和原型引导时空超图模块的多模态教师模型，融合可见图像与时序信号学习破裂前兆表征；推理阶段仅保留时序学生模型，并引入图结构级、表示级和决策级三级蒸馏机制实现多模态知识向单模态的迁移。
AI.result: 在包含640个放电序列的EAST数据集上验证，所提框架在推理阶段仅使用时序信号，能够有效保留多模态学习的判别优势，同时显著降低推理计算成本，为EAST装置上高效的破裂预测提供了有效路径。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了多模态知识蒸馏可用于解决聚变等离子体破裂预测中图像模态引入的计算开销问题，为将空间视觉信息融入实时破裂预警系统提供了一种可行的技术路线。

title: Beyond Random Sampling: Distribution-Aware Alignment for Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Precise medical image segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis and treatment planning, yet relies heavily on expensive expert annotations. Semi-supervised medical image segmentation (SSMIS) offers a cost-effective solution but typically operates under the assumption of independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) data, defaulting to random sampling. While statistically valid at scale, this strategy suffers from severe representation bias in low-data regimes, failing to capture the heterogeneous medical data manifold. To address this, we propose a highly data-efficient framework driven by distribution alignment. First, we introduce an offline Distribution-Aware Sample Selection strategy. By leveraging Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) and our designed Density-K-Center algorithm, we explicitly identify representative structural anchors, establishing a more representative labeled domain. Second, to bridge the remaining distribution gap, we propose the Memory-guided Copy-Paste (MCP) module. Tailored for the inherent class imbalance in medical scans, MCP leverages a semantic memory mechanism to retrieve historically consistent priors for cross-domain alignment, encouraging semantic consistency. Coupled with an easy-to-hard progressive schedule, this framework effectively mitigates early-stage pseudo-label noise. Extensive experiments on six diverse 2D and 3D datasets demonstrate strong segmentation performance, particularly in extremely low-labeled scenarios (\eg, 1/16 ratio).

AI.tldr: 提出一种面向半监督医学图像分割的分布对齐框架，通过离线分布感知样本选择（基于VFM和Density-K-Center算法）和记忆引导的Copy-Paste（MCP）模块，在极低标注比例下显著提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督医学图像分割方法通常假设数据独立同分布并采用随机采样策略，这在低数据场景下会导致严重的表示偏差，无法捕捉医学数据异质流形上的关键结构信息，从而限制了数据利用效率。
AI.method: 提出一个基于分布对齐的数据高效框架，包含两个关键模块：1) 离线分布感知样本选择，利用视觉基础模型（VFM）提取特征，结合设计的Density-K-Center算法识别代表性结构锚点，构建更具代表性的标注域；2) 记忆引导的Copy-Paste（MCP）模块，针对医学扫描中的类别不平衡问题，通过语义记忆机制检索历史一致先验用于跨域对齐，结合由易到难的渐进式训练策略缓解早期伪标签噪声。
AI.result: 在六个涵盖2D和3D的多样化医学图像数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明所提框架在极低标注比例（如1/16）下仍能取得优异的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式的分布对齐和代表性样本选择，该方法有效克服了低数据 regime 下的表示偏差问题，为半监督医学图像分割提供了一种高数据效率的解决方案，特别适用于标注资源极度稀缺的临床场景。

title: IRIS: An Intelligent Vision-Language System for Ocular Surface Diseases via Topic Tree and Scene-Driven VQA Generation
summary: While Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate remarkable generic capabilities, their clinical reasoning in specialized domains like ocular surface diseases (OSDs) is severely hindered by a paucity of high-fidelity, multimodal instruction-tuning data. To dismantle this data bottleneck, we introduce IRIS, an Intelligent Recognition and Interaction System tailored for fine-grained OSD understanding via external eye photography. First, we curate IRIS-120K, the largest and most comprehensive OSD visual question-answering (VQA) dataset to date. Crucially, to overcome the semantic shallowness of conventional image-caption pairs, we propose a synergistic data generation paradigm to explicitly inject clinical priors. Our data engine operates via a dual-branch framework: 1) a Topic Finding Tree (TFT) that hierarchically anchors visual features to precise anatomical and pathological concepts, enforcing rigorous medical deduction logic; and 2) a Scene-driven strategy that synthesizes role-adaptive clinical dialogues to ensure pragmatic generalization. By explicitly aligning a compact 4B-parameter VLM on this structurally enriched corpus, IRIS achieves state-of-the-art performance, comprehensively outperforming both generalist and specialized medical VLMs with up to 34B parameters. Our findings underscore that structured knowledge injection profoundly prevails over sheer parameter scaling, unlocking the potential for resource-efficient, expert-level AI deployment on mobile edge devices for scalable OSD screening. Code, datasets, and model weights will be publicly released by this repo.

AI.tldr: IRIS通过结构化临床知识注入的协同数据生成范式构建了最大规模眼表疾病VQA数据集IRIS-120K，使4B参数VLM在OSD细粒度理解上全面超越最高34B的通用及医学专用VLM，证明知识结构化比参数扩展更关键。
AI.motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型在眼表疾病等专业医学领域面临严重的临床推理能力不足问题，其根本瓶颈在于缺乏高质量、多模态的指令微调数据，且传统图像-文本描述对存在语义浅层化缺陷，无法支撑精细化的医学诊断推理。
AI.method: IRIS提出一种协同数据生成范式，通过双分支框架注入临床先验知识：一是主题发现树（TFT）将视觉特征分层锚定至精确的解剖与病理概念并强制执行医学演绎逻辑；二是场景驱动策略合成角色自适应临床对话以保证实用泛化能力。基于该结构增强语料对4B参数量级VLM进行微调。
AI.result: IRIS在眼表疾病细粒度理解任务上取得了最先进性能，全面超越包括高达34B参数的通用及医学专用VLM；其构建的IRIS-120K是迄今为止最大且最全面的OSD视觉问答数据集。
AI.conclusion: 结构化知识注入的效果显著优于单纯的参数规模扩展，这一发现为在资源受限的移动端设备上实现资源高效、专家级的可扩展OSD筛查AI部署开辟了新的可能性。

title: Road-Aware Anomaly Segmentation with Query-Guided Polygons and CLIP in Autonomous Driving
comment: Accepted to IEEE IV26. Code is available at https://github.com/chrisyan/RAAS
summary: Traditional semantic segmentation models operate under a closed-set assumption and struggle to recognize unknown or unexpected objects-an essential capability for autonomous driving. As a result, such models often misclassify or overlook out-of-distribution (OOD) road anomalies, posing safety risks in open-world environments. We present a lightweight, postprocessing, road-aware anomaly segmentation framework that requires no retraining, no OOD data, and no auxiliary supervision. Our approach builds on a mask transformer-based segmentation network by exploiting query-level mask confidence and deriving a polygonal road prior to detect gap regions that may correspond to anomalies. To further suppress false positives, we introduce a CLIP-based zero-shot semantic filtering module using in-distribution prompts, with optional generalized OOD prompts. By jointly leveraging spatial priors and semantic verification, our framework produces robust and interpretable anomaly predictions. Evaluation on three public benchmarks-Fishyscapes, SMIYC, and RoadAnomaly-shows consistently strong performance. In particular, our method outperforms the training-free baseline Maskomaly on most metrics and achieves the highest AP on Fishyscapes LostAndFound. These results demonstrate the practicality and deployability of our approach for real-world autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级、无需重训练的后处理异常分割框架，融合掩码Transformer的查询级置信度、多边形道路先验和CLIP零样本语义过滤，在多个自动驾驶基准上取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割模型在封闭集假设下无法识别未知或异常道路目标，导致自动驾驶系统在开放环境中存在安全隐患，而现有方法通常需要重训练、异常数据或辅助监督，缺乏轻量级且可部署的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于掩码Transformer分割网络，利用查询级掩码置信度导出多边形道路先验以检测间隙区域作为潜在异常，并引入CLIP零样本语义过滤模块，使用分布内提示（可选泛化OOD提示）抑制假阳性，形成空间先验与语义验证联合的推理框架。
AI.result: 在Fishyscapes、SMIYC和RoadAnomaly三个公开基准上表现稳健，尤其在Fishyscapes LostAndFound上取得最高AP，且整体指标优于无训练基线Maskomaly。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了无需重训练与额外数据的后处理框架在实际自动驾驶系统中的实用性与可部署性，为开放世界异常检测提供了兼具鲁棒性与可解释性的新范式。

title: HASSL: Hierarchy-Aware Self-Supervised Learning Framework for Single Cell Microscopy
summary: Hierarchical structure is common in image data, where fine-grained clusters often merge into larger, coarser semantic groups. In biological cell images, current self-supervised learning models often suppress this hierarchy, as coarse factors such as imaging modality can obscure finer morphological attributes in the latent space. We propose a hierarchy-aware self-supervised training framework to address this problem. Our method combines two components: a distillation framework with a segmentation teacher to improve morphological awareness in the latent space, and a hierarchy-aware contrastive loss based on HDBSCAN to improve decision boundaries between closely related subtypes at different hierarchical levels. Together, these components reduce the tendency of self-supervised learning to overemphasize coarse factors and instead align embeddings with semantic and morphological cues. This yields biologically meaningful sub-clusters driven by fine morphological detail. We train and evaluate our method on a curated corpus of 2.3 million single cells aggregated from 20 microscopy datasets, both labeled and unlabeled, covering 208 cell classes. Our method improves over baseline and counterpart methods, increasing average top-K accuracy by 2.8%, top-9 retrieval on the dataset with the deepest hierarchy by 6.3%, and downstream F1-score for biologically relevant drug classification from perturbed cell morphology by 7.8%.

AI.tldr: 提出一种层级感知的自监督学习框架，结合分割蒸馏与基于HDBSCAN的层级对比损失，使细胞图像嵌入对齐细粒度形态语义，在208类、230万单细胞数据集上Top-K准确率提升2.8%，深层层级检索提升6.3%，药物分类F1提升7.8%。
AI.motivation: 生物细胞图像中天然存在层级结构（细粒度聚类汇聚为粗粒度语义组），但现有自监督学习模型在潜空间中会抑制这种层级关系，因为成像模态等粗粒度因素会掩盖更细微的形态属性，导致嵌入空间无法保留有生物学意义的细粒度子聚类结构。
AI.method: 提出层级感知自监督训练框架，包含两个核心组件：（1）利用分割教师网络的蒸馏框架，增强潜空间对形态特征的感知能力；（2）基于HDBSCAN的层级感知对比损失，在不同层级水平上优化紧密相关子类型之间的决策边界。二者共同抑制自监督学习对粗粒度因素的过度强调，使嵌入空间对齐语义与形态线索。
AI.result: 在包含230万单细胞、208个细胞类别、来自20个显微镜数据集的语料库上，该方法相较于基线及对比方法，平均Top-K准确率提升2.8%，在层级最深的子集上Top-9检索提升6.3%，基于扰动细胞形态进行药物分类的下游F1分数提升7.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了自监督学习在细胞图像中过度聚焦粗粒度因素的问题，使嵌入空间能够保留由精细形态细节驱动的生物学语义子聚类，为大规模、多模态、层级化的细胞图像分析提供了有效的自监督学习范式。

title: Aura: Consistent Multi-Subject Video Generation via VLM-Grounded Semantic Alignment
summary: Subject-driven and multi-element video generation are central to controllable video synthesis, but existing methods still struggle to preserve identity consistency and model complex relationships among multiple subjects. In this paper, we propose Aura, a unified framework for high-fidelity and identity-consistent video generation. To better capture scene dynamics and subject interactions, we introduce AI director-level captions that provide dense and structured descriptions of video content. We further leverage a vision-language model (VLM) with learnable queries to extract multimodal semantic features from textual and visual references, covering both global semantics and fine-grained visual cues. To bridge the representational gap between the VLM and the Diffusion Transformer (DiT), we design a two-stage alignment strategy that progressively maps VLM features into the DiT feature space. For visual conditioning, we adopt token concatenation to inject reference information directly into the generation process. To distinguish heterogeneous subject types and reduce common copy-paste artifacts, we develop a subject-aware RoPE-Shift mechanism. To further differentiate reference images of different categories, we introduce subject-aware learnable tokens. In addition, we introduce Memory Tokens to balance the training signal across examples with different numbers of reference subjects. During inference, Progressive-APG (Adaptive Prompt Guidance) further alleviates oversaturation and improves semantic alignment with user prompts. Finally, we build a high-quality video-subject image dataset through a dedicated data construction pipeline. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both single-subject generation and more challenging multi-element scenarios.

AI.tldr: Aura 提出了一个统一的框架，结合密集结构化的AI导演级字幕、基于可学习查询的VLM特征提取、两阶段对齐策略、主题感知的RoPE-Shift机制以及渐进式APG推理策略，在保持身份一致性的单主体和多元素视频生成任务上达到了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有主体驱动和多元素视频生成方法难以保持多主体间的身份一致性，且无法有效建模复杂的主体间关系，缺乏对视频内容中场景动态和主体交互的精细描述能力。
AI.method: Aura 框架包含：AI导演级字幕用于提供密集结构化视频描述；基于可学习查询的VLM提取多模态语义特征；两阶段对齐策略将VLM特征映射到DiT空间；采用Token拼接注入参考信息；主题感知RoPE-Shift机制区分异构主体类型并减少复制粘贴伪影；主题感知可学习Token区分不同类别的参考图像；Memory Tokens平衡不同参考主体数量样本间的训练信号；推理阶段使用渐进式APG缓解过饱和并改善语义对齐。
AI.result: 在单主体生成和更具挑战性的多元素场景上，Aura 均达到了最先进的性能表现，实验结果表明其在保持身份一致性和建模复杂主体关系方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Aura 通过统一框架有效解决了主体驱动视频生成中的身份一致性和多主体建模难题，其提出的字幕生成、视觉-语言特征对齐、主题感知机制和渐进式推理策略为可控视频合成提供了系统性的解决方案。

title: Transferability Between Understanding and Generation in Unified Multimodal Models
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2026. Project Page: this https URL
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) integrate image understanding and generation within a single architecture, yet how the two tasks interact remains understudied. We investigate $\boldsymbol{\mathsf{transferability}}$ in UMMs: whether training a capability on one task improves the same capability on the other without explicit supervision. Through controlled experiments, we empirically find that transferability depends on architecture-models with fully shared transformer backbone and a unified visual encoder exhibit consistent cross-task transfer, while loosely coupled designs show little or none. Leveraging this transferability, we propose a practical training strategy. The most straightforward way to improve a target generative capability (e.g., counting) is to fine-tune generation directly, but this can degrade visual quality due to distribution shift. Instead, we train the corresponding understanding task and let it transfer into generation, which improves capability-specific generative performance while minimizing distribution shift. We validate this across three capabilities-counting, spatial relation, and text recognition/generation-showing that cross-task transferability can be systematically exploited in UMMs.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了统一多模态模型（UMMs）中图像理解与生成任务之间的跨任务可迁移性，发现其依赖全共享Transformer架构，并利用该特性提出通过训练理解任务来提升生成任务性能的训练策略，在计数、空间关系、文本识别/生成三个能力上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 统一多模态模型（UMMs）将图像理解与生成集成于单一架构，但两类任务之间如何相互影响、是否存在任务间的能力迁移仍缺乏系统研究，这一研究空白限制了UMMs训练策略的优化设计。
AI.method: 通过受控实验探究UMMs中跨任务可迁移性（transferability）的存在条件与机制，发现全共享Transformer主干加统一视觉编码器的紧密耦合架构能够实现一致的跨任务迁移，而松散耦合设计则几乎没有迁移效果；基于此发现，提出一种利用可迁移性的训练策略：不直接微调目标生成能力（如计数、空间关系、文本生成），而是训练对应的理解任务，利用跨任务迁移间接提升生成性能，从而避免因直接微调生成任务导致的分布偏移和质量退化。
AI.result: 在计数、空间关系、文本识别/生成三个能力维度上的实验验证表明：全共享Transformer主干架构下的UMMs表现出稳定且一致的跨任务可迁移性；所提出的通过训练理解任务来间接提升生成任务性能的策略，能够有效提升能力相关的生成性能，同时最小化分布偏移，优于直接微调生成任务的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了UMMs中跨任务可迁移性依赖于具体架构设计的关键条件，并提出了一种系统性地利用该可迁移性来优化生成任务训练的新范式，为后续统一多模态模型的设计与训练提供了重要指导方向。

title: Event Detection in Videos: A Framework for the Development of New Methods
summary:
Event detection tasks in videos, the most important aspect of video surveillance, aim to detect events either at the pixel-level, frame-level, or clip-level. Plenty of methods intended for event detection in different environments, for various applications, and within different acquisition techniques were introduced. Naturally, the attempts were made as well to classify these algorithms in terms of detection of performance or in terms of real-time abilities. Nevertheless, the lack of a large-scale dataset as well as rigorous performance evaluation methods have biased such comparisons as well as the development of the methods.
  Given the diversity of existing approaches, we believe it is essential for researchers to position their work within such a rich landscape. Thus, we propose a rigorous framework for developing new methods in event detection for videos. Specifically, this framework is based on three main pillars: datasets, performance evaluation, and scenarios for deploying methods.

AI.tldr: 本文针对视频事件检测领域缺少大规模数据集和统一性能评估方法的问题，提出了一个基于数据集、性能评估和部署场景三大支柱的框架，以规范新方法的开发与比较。
AI.motivation: 视频事件检测是视频监控的核心任务，虽然已有多种针对不同环境和应用的方法被提出，但由于缺乏大规模标准化数据集和严格的性能评估方法，已有算法的比较存在偏差，且阻碍了该领域方法的健康发展。
AI.method: 该论文提出了一个用于指导视频事件检测新方法开发的系统性框架，该框架建立在三个核心支柱之上：用于训练和测试的标准化数据集、统一的性能评估方法，以及面向不同应用场景的部署方案。
AI.result: 该工作未提出具体实验结果或定量性能指标，而是从方法论层面指出现有研究受限于数据集和评估标准不统一的现状，并据此提出了一个结构化的框架来系统化推动领域发展。
AI.conclusion: 本文的框架为视频事件检测研究者提供了一个规范化的方法研发和比较体系，有助于在该领域多样化方法背景下清晰定位自身工作，并推动更公平、可复现的算法评估。

title: ResearchStudio-Reel: Automate the Last Mile of Research from Paper to Poster, Video, and Blog
summary: Research dissemination, turning a paper into a poster, a talk video, and a blog post, is still a manual last mile. Prior automation treats each artifact in isolation that each re-extract the paper from scratch, usually ship one-way renders the author cannot reopen in PowerPoint or Word, and gates quality on soft VLM-preference scores that plateau while load-bearing sections still read as empty. We argue this last mile is best built as a composition of skills: thin agent-readable contracts that share one upstream extractor and wrap deterministic primitives in a measured-fill loop whose exits are hard pass/fail render gates. We instantiate this as ResearchStudio-Reel, five Claude Code and Codex skills organized into one shared extractor (Paper2Assets), three editable generators (Paper2Poster, Paper2Video, Paper2Blog), and one interactive convergence layer (Paper2Reel). Paper2Assets extracts each paper once into a shared bundle that can be reused by every downstream skill; The three generators produce a print-ready poster, a synchronized talk video, and a bilingual blog that stay factually consistent and round-trip through PowerPoint or Word; Paper2Reel then binds all three into a self-contained HTML viewer whose section-level clicks jump the video, slides, captions, and blog to matching content. On the Paper2Poster benchmark, our posters lead every aesthetic and information sub-criterion against both prior automated systems and single-shot frontier LLMs, surpassing the authors' own on aesthetics under two held-out VLM judges and winning overall on 84% to 93% of papers; capability audits further show that, by uniquely pairing narration-aligned on-slide highlights with a bilingual blog gated by layout-aware DOCX repair, ResearchStudio-Reel is the only pipeline to ship all three editable artifacts. Project is available at https://aka.ms/ResearchStudio

AI.tldr: 提出ResearchStudio-Reel框架，通过可编辑的技能组合（共享提取器+三个生成器+交互聚合层）将论文一次性转化为海报、演讲视频和双语博客，实现了远超此前方案的可编辑性、事实一致性和美学质量。
AI.motivation: 论文传播（将论文转化为海报、演讲视频和博客）仍是人工处理的最后一公里。现有自动化方案将每种产物独立处理，每项任务从头重新提取论文，产出单向渲染的产物（用户无法在PowerPoint或Word中重新编辑），且其质量依赖于软性的VLM偏好分数，这类分数在负载关键章节仍为空读时便已趋于停滞。
AI.method: 将论文传播构建为技能组合（composition of skills），包括：一个共享的论文提取器Paper2Assets（一次性提取，下游复用）、三个可编辑生成器Paper2Poster、Paper2Video、Paper2Blog（分别产生可往返编辑的海报、同步解说视频、双语博客），以及一个交互聚合层Paper2Reel（将三者绑定为HTML查看器，支持按章节点击跳转）。系统采用确定性原语包裹的measured-fill循环，以硬性的通过/不通过渲染门控作为退出条件。
AI.result: 在Paper2Poster基准上，海报在美学和信息两个维度的所有子指标上均领先于此前自动化系统和单次前沿LLM，在两位独立VLM裁判下美学评分超越作者原始海报；在84%至93%的论文上获得总体胜出。能力审计显示，通过结合叙述对齐的幻灯片高亮与布局感知的DOCX修复双语博客，ResearchStudio-Reel是唯一能够同时产出三种可编辑产物的管线。
AI.conclusion: 将论文传播分解为共享提取、可编辑生成和硬门控质量检验的技能组合设计，能够有效解决现有方案的可编辑性缺失和事实一致性问题，为科研传播自动化提供了新的范式。

title: PulmoSight-XAI: An Explainable Multi-View Attention Ensemble with Gradient Boosting Meta-Learning for Multi-Label Chest X-Ray Classification
summary: Automated chest X-ray classification remains challenging due to severe class imbalance, co-occurring pathologies, and the loss of localized features in conventional architectures. To address these, we propose an explainable hierarchical multi-view ensemble framework for the robust classification of 14 thoracic pathologies. The framework employs view-specific training by independently modeling frontal and lateral radiographs using an ensemble of five complementary convolutional neural networks. Replacing global average pooling, a multi-scale feature fusion strategy augmented with Convolutional Block Attention Modules (CBAM) preserves fine-grained intermediate representations while emphasizing high-level pathology-specific semantic features. To mitigate positive-negative imbalance and varying inter-class difficulty, models are optimized using a novel hybrid objective combining Asymmetric Loss with Adaptive Focal Loss. Beyond simple probability averaging, the framework incorporates a hierarchical meta-learning strategy where test-time augmentation (TTA) predictions and cross-model uncertainty measures are integrated into Level-1 gradient-boosting meta-learners (XGBoost, LightGBM, and CatBoost), followed by Level-2 stacking with optimized alpha blending. Evaluated on a large-scale CheXpert-style dataset, the framework achieves state-of-the-art macro-average AUROC scores of 0.9319 for frontal and 0.9154 for lateral radiographs. Furthermore, comprehensive explainability analysis using seven post-hoc attribution techniques demonstrates strong anatomical consistency and clinically meaningful decision localization. By integrating architectural diversity, multi-scale attention, hierarchical meta-learning, and rigorous explainability, the proposed framework provides a transparent, highly accurate, and clinically practical computer-aided diagnosis system for thoracic disease classification.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种可解释的层次化多视图集成框架，通过视图特定训练、多尺度特征融合与CBAM、非对称损失与自适应焦点损失的混合目标，以及两级元学习集成策略，在CheXpert数据集上以0.9319（正位）和0.9154（侧位）的宏观平均AUROC实现胸部X光14种病理分类的最先进性能，并利用七种事后归因技术验证了临床可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有胸部X光自动分类面临严重类别不平衡、病理共现以及传统架构丧失局部特征等问题，导致模型在复杂多标签场景下性能受限且缺乏可解释性，难以满足临床实用需求。
AI.method: 提出层次化多视图集成框架：对正位和侧位X光片分别使用五种互补CNN的集成进行视图特定训练；以多尺度特征融合策略结合CBAM取代全局平均池化以保留细粒度中间表示；采用非对称损失与自适应焦点损失的混合目标函数处理正负样本不平衡与类间难度差异；构建两级元学习策略——第一级利用测试时增强预测与跨模型不确定性度量输入XGBoost、LightGBM、CatBoost梯度提升元学习器，第二级通过优化alpha混合进行堆叠集成。
AI.result: 在CheXpert规模数据集上，框架对正位和侧位X光片分别取得0.9319和0.9154的宏观平均AUROC，达到最先进水平；七种事后归因可解释性分析表明模型具有强解剖一致性和临床有意义的决策定位。
AI.conclusion: 通过架构多样性、多尺度注意力、层次化元学习与严格可解释性的有机融合，该框架构建了一个透明、高精度且临床实用的计算机辅助诊断系统，为胸部疾病分类提供了兼具性能与可信度的解决方案。

title: CRISP: A Spatiotemporal Camera-Radar Backbone for Driving via Forecasting-Based World-Model Pretraining
summary: Camera-radar (CR) fusion is a practical sensing configuration for autonomous driving, but existing models are typically trained with task-specific supervision, limiting reusable representation learning. We present CRISP, a spatiotemporal CR backbone pretrained through forecasting-based representation learning. Given historical multi-view images and radar sweeps, CRISP learns a unified bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation by predicting future LiDAR point clouds. LiDAR is used only as privileged supervision during pretraining; the deployed model requires only camera and radar. To make forecasting-based pretraining effective for CR fusion, CRISP introduces an enhanced radar encoder, radar-enhanced temporal self-attention, and multimodal feature rendering with modality innovation gating. These components inject radar range and Doppler cues into BEV temporal propagation and allow BEV tokens to selectively incorporate camera and radar evidence. Experiments on nuScenes show that CRISP improves long-horizon point cloud forecasting and transfers effectively to downstream tasks, including 3D detection, tracking, online mapping, motion forecasting, future occupancy prediction, and planning, suggesting that predictive CR pretraining is a promising path toward scalable driving representations under practical sensor configurations. The project website is https://umfieldrobotics.github.io/CRISP.

AI.tldr: CRISP提出了一种基于预测预训练的雷达-相机融合骨干网络，通过预测未来激光雷达点云学习统一的鸟瞰图表示，在无需激光雷达部署的条件下显著提升了多项自动驾驶下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的相机-雷达融合模型通常依赖任务特定的监督信号进行训练，限制了可复用的表示学习能力，且缺乏能够在实际部署传感器配置（仅相机和雷达）下进行高效预训练的统一框架。
AI.method: CRISP基于预测式表示学习框架，利用历史多视角图像和雷达扫描数据，通过预测未来激光雷达点云来学习统一的鸟瞰图（BEV）表示；激光雷达仅在预训练阶段作为特权监督信号，部署时仅需相机和雷达。模型引入了增强型雷达编码器、雷达增强的时间自注意力机制，以及带有模态创新门控的多模态特征渲染模块，将雷达的距离和多普勒信息注入BEV时序传播，并使BEV令牌能够选择性融合相机和雷达的特征证据。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上的实验表明，CRISP在长时序点云预测任务上表现优异，并能够有效迁移至3D检测、跟踪、在线地图构建、运动预测、未来占用预测和规划等多项下游任务，均取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，基于预测的雷达-相机联合预训练是实现实际传感器配置下可扩展驾驶表征学习的有效途径，为在低成本传感器设置下替代激光雷达提供了一种可行的预训练范式。

title: Fields of the Planet: Field Boundary Mapping Beyond 10m
summary: Field-boundary maps support crop monitoring, irrigation planning, and yield estimation, but many smallholder parcels span only a few 10 m Sentinel-2 pixels. We introduce Fields of the Planet (FTP), a 3 m PlanetScope companion to Fields of The World (FTW) that pairs the same polygons, seasonal windows, and train/test splits with 133,168 co-registered PlanetScope patch-window targets across 24 countries. FTP evaluates field delineation as parcel recovery by vectorizing predictions before scoring panoptic quality (PQ), object F1, size-stratified PQ, and meter-scale matched-boundary error. Under matched architectures and training recipes, 3 m imagery raises PQ from 21.0 to 35.5, raises PQ on sub-0.5 ha fields from 5.8 to 15.7, and cuts matched-boundary error from 18.6 m to 7.4 m.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 Fields of the Planet (FTP)，一个与 Fields of The World (FTW) 配对的 3 米分辨率 PlanetScope 农田边界数据集，覆盖 24 个国家共 133,168 个样本。在相同架构和训练配置下，3 米影像将全景质量从 21.0 提升至 35.5，并将边界匹配误差从 18.6 米降至 7.4 米，显著提升了对小地块的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于 Sentinel-2（10 米分辨率）的农田边界数据集对仅占几个像素的小农地块分割精度不足，难以有效支持作物监测、灌溉规划和产量估算等应用。因此，迫切需要更高分辨率的遥感数据与配套基准数据集来提升小尺度田块边界的检测能力。
AI.method: 作者构建了 FTP 数据集，以 3 米分辨率的 PlanetScope 影像作为 Sentinel-2 的补充，保持与 FTW 相同的多边形、季节窗口和训练/测试划分，提供 133,168 个配准后的 PlanetScope 图块目标。评估采用矢量化预测后的地块恢复方式进行评分，计算全景质量（PQ）、对象 F1、按面积分层的 PQ 以及米级匹配边界误差等指标。
AI.result: 在相同架构和训练策略下，3 米分辨率影像将全景质量从 21.0 提升至 35.5，对小于 0.5 公顷的田块 PQ 从 5.8 提升至 15.7，并将匹配边界误差从 18.6 米降低至 7.4 米。这些结果证实了高空间分辨率对小地块边界检测的显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，将 3 米 PlanetScope 影像作为现有 10 米 Sentinel-2 数据的补充，可在保持相同评估协议的前提下大幅提升田块边界提取精度，尤其有利于小农田块场景。FTP 数据集为全球高分辨率农田制图提供了新的基准资源，并支持更精细的农业遥感应用。

title: Explainable Novel Category Discovery in Semantic Concept Space
summary: Novel category discovery aims to identify unseen classes from unlabeled data by transferring knowledge from labeled categories, but most existing methods perform discovery in opaque latent feature spaces. As a result, they may separate novel categories accurately while providing little insight into what semantic evidence defines each discovered group. We propose xNCD, an explainable novel category discovery framework that performs both representation-based discovery and pseudo-label assignment directly in a structured semantic concept space. Instead of clustering arbitrary deep features, xNCD learns a label-free concept representation by aligning visual features with vision-language similarity priors from pretrained multimodal models, and then applies a unified labeled-and-unlabeled self-labeling objective over concept-space logits. This design makes each discovered category explainable by construction through stable concept signatures and instance-level concept evidence. Theoretically, we show that routing discovery through a semantic concept bottleneck induces a strict restriction of the feature-space hypothesis class, excluding a large family of unconstrained decision rules and biasing induced partitions toward semantically interpretable concept coordinates. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and CUB-200 demonstrate that xNCD preserves strong discovery performance while providing intrinsic explanations. Under task-agnostic evaluation, xNCD achieves 92.63% overall accuracy on CIFAR-10, close to UNO's 93.4%, and improves CIFAR-100 overall accuracy from 73.2% to 76.45%, while being the only compared method that provides human-readable cluster- and instance-level explanations.

AI.tldr: xNCD提出了一种可解释的新型类别发现框架，通过在结构化语义概念空间中直接进行表示学习和伪标签分配，使得每个发现的类别能够通过稳定的概念签名和实例级概念证据实现内在可解释性，在保持强大发现性能的同时提供人类可读的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有新型类别发现方法通常在不可解释的潜在特征空间中进行聚类，虽然能准确分离未见类别，但无法揭示定义每个发现类别的语义证据，缺乏内在可解释性。
AI.method: xNCD通过将视觉特征与预训练多模态模型的视觉-语言相似性先验对齐，学习无标签概念表示，并在概念空间logits上应用统一的带标签与无标签数据自标记目标函数。该设计通过将发现过程路由通过语义概念瓶颈，严格限制了特征空间假设类族，排除大量无约束决策规则，使发现结果自然具有可解释性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和CUB-200上的实验表明，xNCD在保持强发现性能的同时提供内在解释。在任务无关评估下，xNCD在CIFAR-10上达到92.63%的总体准确率（接近UNO的93.4%），将CIFAR-100总体准确率从73.2%提升至76.45%，并且是唯一提供人类可读的聚类级和实例级解释的对比方法。
AI.conclusion: xNCD证明了将类别发现路由至语义概念瓶颈不仅能够实现可解释性，还能通过限制假设空间来提升发现性能，为可解释的开放世界视觉识别提供了新的方向，同时揭示了语义概念空间在平衡可解释性与判别性能方面的潜力。

title: TORINO: Token Reduction via Interpretable Concept Overlap in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities across different tasks, but their computational cost is dominated by the large number of visual tokens fed to the language model. Existing token reduction methods rely on attention-based scores or pairwise similarity, without an explicit semantic representation of each token. We introduce TORINO (TOken Reduction via Interpretable coNcept Overlap), a plug-and-play framework for adaptive visual token reduction in VLMs that requires no fine-tuning of the underlying model. TORINO leverages Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) to project visual tokens into an interpretable latent space where token relationships can be analyzed through shared concept activations.
